name: John Fetterman
subject: A short(s) message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)
Heyyyyyy Peter, it’s John Fetterman.
You know me — I like to keep it short(s):
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230806-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230806-1&refcode2=417_552475_AnbluR&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)
So let’s get right to it: **Bob Casey is one of the top targets of Mitch McConnell and national Republicans, and he needs our grassroots help to win.**
[**Can you chip in to help re-elect Bob and keep us fighting for PA in the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230806-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230806-1&refcode2=417_552475_AnbluR&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230806-1?refcode=em20230806-1&refcode2=417_552475_AnbluR&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)**
Fun fact: I’ve been able to increase my shorts time ever since I figured out I don’t have to wear a suit to vote “yea” or “nay” from the threshold of the Senate chamber. 😎
And every single “yea” or “nay” in the Senate is important, Peter, because we’ve got a razor-thin 51-seat Democratic majority. **That’s why we have to do everything we can to re-elect Bob and defend our majority in Pennsylvania.**
[**With Republicans ready to pour million$ of dollars into our Commonwealth to defeat Bob Casey, we need tons of grassroots support right away. Can you chip in to help us win + keep Bob Casey in the fight with me?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230806-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230806-1&refcode2=417_552475_AnbluR&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)
THANK YOU for stepping up to help Bob today!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=417%2E552475%2EAnbluR)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: We’re going to need a surge of grassroots support if we want to gain ground in Republican-led states. Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? | | | | | Since securing a Democratic trifecta in the midterms, Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has been working alongside state Democrats to safeguard abortion rights and expand access to the ballot box. But in North Carolina, Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper is gridlocked – state Republicans are using their razor-thin supermajority to override Gov. Cooper’s veto, ban abortion, and limit voting rights... SO NOW → We’re working around the clock to power fundraise so we can expand Democratic power in state legislatures and break up Republican strongholds. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Electing state Democrats who will work alongside Democratic governors to secure fundamental freedoms in their states is our best path forward. We gained trifectas in Michigan, Minnesota, Massachusetts, and Maryland last cycle, but our work is far from over. We’re going to need a surge of grassroots support if we want to gain ground in Republican-led states. Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Thank you
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/thank-you?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| As we approach Election Day, I want to take a moment to thank the voters for their engagement in the most important practice in our nation: voting. Over the past few months, I’ve had the opportunity to meet and introduce myself to many of you: In your homes, at your doorstep, and in your driveway.

I’ve always loved this corner of our state, and this campaign has solidified that for me. It’s why Megan and I decided to make this our permanent home in 2016 and start a family here. And it’s why I decided to serve you as District Attorney, because we need to do everything we can to preserve the safety and security of the families who call this home, like ours.

I will not make campaign promises I cannot keep, but I do promise to serve you with integrity and follow a plan that prioritizes your safety, concerns, and our law enforcement over criminals.

Fundamentally, I hold true to strong conservative beliefs, including the right to life, limited government, fiscal responsibility, the rule of law, individual freedoms, zero tolerance for illegal immigration, and preserving the Second Amendment.

And I am the only candidate in this race who can say they did not vote for (or donate to) the party of Joe Biden in 2020. In fact, I am the only candidate in my race who can say they never voted Democrat - EVER.

I believe the future of DeSoto County is worth fighting fiercely to protect. And preserving it starts with you and your voice in the voting booth. So I once again thank you for your participation in the voting process and underscore the value of your role in elected government, especially the local level, where it matters the most.

My commitment to your safety and to those who keep us safe will never waiver as District Attorney.

Thank you and I humbly ask for your vote this Tuesday.
---
| [READ MATTHEW'S FULL PLAN](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=abc1a8ed1b&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=5fc46a8674&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=bc67331a94&e=3c5d31b5ad)_
---
| |
---

**Meet Matthew Barton**
---

Matthew Barton grew up in Petal, Mississippi in a blue-collar family. His mother was a director at Tupperware and his father owned the small, family business – Barton Fence Company – where Matthew worked growing up.
After attending public school, Matthew attended Pearl River Community College and Warner University, where he studied Business Administration. He holds a law degree from Ole Miss Law, where he graduated Cum Laude and received the interviewing and counseling award.
In 2011, Matthew married his high school sweetheart, Megan. After graduating from Ole Miss Law in 2015, they moved to DeSoto County where Matthew started a law firm and Megan continued working at the Desoto County Schools as a Certified Occupational Therapy Assistant.
During law school, Matthew served as an intern in the DeSoto County District Attorney’s Office where he presented cases to grand jury, tried cases to verdict, and performed all functions of a practicing attorney. He has served as a prosecutor for the City of Southaven and the City of Horn Lake and now serves as a special prosecutor for Southaven, Horn Lake, and DeSoto County Justice Courts – where he’s established a strict, tough on crime reputation.
As an attorney, Mathew has dealt with every type of criminal matter ranging from DUI to capital murder, in more than 37 courts across Mississippi.
Matthew is a member of the Federalist Society, a conservative legal association, an enhanced conceal carry permit holder, Krewe of Hernando member, NRA member, and donates his time serving as a pro bono attorney to Veterans every year.
Today, Matthew, his wife Megan, and their daughter Eleanor live in Hernando where Matthew owns his private law firm. Eleanor attends Pre-K at Hernando United Methodist Church and Megan is a stay at home mom after seven years with DeSoto County schools.
| | | | | | | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=08c9041cd2&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=a4d0bc89e6&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | [](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=c7aa7ee92d&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © | Matthew Barton for District Attorney | All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 48 Hernando, Mississippi 38632

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=869da23cb4&e=3c5d31b5ad&c=16c533e041) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=869da23cb4&e=3c5d31b5ad&c=16c533e041).

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Claim $10,000 In FREE silver In 2023
body:
Loomer Unleashed Newsletter

body:
This could sink the Dems in 2024.

Peter Willis:
Biden is losing the Black vote. Thanks to the
work we and other organizations have done in Black communities,
support for Democrats is at an all-time low.
Since our Chairman, James Golden aka Bo
Snerdley, began New Journey in 2020, we've exposed the lies Biden
and the Dems feed the Black community to win the election, but
we've provided them with the truth about it all, including
Bidenomics.
The headlines above are a small example of
what can be accomplished when we educate Black voters, but it's
not a reason to celebrate just yet.
Democrats still have an opportunity to
reverse our gains.
Chip in $25, $50, or $100 today and help us
double down on our efforts to persuade more Black voters to join
the Republican Party.
To be honest, I'm worried. Why?
Because I know exactly what to expect from
the Left in their attempts to ensure Black voters stay loyal to
the Democrat Party.
No, they won't talk about all the good
they've done for the Black community. Instead, they'll scare
Black people into thinking that Republicans are just a bunch of
racists who want to us back in chains.
It's the same playbook they've used for six
decades. The left will stoke racial division in America because
it is good for their political agenda.
It doesn't bring new jobs or opportunities to
Black communities… It's simply a ploy for Biden and his
leftist Black Democrat allies to keep their grasp on power.
You must help us fight back TODAY! With your
support, we are increasing our education program to Black voters
and are winning them over.
Black America is coming home to the GOP, but
succeeding like we've been doing takes time, people, and money.
And right now, Biden and the Left are outspending us.
If we want Black America to benefit from the
American Dream, then we can't allow him and the Democrat Party to
continue being rewarded for failing us.
Black America deserves better than we've
received from Joe Biden's history of racist remarks and false
promises at our expense. If you agree, then help us expand the
momentum today!
For a New Journey,

Dr. Khalilah Camacho-Ali
Outreach Ambassador
New Journey PAC

MAKE BLACK AMERICA
CONSERVATIVE AGAIN

PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

New Journey PAC was founded by James Golden,
aka Bo Snerdley, who is the former Executive Producer for the
Rush Limbaugh Show and worked alongside Limbaugh for 30 years.
New Journey PAC engages minority voters with an effective,
relentless campaign to answer the Left's lies about the
Republican Party and educates voters as to why the GOP is the
only party of freedom and prosperity.

Please take a minute to read the special message from our
sponsor.
Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service
free of charge.
The sponsorship above reflects the opinions &
representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion
of UnWavering Conservative

body:
---

| Good Vibes!

| Friends,
Thank you for the prayers and support. A memorable moment, I thought you might like this photo sent to us from the May 6 convention where my wife Tracy and I were full of smiles as we celebrate a landslide win. Our incredible team makes it fun and I am enjoying meeting all of you on the campaign trail. We must come together for the common cause of winning in November because that is all that matters!
Let us know via email john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you want to volunteer, knock doors, get a sign, or donate.
In addition to refocusing on my business [SEAL Team PT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019kFzXgIX6A-oQOT9uS4AmSTYw2iZphDeesmw9Zvw1Z8m2l6ke1zN6iK9TwWwm5-u6SSr4c5BBzVTR5R0ZemVWpGreDguO7rA1_Xi4Q2z29pqaqJ9UK0emGAsh8UQibiS2Z88XpB8Tf7nfyIjhIQKFA==&c=R2lz4lvvlqC7htHEVck1TMUQw22cele_v5aEAvX2oNGSt3jydzundQ==&ch=oheaHcW3ZQdpXT5xj37poZtm2g-kBpucTg5UuRtajZjw3BsVE54wpQ==), here is some of what I have been up to and what's on my mind:

| Song of The Day, Good Vibes

---
| Be "numb to the dumb", keep it positive, and stay focused on the mission. Remember, God is in control. For a little positivity and motivation, listen to this song by Chris Janson - "Good Vibes" (Official Music Video). [Click here to listen and watch the music video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019kFzXgIX6A-oQOT9uS4AmSTYw2iZphDeesmw9Zvw1Z8m2l6ke1zN6iK9TwWwm5-uZrOHI97WWLuv0lRsxGyVQT6kgA3oEHeoKV3RkSvcni5E5Ajpeh4IRXAbtRCma84NUFyIMlxPxVJ9khUCSu8uEQPp4gqJaSSzHxGUN3zDVfTt5hMBBoHFoQ==&c=R2lz4lvvlqC7htHEVck1TMUQw22cele_v5aEAvX2oNGSt3jydzundQ==&ch=oheaHcW3ZQdpXT5xj37poZtm2g-kBpucTg5UuRtajZjw3BsVE54wpQ==)

Crestview Elementary School Tuesday

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019kFzXgIX6A-oQOT9uS4AmSTYw2iZphDeesmw9Zvw1Z8m2l6ke1zN6iK9TwWwm5-uxnKBe89noAq-QJgV8qSqahDvMWFcw6MeDq8Ofo3jrIcgmlBHa280AH2N4wdKDLbEyJAA4uhA0QA5setw8H0EMk8k8khE5jLxJzItO-8mrHzk3_wGvRCuA7BNioKX26cPSAlEvC65yCZO2pyJesoCpZNACrf9GakZaQqo2Bor7TzhvJ76zszjrPBNxVEPHsBm&c=R2lz4lvvlqC7htHEVck1TMUQw22cele_v5aEAvX2oNGSt3jydzundQ==&ch=oheaHcW3ZQdpXT5xj37poZtm2g-kBpucTg5UuRtajZjw3BsVE54wpQ==)

| Henrico Parents and K-12 students are invited to Crestview Elementary School this Tuesday, August 8th, at 9:00 AM to have a conversation with Governor Glenn Youngkin about school issues. This is your chance to speak with the Governor and share your ideas and concerns to benefit our public education system. Spots are filling up fast so RSVP through the Eventbrite to secure your spot!
[https://www.eventbrite.com/e/parents-matter-conversation-with-governor-glenn-youngkin-tickets-688031218897](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019kFzXgIX6A-oQOT9uS4AmSTYw2iZphDeesmw9Zvw1Z8m2l6ke1zN6iK9TwWwm5-uxnKBe89noAq-QJgV8qSqahDvMWFcw6MeDq8Ofo3jrIcgmlBHa280AH2N4wdKDLbEyJAA4uhA0QA5setw8H0EMk8k8khE5jLxJzItO-8mrHzk3_wGvRCuA7BNioKX26cPSAlEvC65yCZO2pyJesoCpZNACrf9GakZaQqo2Bor7TzhvJ76zszjrPBNxVEPHsBm&c=R2lz4lvvlqC7htHEVck1TMUQw22cele_v5aEAvX2oNGSt3jydzundQ==&ch=oheaHcW3ZQdpXT5xj37poZtm2g-kBpucTg5UuRtajZjw3BsVE54wpQ==)

| Trump Lawyer, Alina Habba
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019kFzXgIX6A-oQOT9uS4AmSTYw2iZphDeesmw9Zvw1Z8m2l6ke1zN6iK9TwWwm5-u1__a4slOf8WWqEuo-4LmrT696sZ0Nee4IH_yNqgOBAclIfOf5Nt82ioTumNNxnqxgvStN0E-HazyrsF9HT5zXdJRfuZiOxf4cCmn616WnWt1RHWVvxadEQ==&c=R2lz4lvvlqC7htHEVck1TMUQw22cele_v5aEAvX2oNGSt3jydzundQ==&ch=oheaHcW3ZQdpXT5xj37poZtm2g-kBpucTg5UuRtajZjw3BsVE54wpQ==)

| Each time the public is given more evidence of Biden corruption, they try to distract you by going after Trump. This behavior is fascism, an effort to subvert the constitution, and it is dangerous. They use words like conspiracy to get around normal charges or rules of evidence. Whether you like Trump or not, you should dislike what they are doing against him even more. The purpose of the Bill of Rights is to protect the people from abuse of governmental power. Trumps attorney, Elina Habba, gives you the timeline and gets strait to the point. "This is election interference at its finest" The American people are tired of the BS. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019kFzXgIX6A-oQOT9uS4AmSTYw2iZphDeesmw9Zvw1Z8m2l6ke1zN6iK9TwWwm5-u1__a4slOf8WWqEuo-4LmrT696sZ0Nee4IH_yNqgOBAclIfOf5Nt82ioTumNNxnqxgvStN0E-HazyrsF9HT5zXdJRfuZiOxf4cCmn616WnWt1RHWVvxadEQ==&c=R2lz4lvvlqC7htHEVck1TMUQw22cele_v5aEAvX2oNGSt3jydzundQ==&ch=oheaHcW3ZQdpXT5xj37poZtm2g-kBpucTg5UuRtajZjw3BsVE54wpQ==) to see her savage response!
---
| NRA, A Plus Rating
---
|
---
| As a veteran we all know sometimes you gotta be prepared to use iron sights. Our Second Amendment is more important today than ever. Under one party Democrat rule in Virginia police were bad, criminals were good, and no one cared about the victims. Why do you think they want to defund the police and take away your guns? Why do they want to punish law-abiding citizens by making us helpless victims? We know these radical anti gun Democrat ideas don't work in Chicago and other democrat run cities. I will never stop fighting to protect your God-given right to protect yourself and your family. It is an honor to have an A+ rating with the NRA!

| Antique Tractor
---
|
---
| When visiting the Orange County VFW years ago, they asked me if I knew anyone who wanted to buy a tractor. That VFW was closing down and merging with the Louisa VFW and needed to sell their tractor. It looked like it was stored for years in a garage. Since Tracy and I had just bought a farm in Goochland County, we bought it. It's a 1970 Ford 2000 gas with a snowplow on the front, a scraper, and we also have a bush hog for it. This tractor gets the job done and a local farmer told me I better never sell this tractor because it's easy to repair at home and will last forever. I enjoy talking tractors and farming with farmers around Senate District Ten!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Good Vibes! | | Friends, Thank you for the prayers and support. A memorable moment, I thought you might like this photo sent to us from the May 6 convention where my wife Tracy and I were full of smiles as we celebrate a landslide win. Our incredible team makes it fun and I am enjoying meeting all of you on the campaign trail. We must come together for the common cause of winning in November because that is all that matters! Let us know via email john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you want to volunteer, knock doors, get a sign, or donate. In addition to refocusing on my business ==, here is some of what I have been up to and what's on my mind: | Song of The Day, Good Vibes | == | Be "numb to the dumb", keep it positive, and stay focused on the mission. Remember, God is in control. For a little positivity and motivation, listen to this song by Chris Janson - "Good Vibes" (Official Music Video). == | Henrico County Event Crestview Elementary School Tuesday | == | Henrico Parents and K-12 students are invited to Crestview Elementary School this Tuesday, August 8th, at 9:00 AM to have a conversation with Governor Glenn Youngkin about school issues. This is your chance to speak with the Governor and share your ideas and concerns to benefit our public education system. Spots are filling up fast so RSVP through the Eventbrite to secure your spot! == | Trump Lawyer, Alina Habba | == | Each time the public is given more evidence of Biden corruption, they try to distract you by going after Trump. This behavior is fascism, an effort to subvert the constitution, and it is dangerous. They use words like conspiracy to get around normal charges or rules of evidence. Whether you like Trump or not, you should dislike what they are doing against him even more. The purpose of the Bill of Rights is to protect the people from abuse of governmental power. Trumps attorney, Elina Habba, gives you the timeline and gets strait to the point. "This is election interference at its finest" The American people are tired of the BS. == to see her savage response! | NRA, A Plus Rating | | As a veteran we all know sometimes you gotta be prepared to use iron sights. Our Second Amendment is more important today than ever. Under one party Democrat rule in Virginia police were bad, criminals were good, and no one cared about the victims. Why do you think they want to defund the police and take away your guns? Why do they want to punish law-abiding citizens by making us helpless victims? We know these radical anti gun Democrat ideas don't work in Chicago and other democrat run cities. I will never stop fighting to protect your God-given right to protect yourself and your family. It is an honor to have an A+ rating with the NRA! | Endorsement Alert: American Veterans Vote | | It is an honor to have the endorsement of American veterans vote. They promote the political voice of veterans and mission partners in support of veterans and their families, the defense of the constitution, and a strong national security.Thank you American Veterans Vote for your continued support. == | Delegate Chris Head for VA State Senate | | On my way to Tazewell, Virginia, I ran into my friend and fellow Christian Conservative Delegate Chris Head. Chris is the Republican senatorial candidate for the new Virginia 3rd District. I'm looking forward to serving with Chris in the State Senate. ￼Learn more about Chris and his campaign at his website: == | P2 Sandhu | | I ran into my Goochland neighbor and fellow Republican P2 at a Virginia State Senate event at Top Golf. Thank you for helping fellow Republican State Senate candidates all you do for Virginia! | Youngkin Early Vote Plan | == Governor Youngkin would like you to help us fight fire with fire by voting early. I would prefer hand count paper ballots on election day, but no changes will ever happen if we do not win in November. To learn more go to: == | | Goochland Tea Party Tent | | Stop by the Goochland Tea Party tent each Saturday 10am to 4pm at 30 Broad Street Road, Manakin Sabot, VA, 23103 next to the Food Lion in Centerville each Saturday from now to November 7. Stop by and learn about local politics, meet local candidates, get yard signs, Trump gear, McGuire gear, and more. Please bring a friend! | Louisa County AG Fair | | | | Town of Louisa Council Member Vicky Harte | | We had a wonderful time at the AG Fair in Louisa County. I enjoyed speaking with constituents. Special thank you to the Louisa County volunteers who manned the GOP tent. | Antique Tractor | | When visiting the Orange County VFW years ago, they asked me if I knew anyone who wanted to buy a tractor. That VFW was closing down and merging with the Louisa VFW and needed to sell their tractor. It looked like it was stored for years in a garage. Since Tracy and I had just bought a farm in Goochland County, we bought it. It's a 1970 Ford 2000 gas with a snowplow on the front, a scraper, and we also have a bush hog for it. This tractor gets the job done and a local farmer told me I better never sell this tractor because it's easy to repair at home and will last forever. I enjoy talking tractors and farming with farmers around Senate District Ten! | Louisa Convocation | | | | | | | | | | | | | Delegate Buddy Fowler and I had a wonderful time with friends at the Louisa Convocation. Superintendent of Louisa County Public Schools Doug Straley and his team did a great job firing everyone up in preparation for the new year! | Two Days With Senator Travis Hackworth | == You should spend a night or two and ride the off road trails at the == | | | They find many different types of fossils when mining. | | | | | | | | | Back of the Dragon is 32 miles of road with 438 curves and 3500 feet in elevation changes. To learn more go to == | == | We stopped by == for a steak and potato dinner. | | | I had a good time getting to know fellow Christian, conservative State Senator Travis Hackworth, in Tazewell, Virginia. I learned a lot about Southwest Virginia, their economic development challenges, met local businesses ==, ==, the == and ==. I'm looking forward to serving with Travis in the State Senate. Learn more about Senator Travis Hackworth and his campaign at his website: == | POW Memorial | == | | | We visited the Cedar Bluff Overlook Park POW/ MIA Memorial. It was built to help raise awareness to the POW/MIA issue in America. This non profit memorial was dedicated April 26, 2019 and it features flags from all branches of military, as well as the Virginia state flag and POW flag. Fellow veteran and friend Paul Galanti, a former Vietnam POW, said any day you have a door knob on both sides of the door is a good day. | Goochland Tea Party Anne James | | I ran into fellow Goochlander Ann James (not a shrinking violet) and her grandchildren at the Goochland Tea Party tent. | Buckingham County Trump Tent | | | | I stopped by the Buckingham County Trump merchandise tent at Teresa's Place. These folks will be at Farmers Daughter in Prince Edward August 12,10am to 4pm. | Prince Edward County GOP Picnic | Sheriff Tony Epps | It was great to see a very hard working SCC Member and patriot Renee Maxey and fellow Delegate Tommy Wright | State Senator Frank Ruff and Delegate Tommy Wright | | | | I enjoyed talking with folks in Prince Edward County at their GOP picnic. Thanks to you, we won Prince Edward big at the convention. Now we must continue to build support and work together to win in November! | | | | | | | New General Assembly Building in Richmond | | | We recently toured the new General Assembly Building in Richmond. It may be ready for move in by October. This will be a huge change over the Pocahontas building. I'm looking forward to serving you and working with fellow legislators to improve Virginia in the Senate! | Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. God willing, I will win in November and continue to serve you in the State Senate. Our goal is to get as many fellow Republicans elected as possible so we can stop the nonsense. Take care, please spread the word, and I look forward to seeing you around the District! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Republican Nominee for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior John 3:16 Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Leading the outsiders race
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWYK-peDNJ

Vivek 2024

As the first millennial to run for the GOP nomination, I
want to foster national pride....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWYK-peDNJ

Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had
never run for office before. I didn't have years of campaigning
under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my
campaign.

I bet most grassroots
conservatives only knew my name from Fox News appearances.

But now, 4 months after
announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am
climbing in the polls - even polling ahead of a former Vice
President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors.

I am proud of the outsider
campaign we are running. In addition to the millions my family
has personally invested, I am counting on folks like YOU to make
sure we have what it takes to continue to build on this momentum!

Can I count on you to step up -
even if it's just $1 or $5?

RUSH $1 →

RUSH $5 →

RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT
→

As the first millennial to run
for the GOP nomination, I want to foster national pride among
young Americans. I want to restore the values that make America
great: faith, family, patriotism, and hard work.

We need a PRIME spot on the
debate stage to discuss this with voters across the country, and
these poll numbers are KEY. But I really need help securing new
donors. Fellow American, please help however you can to make sure
we continue to take on the Washington elites.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN NOW →

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWYK-peDNJ

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWYK-peDNJ

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-72683327137-echo3-549439610A9F26F5A007EAD2388A109A@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Four U.S. Navy destroyers were sent to the Aleutian Islands following an incursion by 11 Chinese and Russian warships conducting a joint naval operation off the coast of Alaska.

---|---

If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQgOGnsbdGl7NjO4M31K2sjJG53LWH7BoFU8TbI7HC-kv_8L1ctkvRqvfrc2mch_St0NAHb5BO8YRuQ7tnYUZ2lvMc1tlDSN7bWw7MIhhZJFGhJcyFJL3KsmIK0YfZakZABwkirC6im8ABLCQLFU5ByBsPvOvox_TW9T5uLPW7P_iYqDdb899o8Gzc-XM045482CPv719aq36EaDxcW9H6-45_JT8BAAD__-u1Smw) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? [Click here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtliXAwMeGLp4S6ZKHS2M72JaHCIbBfXvq7Zr9vee9D4u0yWknO63a9jIVy5TiDU9aQJ3sidUE8rFMxGSkuTPZjhrME5ruXo3ExAZ1LNbNLKmaDT3bMGisY4HmTwCKnBgYVAWVQcKoI_cx0DOcNRCAy2plr37LOleV-L8XZ60d7FsMvu11sch1JvAUeDYWus4RJpL-foFBI7vK43_xpXaIXCUu18eLeWcDmOFhtsWUv6r1ZdvPwEAAP__4gtQBA). Enjoying _the Flyover_? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, [LMNT](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0U1r3DAQBuBfM755kUf-PPhQZ-Oy0E2gTfpxMkIe2WotyUizWfrvy7ZLTznOw_Ayw_vtPJ2V3axfnpSjnk2YlGb7RpNo8yZHOWE294YISWbUF3VXlKJuyzJbe4G1KUyhdDFLOTfVXFem7ajqRK3brsXM9ihQilY0opMNyoOQQlTaVFpRWxtdQilothzi4Wewnlcy2-_wRvGgg8u2fmXeE8gPgCPguKvInmI6zNH6X5vzfFsDHE0kyhdrOL9aXvP9EvWqEoEcL-wmrdyu7OJBHtVy3QHrmzqa7cWBPKY9-BTinVO4RE0gj_dD7qyDZ_IM8ngHpuj-TdEkP-lb-uP3h0-vX05fHwGHj6fxBXAYnz8DDrwS4PA_cXh4Pp9fn04vP7LYz_vVbptNdQOlWJyy29_f-d0m_gQAAP__dqKLAg).

|
---
## Chinese, Russian Warships Test Alaska Coast
Four U.S. Navy destroyers were sent to the Aleutian Islands following an incursion by [11 Chinese and Russian warships](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAQRn-N6YwG2zGkoLiGLtdeiSb2EHzr2MhjQPz7Vbbe5qs-6T29f4_5gSGG9PqLbxrrkmd0NRw0wyB7qfSsGj8uRIp0Q2Nn750BOxjTrGOvrF4s2gGMRu98556gu6HzePOdNc8mjAqUhgF6uOte6RY0wM0tN4c02MUZYYB8qLm0_3NIdaUlXvmg0rr8buK41rqx0H-EmoSazvNsMSJ_ISc6mfNeHH2eQk0fjlATDJ-xQk07y4THJT1xLfmiwtIH3rC6lbzESHsNmFjiUqlIt4ZETLLszAGTPIiZIkvecq3kZSIsz0uoqSmj384QY2DbCwOvN4b4Y1t_bfcdAAD__4lLcq0) conducting a joint naval operation off the coast of Alaska. Information about the event is still being declassified, but Alaska Sen. Dan Sullivan called it "unprecedented," and a former Navy captain described it as ["highly provocative."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn8N3oguB8Z4YOjiLV07Whc4YloClqGp8u-rdO7yLZ_09PQ-LuuFUk7l9k53dj3WlXxPD17BykmiWnEILjIjq4Hd2cxnDcZqPWxu1p7ZhMDmau0V9RT8ZP08mnmcrQEakkNABRYmmNWE6gQKYPRx9MTWRK-FBg6p1-P0WVPpG8f8rA8-Tr7eh-y23vcm1JvAReBSnntt_XUJXF5ggQvY1xiBy_HdWiJJJUi_pUKyceky03FjWehBWe7Uj5pljVH6Sq3LGiVlal8kcBkOF_aflHNqZhIabndK-U-j_xvlNwAA__9IRGJH) The U.S. ships, along with a P-8 Poseidon aircraft, [shadowed the Chinese and Russian ships](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyrCAUgOGnwQ4HAUULitvY7W1TOmfhoCdhwQF2Td4-k9Sp_-af7-223YAipf0_PNC2kDdwjV64iZkbLtUmO28DokTVoR2mZdBimrXuDuvNsDgcgr-P2g-LGY1ZjJvFfQ5mEqA7slJIJWZhxKKMVL1QQowujA5wnoLTTAv01HLp3zOldmCIX_mFpXf50UV7tHZWpv4xuTK5XtfVh_yZ8Ko_ncn1zJEaucrkWp61EnB3UAJeMXme4AWR14POyhNC4RChfgBvhfYdC6Wdh1wchmfkz8oL1jOnil2x_rwoRqqTYVrsD6D4-9P-1PkOAAD__29_aZU) away from the Alaskan coast, according to the Wall Street Journal. The paper said the ships never technically entered U.S. waters.
## NYC Riot Sparked by Playstation Giveaway
New York City police arrested Kai Cenat, a famous videogame influencer, and 65 other people for [inciting a riot in Union Square](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L8SnCAQgPGnwQ4HF_xXWKSxu7QpnZVbTnIIDuzI-PaZpE7_Fd_8fr22F_rg4-cnnrSwSxta9jdtapKjBL1B814cEZBuaOmGuTNqmIxpjqUbJk3DZGEcbWfctDvTudnssBs9Wuwav4ACrSY1qlmPoFulleqt6y3SNDhrhFH09pxy-zv5yAe58KSbcmvT2YTlYL6K0D8ErALWWmsbdxupPil__yYC1ki1CFhDshgErFw920MWzoQn5SI__ias-Ei6KbIsF-ZvkfbAVKSP8sR4IDNGeaXgLUnOj-QkbYqMPgpYTT_0vZ4FrE1e3lf1IfgyjMKoz4k-_Dvl_7r9CQAA__87p3Du) on Saturday after promising a PlayStation giveaway. The giveaway offer attracted thousands of people who turned on the police, throwing garbage, chairs, and bottles. The police responded by bringing out an estimated 1,000 officers. Mayor Eric Adams later blamed ["outside agitators,"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyozAQgOGngW4ZscKAC4pr6HztlcyetMIbC8mD1hC_fSapU__NP9-_23IjiZLWv7TxpCEv5FQOXswIA6BdsPZTYEa2NU9tf207049dV98nGoY-9CNjG1p7of_D6NtrsMjGIo5MtUxo0JrRDOZqB7SNscZcXLg44rEPrqs6w140781HlqR3DvGdD94bl7c6TnfVZ6nsnwrnCufzPJuQPxOf5btXOD9zFBVXKpzJ01agvNaVixbILy3iGWgVJc17AUlHjgd7SG8HkkJ8cXK8w4MEHCdS2CUrPMQXcJRSVthJCnso2QlF2NgL1fvkn6fEKKUfqs6sG0n8udVf7b4CAAD__9DedQg) saying people don't bring smoke bombs and M-80s to get a free PlayStation. The influencer, Cenat, 21, has 13 million followers nationally.
## Sweden Sends U.S. Home From World Cup
The U.S. Women's soccer team [lost to Sweden ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL_G7ogOL4MLituky223tHgcYjYYLENi5e9X2XrL0TSj-botN5tyKvf_dkPTY12s7-mFC2iiCOMLG4OJiAz5iIZOMxUwaSHG1QQfIw1UBG21mxVTUoECNwvhpJVOjMkwYBw0KJi5YvwCHED6KL1FPUUvBgEYUq_H5bum0leM-V1feFx83cZs1t73NvB_A7sO7Gr3gmf7qA8cPfmMA7uedcPSyFmPHIh_7qSdGLCQZ0kdA2nddmxkx2Jzf5NH8o9GwowcPA3CO6RaWhuBSsdQzVSyieJ4mLCfKefUJjUIuG825d-o_ueinwAAAP__xoFn-g)by a "millimeter" Sunday, knocking the U.S. out of the World Cup in the round of 16, its earliest exit in tournament history. The game came down to a nail-biting penalty shootout in overtime. The U.S. missed three different chances to win, including the final career shot of controversial veteran Megan Rapinoe, who missed with a kick that flew over the goal entirely. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsUr2SnDAMfhrTsWMkjE1BkcmF7pIiRdIxXlvsOgeYsbXH7NtngLvuKkn-fsaf5T-vw6sNU1huP-1MHY9xsI7DOw3SlLoEHKDw3UgEhAV1VdNWtWxMXRf3DqGq9IjUVL5tvMRRAY6o0SqyV-9lETqQgNJILVvUgBeJUio3KmfJNKOrRS3JB47p8i-Ghe80Ts_4Tuni4lxM3Z15zQK_CegF9LwF5hMT0Pe__v6OzlES0Ge2_MgC-qoxplKgDcoaGtlWCgT2icYhJyfwhbe9glI_eNwEKP2dN2fn9TzaiJjmK_kPhCnNB_KV7Um5pYOAtq5RXWsPsjL6Kr3xCNCS0c2IaI23zlFbfapcXA5ZrgYBzX69R5oEvpx5Qe2J1Z5ZQb9t2-WRLUdvn2d0tQeO6Xl2a0ycz_bjOXZRTJN3j_UY9h0cjTRnaU6OZXcvV1rsxM_yLbi3ku-WS1o8-fKRbS4ThdtSbnGmJZeHZ_lpqqVCU6OWUh9zkTq_bmGaQm60qOVttmE61shffqr_AQAA__9VJ78N))

In the end, Sweden won with a kick [that just barely crossed the goal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3rDOB7HJwNAlW7p2tCgc8VUYLIND-_dVOnd70lue3sd9uVuOnB7vdiNTQ16sq_ykBbSYBcoFe28CEZLsyYzTdVQwaaX61ZDVVmvvwqj0JC-E4FVwOE7qEx0o7NkgoAQNM1zljHIACXBx4eIs6Sk41SkgzzUfw1fmVFcK8Sc_6Rhc3vpo1lr30sm3Dm8d3lprQ8jfiVp5-Q5vZc9HLS9o5CmJUs9UxFlaqmKnZGNlKsJToOQ5PUTLG6UiWj6iF-7chVvtthdBkTdOtpLvD-P3xjFymeZOwWOzHP9q6r9vfgMAAP__4xtpXA), so close that it required a review by the referees. The photo review showed the score was good by the tiniest of margins.

On this date in 1782, George Washington established the Badge of Military Merit. Today we know it as the Purple Heart, awarded to soldiers wounded or killed in the line of action. If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Chinese, Russian Warships Test Alaska Coast Four U.S. Navy destroyers were sent to the Aleutian Islands following an incursion by conducting a joint naval operation off the coast of Alaska. Information about the event is still being declassified, but Alaska Sen. Dan Sullivan called it "unprecedented," and a former Navy captain described it as The U.S. ships, along with a P-8 Poseidon aircraft, away from the Alaskan coast, according to the Wall Street Journal. The paper said the ships never technically entered U.S. waters. NYC Riot Sparked by Playstation Giveaway New York City police arrested Kai Cenat, a famous videogame influencer, and 65 other people for on Saturday after promising a PlayStation giveaway. The giveaway offer attracted thousands of people who turned on the police, throwing garbage, chairs, and bottles. The police responded by bringing out an estimated 1,000 officers. Mayor Eric Adams later blamed saying people don't bring smoke bombs and M-80s to get a free PlayStation. The influencer, Cenat, 21, has 13 million followers nationally. Sweden Sends U.S. Home From World Cup The U.S. Women's soccer team a "millimeter" Sunday, knocking the U.S. out of the World Cup in the round of 16, its earliest exit in tournament history. The game came down to a nail-biting penalty shootout in overtime. The U.S. missed three different chances to win, including the final career shot of controversial veteran Megan Rapinoe, who missed with a kick that flew over the goal entirely. () In the end, Sweden won with a kick , so close that it required a review by the referees. The photo review showed the score was good by the tiniest of margins. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell the EPA – no more bee-killing pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1916054?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **SIGNATURES MISSING: 1,216 more names needed from your area to help SAVE BEES!** The EPA is prepared to re-approve _**bee-killing neonic pesticides**_ for another 15 years, Friend. But many wild pollinator populations are **_RAPIDLY CRASHING_** , and these toxic pesticides hold a large portion of the blame. It’s hard to overstate just how important pollinators are. Without them, ecosystems could collapse, nutritious nuts, fruits, and veggies could dwindle from store shelves, tens of thousands of plant species could die. Think for a moment – what would that really mean for the world? **Neonics are pushing vulnerable wild bees closer to EXTINCTION every minute the EPA refuses to ban these toxic pesticides.** **[Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to help STOP the EPA from approving bee-killing pesticides for 15 more years! Pollinators are counting on you.>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1916055?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1916056?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Neonics can hurt people, too. They’re often found on the food we eat and **cannot be washed off.** Exposure to neonics has been linked to _**birth defects of the heart and brain and hormone disruption!**_
Here’s the bottom line, Friend: the EPA has a choice. It can continue to allow the acceleration of the pollinator crisis, sending our insect friends closer to extinction. Or it can ban neonics and protect you, me, and the bees from these toxic pesticides. **Help it make the right decision!** [**HELP PROTECT BEES: send your message to the EPA by 11:59pm TONIGHT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1916057?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1916056?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | SIGNATURES MISSING: 1,216 more names needed from your area to help SAVE BEES! The EPA is prepared to re-approve bee-killing neonic pesticides for another 15 years, Friend. But many wild pollinator populations are RAPIDLY CRASHING , and these toxic pesticides hold a large portion of the blame. It’s hard to overstate just how important pollinators are. Without them, ecosystems could collapse, nutritious nuts, fruits, and veggies could dwindle from store shelves, tens of thousands of plant species could die. Think for a moment – what would that really mean for the world? Neonics are pushing vulnerable wild bees closer to EXTINCTION every minute the EPA refuses to ban these toxic pesticides. == | == Neonics can hurt people, too. They’re often found on the food we eat and cannot be washed off. Exposure to neonics has been linked to birth defects of the heart and brain and hormone disruption! Here’s the bottom line, Friend: the EPA has a choice. It can continue to allow the acceleration of the pollinator crisis, sending our insect friends closer to extinction. Or it can ban neonics and protect you, me, and the bees from these toxic pesticides. Help it make the right decision! == == Standing with you, Kendra Klein Deputy Director of Science, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663394%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GYld1pZg70btPvoTrhOuTg&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663394%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GYld1pZg70btPvoTrhOuTg&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663305%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M9947m85bvw%2b1EU8vElZlw&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663306%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7nCo62pKaNgrouGc9463lA&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663307%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=adQumLUHE%2f1OxxaW9m5c7g&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663309%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U69HytJakw5P91EOl95MIw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663300%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5CYxHnbKyaXcsouUxz5rRQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663301%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=49LD7pNkxwF4z2WnJqyrhg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663302%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T9fONZmdmrHxqWgcTx3XEg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663303%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xdH17X1mH8kLi1nXGKedxA&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663304%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qAx5GCoWELN5JNxYLL%2bfCA&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663315%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NkBiPsQTplwzAW9FRuBQQg&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663316%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FWO5yhtbRJD1fqaNqs%2fDFA&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c663317%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UUirJ3irGYWHsq9NhfI5WA&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
What it will take
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mO7R0sieGwUk1Rtfvek83nzKAmjNbaBuHxQg-H3-kx5I43bdADUcFNsOQzYxBXQAVyOxisEpK04IPFZvU_rtcqAdJyTHtj06t7qKibOv95zeN8Nv_xtXMnOmeWrLCOAcg6M5EhJXAjx4aXozWwmNDg==&c=y9FYKb9AXDxIpYJcvkOupCJeux8rK9QnIGzB-gI1UwoSKsSokQnV4g==&ch=ZUL7vMUPKcLCP347Hfxklv6B_E_6Yxu0pIM3QtvBbAmZOmWhgj6C3A==)
---
| Peter,
---
Our great nation is at a crossroads, and it is VITAL to back leaders who are truly committed to putting America and her people FIRST.
Donald J. Trump has done that, despite every imaginable attack that has come against him, even to this day.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mO7R0sieGwUk1Rtfvek83nzKAmjNbaBuHxQg-H3-kx5I43bdADUcFIdr1wvq1O0Ee6GnWkDwRMgqYnkoR3VVYtcoAwL86vgB16yxUI-pQJkxW7ebmrXpOmWy5F0zmnRm04EoYz5fc8VBm1w-FYo1Px648Usxz9V3Etob1qVbwAJhIW-PpGcJ90LfGLR2wHt6qfES_UaoAyEgawRSFdE0BPmN8TLmshHVZbvuvky8JTg=&c=y9FYKb9AXDxIpYJcvkOupCJeux8rK9QnIGzB-gI1UwoSKsSokQnV4g==&ch=ZUL7vMUPKcLCP347Hfxklv6B_E_6Yxu0pIM3QtvBbAmZOmWhgj6C3A==)
---
I respect my primary opponent's service and sacrifice to our nation in the military. Yet when he claims that he is not a career politician, the stakes are too high to overlook the fact that he has run for office multiple times while gaining the backing of proven DC establishment kingpins like Lindsey Graham who is an advocate for Trump only when it's politically advantageous.
My loyal support for President Trump and the America First agenda has been tested! Even though I've been vilified and defamed, I continue to speak boldly of the most heroic President our nation has known in modern times. That's because Trump's agenda is transparent and has no hidden motives: he truly wants to make America great for her people!
I would urge you to take my primary opponent's bid into consideration if he had the proven history and boldness of backing the MAGA movement. Given that's not the case, I strongly encourage the consideration of our nation's future, as it depends upon America First leaders who have stayed true to the cause.
Peter, [I am counting on you, my most dedicated supporters, to help us secure victory in this pivotal election. Your continued contributions and unwavering support are CRUCIAL in our fight to revive the America First agenda.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mO7R0sieGwUk1Rtfvek83nzKAmjNbaBuHxQg-H3-kx5I43bdADUcFIdr1wvq1O0Ee6GnWkDwRMgqYnkoR3VVYtcoAwL86vgB16yxUI-pQJkxW7ebmrXpOmWy5F0zmnRm04EoYz5fc8VBm1w-FYo1Px648Usxz9V3Etob1qVbwAJhIW-PpGcJ90LfGLR2wHt6qfES_UaoAyEgawRSFdE0BPmN8TLmshHVZbvuvky8JTg=&c=y9FYKb9AXDxIpYJcvkOupCJeux8rK9QnIGzB-gI1UwoSKsSokQnV4g==&ch=ZUL7vMUPKcLCP347Hfxklv6B_E_6Yxu0pIM3QtvBbAmZOmWhgj6C3A==)

name: Tammy Baldwin via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, the Hill just named my Senate seat one of the 5 most likely to flip
body:
this is personal...
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T548add60-85a6-4145-ba2f-20b7396bf637/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | This is big, Peter: The Hill just ranked my Senate seat one of the 5 most likely to flip next year. [If Republicans flip my seat in Wisconsin, it’s almost guaranteed that Mitch McConnell will reclaim the Senate majority. So if you can, please rush in a split donation to help us defend this battleground seat and protect our Democratic majority.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49dee77b-6328-4a78-b9ec-1efc9850e87c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T421cc8a6-6fa7-4c2b-ad0b-377f3828e284/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The GOP spent a whopping $77 million to win last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin, and won by ONE percentage point. It’s clear that they intend to do (and spend) whatever it takes to squeak by again to flip my seat red. Senate Republicans are looking to recruit candidates with massive personal wealth to jump into the race — including one who said he’d spend $15 to $20 million out of his own pocket to defeat me. This isn’t just shaping up to be my most competitive race yet, it could very well be my most expensive ever. That’s why it’s so important we get to work building the resources it’ll take to fight back against the inevitable flood of GOP attacks and keep this seat blue for Democrats. But I can’t do it without you. [Will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and my reelection campaign to help us defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep Wisconsin blue in 2024? Your donation will help us prepare, organize, and mobilize in the months ahead.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcefb91ca-8303-4bbc-88b5-cbcf8302b9cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08beceaf-0d69-4569-9437-96558bb52833/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for being a part of this team. — Tammy Baldwin

|
---

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zffq54s3ccmf33hmfs0ja8thc3l1ltu2slk8voco_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h64oj0cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zom7rtldi413a3il28us81oid71v6cf6dlajkaq0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h64oj0cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8nqfrp6d6uunfcs1je2rclqg9c1sem9gl1gtnc8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h64oj0cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdr1pd16c500jiutqj90ks5l8hb5u1kanihr7qro_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h64oj0cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Trump Train News
---

subject: Join Me This Thursday with Speaker Gilbert in supporting Chris Harnisch
body:
An Evening Fundraising Reception to "Hold the House!"
| | |
---
|
---
| Please Join Me In Supporting Chris Harnisch This Thursday with Speaker Todd Gilbert
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a-IsM7_NLzYJmd4aQhnUQp5JkobOSQ9L3ev_2_-EChxr8TzF57Qs8rmaDtLz5SskR1aac5nY5KO4zhH8xyQn8Pyju8KVDC3blfFOhH-EGAM9r6CFvvFBBglgQfcDrdyELyvqbnBFf9DCpROt3cSm7v5yzY8r8EabHPWGGCAtjZy8BFXI_FUlopvxYkaHmpdH2NQU08qwroi3typQFNf7M5Takg2ttqqD&c=YR19wkVb7ecTO5NrrDsE15owigOW90zZl7i1G5IMPEK99tgqVVIwqA==&ch=jeWR0kebiwj-xu0AzS5uwo3kccOF-hJbNlj8yVRSMxBmmDENCBMXAA==)

| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a-IsM7_NLzYJmd4aQhnUQp5JkobOSQ9L3ev_2_-EChxr8TzF57Qs8rmaDtLz5SskR1aac5nY5KO4zhH8xyQn8Pyju8KVDC3blfFOhH-EGAM9r6CFvvFBBglgQfcDrdyELyvqbnBFf9DCpROt3cSm7v5yzY8r8EabHPWGGCAtjZy8BFXI_FUlopvxYkaHmpdH2NQU08qwroi3typQFNf7M5Takg2ttqqD&c=YR19wkVb7ecTO5NrrDsE15owigOW90zZl7i1G5IMPEK99tgqVVIwqA==&ch=jeWR0kebiwj-xu0AzS5uwo3kccOF-hJbNlj8yVRSMxBmmDENCBMXAA==)
---
| |
---
| Friends,
As many of you know, Governor Youngkin's agenda is on the line this November and we must "Hold on to the House". This means supporting our existing House of Delegates members and flipping open opportunity seats with outstanding candidates like [Chris Harnisch ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a-IsM7_NLzYJmd4aQhnUQp5JkobOSQ9L3ev_2_-EChxr8TzF57Qs8rmaDtLz5SskUhlypHcUAAMOJ7uYY38-dZhORWzxeEGTHayxSqPMZcPsZBpJujbUQwSUAuP-_YWf_o_wt3EgVd2fF4lASNA4lw==&c=YR19wkVb7ecTO5NrrDsE15owigOW90zZl7i1G5IMPEK99tgqVVIwqA==&ch=jeWR0kebiwj-xu0AzS5uwo3kccOF-hJbNlj8yVRSMxBmmDENCBMXAA==)in Eastern Loudoun's [27th House of Delegates district](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a-IsM7_NLzYJmd4aQhnUQp5JkobOSQ9L3ev_2_-EChxr8TzF57Qs8rmaDtLz5SskNPMVlUlRWApDJAVN1fgQomRCiVjbSNKEGn0RGPI3tOPR1WsYK1v6MR6WXlXqDhtmSj_wIqMPLlgHW8TAmhr7F9m3d_TBm1Xj3pI35uY1ukk1ELCvK9rSw973SgfFHP59q0X4u1R0QeQ=&c=YR19wkVb7ecTO5NrrDsE15owigOW90zZl7i1G5IMPEK99tgqVVIwqA==&ch=jeWR0kebiwj-xu0AzS5uwo3kccOF-hJbNlj8yVRSMxBmmDENCBMXAA==).
Chris has dedicated his life to preserving the freedoms we cherish in the United States. Joining the US Army after 9/11, he was deployed to Afghanistan. Upon his return, he received his degrees from Yale and then was mobilized as an Army Reserve officer detailed to the National Security Council (NSC). At the NSC, Chris led the federal government's efforts on a range of issues, from combating human trafficking to countering terrorism. Chris then served as a top counterterrorism official for the State Department. In that capacity, he supported efforts that led to the demise of the ISIS caliphate. He has stepped forward again this election to fight on our behalf here in Virginia. Chris's opponent is the extremist Vice Chair of the Loudoun County School Board, looking to advance her damaging education policies now on the state level.
Please join me this Thursday for a special fundraiser for Chris with Virginia's House of Delegates Speaker Todd Gilbert. This Thursday, August 10th - 6:00 to 8:00pm Rooftop Terrace, 22365 Broderick Dr, North Lobby, 4th Floor, Sterling 20166 Sponsorships and Ticket Amounts Listed Above in the Invitation Donate [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a-IsM7_NLzYJmd4aQhnUQp5JkobOSQ9L3ev_2_-EChxr8TzF57Qs8rmaDtLz5SskR1aac5nY5KO4zhH8xyQn8Pyju8KVDC3blfFOhH-EGAM9r6CFvvFBBglgQfcDrdyELyvqbnBFf9DCpROt3cSm7v5yzY8r8EabHPWGGCAtjZy8BFXI_FUlopvxYkaHmpdH2NQU08qwroi3typQFNf7M5Takg2ttqqD&c=YR19wkVb7ecTO5NrrDsE15owigOW90zZl7i1G5IMPEK99tgqVVIwqA==&ch=jeWR0kebiwj-xu0AzS5uwo3kccOF-hJbNlj8yVRSMxBmmDENCBMXAA==) or RSVP to: [matt@bayarmoury.com](mailto:matt@bayarmoury.com)
I look forward to continuing to work with Chris and all the great conservative activists across the Commonwealth to win the November 2023 elections.
God Bless, Caleb
---

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fopenwith.link%2FGraniteSolutions.org%2Fevents%2F1830.html/1/01000189cfe007cb-5ad02be1-4f2c-4249-a45e-e8be83bbf464-000000/RQJyYVCgg_sazm29JFXN27NDUIw=333)Grethel from Chichester is a cancer survivor who has been deeply affected by rampant inflation causing everyday items her and her husband uses to become unaffordable.

They are are their wits' end as costs keep growing and growing with no end in sight - Democrats may celebrate a slow down in the increase of every day products, but regular goods and services are still over 16% higher today than they cost when Joe Biden was sworn in.

Inflation isn't just a number a on a spreadsheet that moves newspaper headlines. Inflation, caused by out of control government spending, shows up in stories like Grethel's every single day.

**What can we do about it?** Elect candidates to office who understand the deep impact inflationary policies have on our vulnerable citizens and send those to D.C., Concord, and your local town hall who are going to keep the Grethels in all of our communities in mind when it comes to spend and tax policies.

Share your story at [https://www.granitesolutions.org/inflation-story](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.granitesolutions.org%2Finflation-story/2/01000189cfe007cb-5ad02be1-4f2c-4249-a45e-e8be83bbf464-000000/ZoIvQotyFR-7EDSMVhhsmYdD8xU=333)

Best,

Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20908%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mio6IBLgMaUsFnsoolau5Q&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20909%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UcqNWhMNG5DimXp5hOlZwQ&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20900%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wNEsiZ7YUVpW5Wy5iNda9A&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20901%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2ia98VcM7IrffZV68O9eRQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---
Your America News
---

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20902%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cYtQUcKPwHdJSi6QwKg09Q&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20903%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aQB5bHlqs%2fAxx8hOKfqb%2bw&sysid=1)_

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znh4tjvtavoomqauuk4p1u59nrkimu5mrv1o8ap0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoh9ujmj4v769rvjso4u6fgmngesd8qm6bopm4n8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9sqj67nu92r8rk5cncfsqqj4tl9tu6741bddau8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbfiat6k523bnmtuubm038sb44ps87hs4e3klang_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zps795es4jps600fgcg3ciqudhls35dgsanq7m5o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z17aupvphkressn9rn9o6tnbhi1t69a7c0plavag_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8alrrccgoak9mck4e1spmauf2t4dbnr9qpulof0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdch7e3h1rd6jteih7b0bq0p45c0k1oru1eusvd8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5fkrln8cai1ku5copmft6ldbc86i1i8l2mclckg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdkr8bj7mjrv2gnq5724esanvs4eqpbum28tfseg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4imhp54rbqi0nm1cd7lcddp2l81op1rn37s7pso_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zahoiq29hk5c3i2vqah7ing97674t11838ljo3m0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zni57lr7ofqj2hd1h9sgug1gink5il886g6kuak0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zos8rephhd47v6j77867mns7ua8l1c2padln6gh8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeff2nhsvf9vsnlr6nim7eoebv6jqdpkermnl2ko_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h62o34cdh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._
