name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is ESG. This is how I’m stopping it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsqQ31eD5N

American taxpayers will not pay the price for ESG & DEI

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osqQ31eD5N

Friend,

Woke corporations have no business dictating how we live in a
free country. It is fundamentally wrong for corporations, NGOs,
and asset managers to use their power to force a radical agenda
on society. They are pushing racial discrimination in the name of
"diversity," transgenderism in the name of "inclusion," and
Marxism in the name of "equity." Americans never voted for woke
corporate overlords, and we don't have to accept their edicts.

Large corporations push ESG-environmental, social, and corporate
governance-and abuse their unchecked power to push the far-Left
agenda that is destined to fail at the ballot box.

I
am standing in their way.

If
corporate activists want to push political agendas, they should
leave their boardrooms and run for office. Companies need to
focus on doing what they do best: providing goods and services
that people want to buy, not forcing political agendas on
Americans.

As
President, I will not stand for corporations pushing a
destructive left-wing agenda at the expense of American
taxpayers. And I have the track record to prove it.

Last year in Florida, we divested billions of dollars from
BlackRock, a corporation that openly prioritized ESG over
maximizing returns for investors: the taxpayers of my state. When
asset managers are putting politics above fiduciary duty, it is a
leader's job to step up and protect citizens' retirement funds.

And
it worked-just a few days ago, the BlackRock CEO said that as a
consequence of Florida's actions last year, he is now "ashamed"
of promoting ESG. This is a step forward, but we are just getting
started.

As
Governor of the third-largest state, I have stood up to
corporations choosing to put political ideology and utopian
fantasies ahead of the interests of everyday Americans. Now, I am
prepared to take this fight to the national stage as President.

I
have a message for Joe Biden: It is a complete dereliction of
duty to ignore the financial suffering across our country and
expect struggling families to shell out $50,000 on a new electric
vehicle, or even $1,000 on an electric stove, because the climate
lobby and woke mob demands it. That is the true mark of an
out-of-touch puppet.

Join me in my fight against Biden and the woke corporations
trying to make Americans pay the price for the Left's radical
agenda. Please rush in any amount below to help my campaign
achieve its mission and fight back against their attacks.

Donate a $10 gift

Donate a $25 gift

Donate a $47 gift

Donate a $75 gift

Donate a $150 gift

Donate any amount to support the mission

I
will never back down. Decline is a choice, success is attainable,
and freedom is worth fighting for.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Donate any amount to support the mission

Meet Ron DeSantis

A native Floridian with
blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a
nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin
High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he
was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated
with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission
in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service,
Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah,
Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military
decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service
and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron
also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child
predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a
platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits
and a balanced budget amendment.

In
Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the
weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to
hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in
manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a
veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our
country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans
and expand support for mental health.

In
2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As
governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for
the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when
the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media
united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis
stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding
principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to
transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival.
Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative
priorities:

Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine
mandates,

Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border
crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against
illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured
professors accountable,

Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital
currency,

Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

Protecting the unborn,

Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a
constitutional carry state,

Expanding education freedom,

Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and
entities,

Lowering prescription drug costs,

Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

Creating a universal school choice program,

Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme
Court,

...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout
his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of
nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the
largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than
1.5 million votes.

But
history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the
majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional
wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently
as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30
points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red,
including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties
overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor
DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics,
and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with
battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing
down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his
inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense
suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of
sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even
for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we
choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than
cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe
place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership,
Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education
opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden
Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that
seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to
the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered
the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's
history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:

Record tax relief

ESG prohibitions

Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering
transparency

Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

Improvements to our state's infrastructure

Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death
penalty for child rapists

The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border
crisis

Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward
school unions

Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No
leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor
DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country,
leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron
is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television
anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters,
Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as

banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best

clean_body: American taxpayers will not pay the price for ESG & DEI Friend, Woke corporations have no business dictating how we live in a free country. It is fundamentally wrong for corporations, NGOs, and asset managers to use their power to force a radical agenda on society. They are pushing racial discrimination in the name of "diversity," transgenderism in the name of "inclusion," and Marxism in the name of "equity." Americans never voted for woke corporate overlords, and we don't have to accept their edicts. Large corporations push ESG-environmental, social, and corporate governance-and abuse their unchecked power to push the far-Left agenda that is destined to fail at the ballot box. I am standing in their way. If corporate activists want to push political agendas, they should leave their boardrooms and run for office. Companies need to focus on doing what they do best: providing goods and services that people want to buy, not forcing political agendas on Americans. As President, I will not stand for corporations pushing a destructive left-wing agenda at the expense of American taxpayers. And I have the track record to prove it. Last year in Florida, we divested billions of dollars from BlackRock, a corporation that openly prioritized ESG over maximizing returns for investors: the taxpayers of my state. When asset managers are putting politics above fiduciary duty, it is a leader's job to step up and protect citizens' retirement funds. And it worked-just a few days ago, the BlackRock CEO said that as a consequence of Florida's actions last year, he is now "ashamed" of promoting ESG. This is a step forward, but we are just getting started. As Governor of the third-largest state, I have stood up to corporations choosing to put political ideology and utopian fantasies ahead of the interests of everyday Americans. Now, I am prepared to take this fight to the national stage as President. I have a message for Joe Biden: It is a complete dereliction of duty to ignore the financial suffering across our country and expect struggling families to shell out $50,000 on a new electric vehicle, or even $1,000 on an electric stove, because the climate lobby and woke mob demands it. That is the true mark of an out-of-touch puppet. Join me in my fight against Biden and the woke corporations trying to make Americans pay the price for the Left's radical agenda. Please rush in any amount below to help my campaign achieve its mission and fight back against their attacks. Donate a $10 gift Donate a $25 gift Donate a $47 gift Donate a $75 gift Donate a $150 gift Donate any amount to support the mission I will never back down. Decline is a choice, success is attainable, and freedom is worth fighting for. In Freedom, Ron DeSantis Donate any amount to support the mission Meet Ron DeSantis A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcgso2ptkgj53btb0edgtb4vse30fs4chg547u6o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao74chh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zajo69nk235h43listaaef2liifn67lbgmfiv1h8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao74chh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhbnonu5rj9o0cqgv4uiapqr11ht30ra9dvgv1vo_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao74chh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkacj6onrlh2d3d25286fjvjiogh6b5hnqan8vp8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao74chh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

Dear Friend,

Marcus Schroeder is an evangelist in Wisconsin who was arrested for reading his Bible aloud at a drag show. Standing up to the LGBTQ agenda with Biblical truth is not a crime! The _SLIGHTEST _opposition to that militant left-wing agenda is met with the full force of the police. It's wrong, and we must STAND WITH MARCUS SCHROEDER! **Sign the petition if you agree!**

This election is Mississippi's fight for conservative government. If the liberal Hosemann side of the Republican party wins on Tuesday, Mississippi will return to Democrat controlled government within a few years.

---|---|---
Several have asked me to make recommendations for the upcoming election. The establishment folks have spent millions in the past few months in an attempt to end the conservative movement. This election is Mississippi's fight for conservative government. If the liberal Hosemann side of the Republican party wins tomorrow I believe Mississippi will return to a Democrat controlled government within a few years.
This is my list of the best candidates, I know each of these individuals and I am convinced they are the best choice for our state.
* **Lt. Governor -[Chris McDaniel](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e829f8d6-fba9-439a-8181-ccb994783e78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Northern District Public Service Commissioner -[Chris Brown](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ee9869e4-4680-48ce-8e3e-46bc86c5d6b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Southern District Public Service Commissioner -[Dane Maxwell](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/835d9bdf-73b5-4517-954f-4ac1633587b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Senate District 6 (Lee County) -[Lauren Smith](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f43ece53-8342-4df5-a8fb-4446d7b66980?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Senate District 9 (Lafayette/Panola County) -[Ricky Caldwell](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/32a2834b-4cab-428c-ade5-ce9f0f3c70e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Senate District 15 (Choctaw, Webster, and Montgomery Counties) -[Alan Sibley](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b26c5ad6-74c5-4f7d-9932-34d582293524?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Senate District 19 (Desoto County) -[Walter Hopper](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/e7d3cb67-6f15-48a7-869d-1a70c825974c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Senate District 42 (Forrest, Jones Counties) -[Don Hartness](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3cdf12c2-f10a-4c26-be9e-7b4b49a2b523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **House of Representatives District 7 (Desoto County) -[Jamey Goodkind](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ce11248d-83bd-46a6-91e1-26daf04232b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **House of Representatives District 28 (Desoto County) -[John T. Williams](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/76013dfa-cb4a-4c0c-8d56-b877eade00e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **House of Representatives District 115 (Harrison County) -[Phil Harding](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/15528f97-ad5c-4e9c-93ea-194a8bd46700?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Desoto County Supervisor -[Robert Foster](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/72cffa40-d1d0-43a0-94f8-732586c27ba4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Desoto County District Attorney -[Matthew Barton](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3482dd13-ee6e-49bb-9894-f95fa3ae6620?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Several have asked me about other races, generally my rule is if I don't know anything about either candidate I vote against the incumbent.
Desoto County Sheriff is a difficult choice - I believe Lee has a stronger commitment to preserving the citizens constitutional rights than Tuggle. Tuggle's ad where he says he, "doesn't believe in doorbells" is a huge problem. The citizens of Desoto County need a sheriff who cares about their rights. Southaven police didn't use the doorbell a few years ago and killed an innocent man in his living room. I can not support or vote for a sheriff who doesn't see that as a major problem.
I've also been asked about the two men running to replace me in the House for District 6. Keen was chosen by the local politicians to replace me because they want someone who will rubber-stamp anything they ask for, the code words for this are, "work better with local officials". The local mayors have been upset with me because I opposed and stopped for many years their tax increases. I do not know Wallace though my vote would be for Wallace over Keen.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

This election is Mississippi's fight for conservative government. If the liberal Hosemann side of the Republican party wins on Tuesday, Mississippi will return to Democrat controlled government within a few years. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? from the desk ofDana Criswell August 8 - Important day for conservatives | | | Aug 7 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Several have asked me to make recommendations for the upcoming election. The establishment folks have spent millions in the past few months in an attempt to end the conservative movement. This election is Mississippi's fight for conservative government. If the liberal Hosemann side of the Republican party wins tomorrow I believe Mississippi will return to a Democrat controlled government within a few years. This is my list of the best candidates, I know each of these individuals and I am convinced they are the best choice for our state. Lt. Governor - Northern District Public Service Commissioner - Southern District Public Service Commissioner - Senate District 6 (Lee County) - Senate District 9 (Lafayette/Panola County) - Senate District 15 (Choctaw, Webster, and Montgomery Counties) - Senate District 19 (Desoto County) - Senate District 42 (Forrest, Jones Counties) - House of Representatives District 7 (Desoto County) - House of Representatives District 28 (Desoto County) - House of Representatives District 115 (Harrison County) - Desoto County Supervisor - Desoto County District Attorney - Several have asked me about other races, generally my rule is if I don't know anything about either candidate I vote against the incumbent. Desoto County Sheriff is a difficult choice - I believe Lee has a stronger commitment to preserving the citizens constitutional rights than Tuggle. Tuggle's ad where he says he, "doesn't believe in doorbells" is a huge problem. The citizens of Desoto County need a sheriff who cares about their rights. Southaven police didn't use the doorbell a few years ago and killed an innocent man in his living room. I can not support or vote for a sheriff who doesn't see that as a major problem. I've also been asked about the two men running to replace me in the House for District 6. Keen was chosen by the local politicians to replace me because they want someone who will rubber-stamp anything they ask for, the code words for this are, "work better with local officials". The local mayors have been upset with me because I opposed and stopped for many years their tax increases. I do not know Wallace though my vote would be for Wallace over Keen. name: Trump Train News
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqk1vle2ic9o8lk214ad5qt357cp11q21rllvl68_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk81emfsb8eilpk94uo81qos5h1bsk1pfh0i9bao_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70cjh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn02vmb213unjsejumsfk27cmcgvtbr2ad2gh3p0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z04kr50t626as39pcc1rg7mtk56ebjfui5hjr0eg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70cjh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1to0rikille8b5re6hc534ed7fu4cvbll3b8mso_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70cjh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Trump Train News

body:
Peter! Thanks for joining our mission to restore trust!
| | **Can 't see this message? _[View in a browser](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/tr/092a3fe3-ce52-49c0-8393-851f52684b98/c?w=dTlN9glDyI2T3P-Fe9kbR94z0bVjJ0DVkLG5zCoexD4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL3NvL3RyLzA5MmEzZmUzLWNlNTItNDljMC04MzkzLTg1MWY1MjY4NGI5OCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCJ9)_**

---
| | Hey Peter, Thank you for choosing to accept this new mission and join us on our journey to restore honest leadership. I never thought this small town kid from Oklahoma would be running for Congress in New York but when service calls I'm committed to answering it. I've quit my job and I'm all in. But I can't do it without you and your friends so if the message of our campaign resonates with you please spread the word. Lastly, if you haven't already done so and have anything to spare, I'm hoping you will chip in even just $10 today to support my Campaign for Congress. As a first time political candidate I have a lot of money to raise in a short amount of time. Your support will make an important impact not only in New York but it will help us send a message across America: Honest Leadership is worth fighting for. Thank you for your time and consideration. My very best,
---
| |
---
| | Kellen Curry

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdhaj3h56uocctea12ru53afdcoudqdjnph3opcg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znpul9i4hl89k8cveiivf2437ms79q9dv0g2sep0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9scmc7vnsf8nlrn39j4i7v4ho5k8t37oqrdf01o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrscfnfeslrbquhilu9qg3pt7pacmfqg8hop6ka0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1b62qr4vcbl5l6i68a3lq9na0rr63mitcmfic70_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2f69n41joo5puf8jvvln730sen5cphradp3l47g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chgmeo74sjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6j643hvb0khse9qqoqvturqd3ju08ojphsc0v10_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6ao70c3h2bs)_

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This is honestly ridiculous
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Last week, Kari Lake called on the House GOP to use some secret powers they do not actually have to make Trump president again.
#

Hey Peter, it’s Ruben. I’ll cut right to the chase here.
Last week, Kari Lake called on the House GOP to use some secret powers they do not actually have to make Trump president again.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230807-1-30&t=1&akid=886%2E734936%2EoptvxH)
This is honestly ridiculous.
But the worst part is this: She’s dead serious. She means every word of it. And she’ll get other people to believe it, too.
That’s extremely dangerous, because it’s the EXACT same rhetoric that led to January 6th in the first place. Left unchecked, it could lead to worse violence in the future.
For this and for so many other reasons we have to keep her out of the Senate.
And to do that, I need to ask for your help.
[**If we’re going to beat Kari Lake, I need you to chip in $3. $3 today because Kari Lake is dangerous. $3 because this race is going to be one of the most expensive in the country in 2024, and we need every dollar we can get to win.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230807-1-30&t=2&akid=886%2E734936%2EoptvxH)

body:
The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you

| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. _**[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z44c1oq6lkfk2nuuk296t3sgfiq97t8bv515ca98_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h6eor4clh2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**_

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f679fafd3f444c99a79fd3c0c25e1812&_e=cclSFsNBv96wtnWUHtFQK435UfWq7i3pav9sGYsH_A5ErdExMmcN2aNz94JO7FXx-4pJhynWNb4zSOcvE43vJ1lSOnhcThvWOm8nh2YqnvAlL766Uld_NZOpuv1oxgWAAwyg-6DQNQbWRi--0KhLT34Ns5we3KKAb1rO6gdItZEvloEVPjpKQbHBCodmNhTrtQwIb8beTZ0eDGUoCHGspmWVk-VgGHWHlB6InMtJU4HAZB_OyQf5q1MxzUcghYsnWLd4qxr8d6KR0T5Nj45vbf30jYctLE7E1oAkN6EAXmCQyXyWzwQUx8ZztqiFubQXqFq_dFJrmJMMkOR9m9GK68k4lW5mpOFAmYRAEEpAKQkSwWuxIkPWjKRb5ow5ewRR)
---
I’m going to let you in on a little-known secret, Peter.

There’s a reason why it’s **ILLEGAL** for our military to identify with a political party: because it would give that party total control.

**In the one-party controlled Communist China, the military is only loyal to the party, not The People. **

And when I see a new headline every week of Dem’s pushing a radical-left agenda on our men and women uniform, I tense up in fear.

The U.S. military following the marching orders of DEMOCRATS? None of us would be safe.....

**This is CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), I announced my run for U.S. Senate in Virginia two weeks ago and the radical-left went nuts because I promised to put an END to their indoctrination of our military.**

I escaped a totalitarian state in 1975 - **Vietnam** \- Their behavior is lockstep with the communists who chased me out of the country. The radical left will do EVERYTHING to keep me out of power.

I want to keep up the offensive but their attacks are non-stop. **[Is there any way you could contribute to my campaign to help me put an END to the indoctrination?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f679fafd3f444c99a79fd3c0c25e1812&_e=cclSFsNBv96wtnWUHtFQK435UfWq7i3pav9sGYsH_A5ErdExMmcN2aNz94JO7FXx-4pJhynWNb4zSOcvE43vJ1lSOnhcThvWOm8nh2YqnvAlL766Uld_NZOpuv1oxgWAAwyg-6DQNQbWRi--0KhLT34Ns5we3KKAb1rO6gdItZEvloEVPjpKQbHBCodmNhTrtQwIb8beTZ0eDGUoCHGspgJU4IOUH37TC2lPJie_qJUfMCEj5QsN53oB-dyMdbUj2lDZTajX1om3pwmFR-wC82mb01CauKnAW4oFX7PezEpYXRK2rSsfSGyy6Qr5AjPfH3pVZuVgVvuVJzSo5tLMYJUK-DdqfrfnVD779SY28dk7koB0OPcCLiGutLutnako)**
---
[**HELP HUNG CAO FOR U.S. SENATE**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=f679fafd3f444c99a79fd3c0c25e1812&_e=cclSFsNBv96wtnWUHtFQK435UfWq7i3pav9sGYsH_A5ErdExMmcN2aNz94JO7FXx-4pJhynWNb4zSOcvE43vJ1lSOnhcThvWOm8nh2YqnvAlL766Uld_NZOpuv1oxgWAAwyg-6DQNQbWRi--0KhLT34Ns5we3KKAb1rO6gdItZEvloEVPjpKQbHBCodmNhTrtQwIb8beTZ0eDGUoCHGspj8SykCmEKEZh_zKCxPdUKtaU4tuebJ58gvH3yEUA5xeVPvfI7ILPHQ_lJmMHuKUzBZPAo6Nyc5axWYZvIRo6wCHS5NW9sGtLK3PuAcVhkI4Ipjilmk198yIxEGJuxRqTPvp0mQ1dggRRp2_I0t6b6PQZEKyLYFR_7DQggOKaFai)

I served in Navy Special Operations for 25 years - so as long as I live, I will NEVER let the radical-left mob take control of our military.

name: Mark Robinson
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Robinson
body:
I wasn’t born with a silver spoon in my mouth.

| |
---
| | | | | I grew up as the 9th of 10 children in Greensboro. My father was an alcoholic who beat my mother. He died when I was in the fifth grade, and I was terrified. He had been the sole provider for our household. I remember sitting on the porch wondering where I’d be in five years.

Would I be in a shelter?

In foster care?

Would I be separated from my brothers and sisters?
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20918%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPdRFRFRvyymr9avCJy3CA&sysid=1)
---

A few days after my father died, my mom’s friend came by. She explained that now that her husband was gone, my mother could kick her feet up and relax because the government would take care of everything.

But that wasn’t my mom.

As soon as her friend left, she got up and walked over to the local university and got a job as a janitor. She had a fifth-grade education and five kids to provide for. She chose to clean up for other kids to provide for her own. **She didn’t just rise to the challenge, she excelled. **

She gave a sense of calm and purpose to us. From that point on, we always had what we needed... _very little of what we wanted, but always what we needed. _

My mother was and always will be my hero. She showed me what strength and perseverance looked like first hand, and she taught me that with faith and hard work, I could achieve anything.

Those early years of hardship were just the beginning of my struggles.

My wife and I have endured a lot. I lost not one, but two jobs due to NAFTA.

We lost homes, cars, and were even forced into bankruptcy.

I remember lying awake at night wondering how I was going to pay the bills.

_**But I never forgot what my mother taught me, and we never gave up. **_

Together, my wife of over 30 years and I persevered and raised two incredible children. Now we have two amazing grandkids.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20918%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPdRFRFRvyymr9avCJy3CA&sysid=1)
---

In 2018, my life changed when I gave a speech to the Greensboro city council that went viral.

A year later, I launched my campaign for Lieutenant Governor, and when I was elected in 2020, _**I became the first black Lieutenant Governor of North Carolina. **_

As Lieutenant Governor, I have had the privilege to work on a lot of issues, but my main focus has been on education.

It is a passion of mine, and the reason I ran for Lieutenant Governor. I have been a vocal proponent of parents knowing what their children are being taught. I have supported providing opportunities for all students to have an education that best suits them, whether that’s in a private school, charter school, home school, or public school.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20918%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPdRFRFRvyymr9avCJy3CA&sysid=1)
---

Now, I’ve thrown my hat in the ring to be the next Governor of North Carolina. Not because I want to be Governor.

My campaign for Governor is not about want. _**IT’S ABOUT SERVICE.**_

Some day, you and I will be gone. And I don’t want my family to see a picture of me and wonder why I didn’t fight for them. I want my children and grandchildren to know that I did everything I could. That’s what I’m fighting for. And that’s why I’m running for Governor.

Now, I’m asking for your help.

_**This is going to be the most contested and most expensive governor’s race in the country.**_ As North Carolina goes, the nation goes. So I hope you will consider making a contribution to my campaign today. _**[Whether it’s $500 or just $5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20919%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fG%2fYGV3Os7fY9zeCV26U1w&sysid=1 "Whether it’s $500 or just
$5, every single donation will get us one step closer to making history.")**_
---
| | | **[Donate Now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20910%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2h%2fkW%2bkS4WEzV3JwZCrHow&sysid=1)**
---
Thanks in advance for your support, donations, and prayers.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20918%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZPdRFRFRvyymr9avCJy3CA&sysid=1)
---

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barrack Obama radically transformed our country
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it’s true.__ _ _What we’re seeing today didn’t happen overnight. It’s no coincidence. It’s no stroke of luck._ It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making...** ****...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them.** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ – and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I’m asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhccnmd3gjhgm649ftmcoe1jgtlgd7n9vg4bejeg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs) And as a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008._ __He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs.__ __He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage.__ __And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we’re seeing today has been over a decade in the making – and most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now – how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] **“A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza**** ****“The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin**** ** **“David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlqm4fg50cenkq43d4p9fcab49ns9epsti32lf9g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make it better — they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform [it].” **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. [**Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today** ,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd1rpo7e4gtfv065q3vdi6qkjd649iganmenbn3g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs) and as a thank you for your generous support, I’ll reserve a complimentary copy of my book _The Enemy Within_ for you, explaining this in depth.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3s9g35lddnjaf64srme1klngsscu25apnc3ld0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs)
---

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** August 7, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com)
**Tell It Like It Is PAC Launches Video Campaign: 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid To Debate**
_Digital Ads To Highlight Trump’s Greatest Failure_ s
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Ahead of Donald Trump’s visit to New Hampshire this week, Tell It Like It Is PAC announced a new ad campaign targeting the former president for his refusal to commit to the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate on August 23rd. The new campaign will feature a series of 10 unique videos on digital platforms highlighting the major reasons behind Trump’s reluctance.
The underlying message behind the video campaign is clear: Donald Trump is afraid to debate because he knows that Governor Christie will bring the fight directly to him. Unlike the other candidates in the race, Governor Christie is not afraid to prosecute his failures and disqualifying behavior.
“It is most likely that by the time we get on the debate stage on August 23, the frontrunner will be out on bail in four different jurisdictions: Florida, Washington, Georgia and New York,” Governor Christie [stated](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=21198ca7b9&e=d0a9afa930) during a recent media interview.
Round one of the series takes Trump to task for his mounting legal troubles.
**Round 1: The Indictments**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=afa93243e2&e=d0a9afa930)
**Trump May Be Indicted Four Times And Out On Bail By The Time Of The First Debate.** “As Donald Trump looks to secure the Republican presidential nomination and win a second White House term, he will also have to navigate a legal minefield that could include as many as four criminal indictments and at least two civil cases.” (David Knowles, “Trump Faces More Indictments, Fines And Possible Jail Time As Legal Troubles Mount,” [Yahoo News](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=2668520e1c&e=d0a9afa930), 7/24/23)

clean_body: Tell It Like It Is PAC Launches Video Campaign: 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid To Debate | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: August 7, 2023 Contact: mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com Tell It Like It Is PAC Launches Video Campaign: 10 Reasons Donald Trump Is Afraid To Debate Digital Ads To Highlight Trump’s Greatest Failure s ARLINGTON, VA — Ahead of Donald Trump’s visit to New Hampshire this week, Tell It Like It Is PAC announced a new ad campaign targeting the former president for his refusal to commit to the first Republican National Committee (RNC) debate on August 23rd. The new campaign will feature a series of 10 unique videos on digital platforms highlighting the major reasons behind Trump’s reluctance. The underlying message behind the video campaign is clear: Donald Trump is afraid to debate because he knows that Governor Christie will bring the fight directly to him. Unlike the other candidates in the race, Governor Christie is not afraid to prosecute his failures and disqualifying behavior. “It is most likely that by the time we get on the debate stage on August 23, the frontrunner will be out on bail in four different jurisdictions: Florida, Washington, Georgia and New York,” Governor Christie during a recent media interview. Round one of the series takes Trump to task for his mounting legal troubles. Round 1: The Indictments Trump May Be Indicted Four Times And Out On Bail By The Time Of The First Debate. “As Donald Trump looks to secure the Republican presidential nomination and win a second White House term, he will also have to navigate a legal minefield that could include as many as four criminal indictments and at least two civil cases.” (David Knowles, “Trump Faces More Indictments, Fines And Possible Jail Time As Legal Troubles Mount,” , 7/24/23) | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid For By Tell It Like It Is PAC. He knows what it takes to work for the people he serves and refuses to bend the knee to aggressive, baseless legacy media attacks and the radical Left. Florida has the #1 ranked economy, no income tax, a 50-year low crime rate, and 25% less accumulated debt under Gov. DeSantis. We're ready for the ultimate debate of America's revival vs. decline. We want the DeSantis vision for the future. **_**_[**_Do you?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj61sfvj7pqhbh32ct8aj5jn2thaiq17eqndsct8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs)_**_** **CHIP IN TO BACK THE TRUTH**

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi5ftj110j6d6jrlrmic4uelvlabvokjmns7uhk8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’m at my wits’ end

|
---
| | |
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4m14aalpvmedeo6g8grmcj342spc68cmts8trr8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zftso1qlk6345a7lvggmgfkloecl53bcjlkn7mp0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm731036r0qc98jv8al43tgdlok39e0bu5vimi58_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5h69ob6c5h2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---

clean_body: I’m at my wits’ end | | | | I’m at my wits’ end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | "STAND WITH RYAN" So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation. I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | | "DONATE TODAY" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A new opponent just launched a campaign against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] friend, I've got some important news that I had to share right away: A new GOP opponent just entered the race in Ohio to defeat me and turn the Senate red. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
With polls already showing us neck and neck, I need your grassroots support to help me pull ahead and win. So please, will you split $5 right now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to win this race and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
I’ll be honest: This is going to be my toughest reelection yet. Experts are saying this could be one of the most competitive – and expensive – races of next year. If I’m going to win in a state that voted for Trump twice, I need to build the strongest grassroots team possible, starting today.
So please, will you split $5 or more between me and Kirsten Gillibrand -- everything you can spare before tonight's rapid-response deadline -- to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_sherrodbrown?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Your support means the world -- especially during these critical moments.
Thank you,
Sherrod

subject: National Purple Heart Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
Today is National Purple Heart Day.

It’s a day to recognize Purple Heart recipients as well as the bravery exhibited by our troops every day.

Our Purple Heart recipients represent the very best of our country, and we wouldn’t have the freedom we too often take for granted without them.

Please, join me today in thanking our Purple Heart recipients, and all of our troops, for their enduring bravery.

Thank you,

Rick Scott

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvsilv4b5dvop5tkbfjvg219kk3nn0jlb1266gp8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5j68oj4chh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztumenkc7ldtjfgch427s6puomuv32j868nfcat8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5j68oj4chh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z854oc95q9npqejse2ikemci98hp9hn8i887dcjg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5j68oj4chh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za3mogok989r35m836cv930ourki1ufhjvlp0700_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5j68oj4chh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. The left has launched attack after attack against Justice Thomas since he was nominated to serve on the Supreme Court in 1991. However, this latest attack from Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison reveals how low the left has stooped.

**[****> >> STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS HERE <<<****](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=62ec08cb6741428fb37c523285912567&_e=JCVEzdR5Go8RwZNCERRinOI2l9rW0Gw1IdotRpLUAUmBaUpnQoZIrCa5dW6Ntsm-6nt0wDDlW5ylN-2xL5r9W1Owtq11qUw40Uvn8Krc4c2Q5QROOFK6KEti12A5vSOWvdZP4A9rofJieTzrfce0M6igUaRZHps3-5n2-s5SE_s_5WyQb8YKiuOBeeUY9zWkEqS5g7bXnhdp-VhWfHwHMMDwrw7ihUzmd0DTSrjsdJjJkiSl4nSPzzEZKvDo--gMVqDc6DM65SFOof9c2o9vuXAiuOlEhryzbj_-e7iW_IczzSSrqtoBD9rk0729d-t-E7jdFr_zOvcx97VgNA9UgA%3D%3D)**
Ellison comparing Justice Thomas to a house slave is saying the quiet part out loud on how Democrats view Justice Thomas, and any black person who dares to think for themselves. It's despicable and bigoted and underscores how the Democrat party doesn't care about being "inclusive" or "tolerant" if it involves a minority who doesn't share their rigid ideologies.

clean_body: Dems ATTACKING Justice Thomas...Again! | Friend - We are calling on Conservatives across the nation to stand with Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas against the ruthless, racist attacks from the Radical Left. | The left has launched attack after attack against Justice Thomas since he was nominated to serve on the Supreme Court in 1991. However, this latest attack from Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison reveals how low the left has stooped. Ellison comparing Justice Thomas to a house slave is saying the quiet part out loud on how Democrats view Justice Thomas, and any black person who dares to think for themselves. It's despicable and bigoted and underscores how the Democrat party doesn't care about being "inclusive" or "tolerant" if it involves a minority who doesn't share their rigid ideologies. Justice Clarence Thomas takes A LOT of arrows for defending our GOD-GIVEN liberties that are SECURED by OUR CONSTITUTION. If we allow Justice Thomas to go down, we'll lose what's left of our country. Thank you for your urgent attention to this matter. Sincerely, \- Supreme Court Updates Paid for by House Conservative Victory Fund Copyright (C) 2023 House Conservative Victory Fund, All rights reserved.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: My new op-ed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
It's all anyone in Arizona is talking about: this summer's extreme heat that's been burning up our state.
As someone who has spent years studying Arizona's water policy, I know exactly how devastating this heat wave really is. We're losing precious water supply to evaporation, and the drier our soil is, the more difficult it will be to replenish it.
To address the water crisis, we need to address the climate crisis.
But now, Republicans in the pockets of oil corporations are voting to slash funding for critical climate programs — like my opponent, Juan Ciscomani.
https://tucson.com/opinion/column/local-opinion-extreme-heat-demands-climate-action/article_ebc30766-2d07-11ee-b374-f37a76ca83c7.html [https://tucson.com/opinion/column/local-opinion-extreme-heat-demands-climate-action/article_ebc30766-2d07-11ee-b374-f37a76ca83c7.html]
I unpack what all of this means in my new opinion piece in the Arizona Daily Star. If you'd like, you can read it here [https://tucson.com/opinion/column/local-opinion-extreme-heat-demands-climate-action/article_ebc30766-2d07-11ee-b374-f37a76ca83c7.html] .
Ciscomani has voted to slash billions of dollars that would go to investing in clean energy projects, supporting underserved and rural communities, and putting money back in the pockets of taxpayers.
Arizona deserves better than this.
In office, I'll fight for the best interests of people in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District — not of fossil fuel corporations. But to win this race, I need your support. Can I count on you to donate now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_080723_OpEd_act]

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: Cook Political Report: NY-3 a top pickup opportunity for Democrats in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress against George
Santos.

The Cook Political Report released a preview of the 2024 Congressional
elections, listing NY-3 as one of the top pickup opportunities for
Democrats.

Here’s why: Our district voted for President Biden in 2020. And George
Santos BARELY won his seat in 2022. And we’ve now learned that he LIED his
way to victory.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19015?t=1001&akid=3473%2E346206%2EwQ3Zjn ]If Democrats retake this seat in 2024, we’ll take a MASSIVE step toward
flipping the House. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles
Booker -- to help me defeat Santos and flip the House?

I’ve defeated Republicans before. When I ran for the New York Senate, I
unseated a well-funded Republican Senator, flipped the seat, and flipped
the entire chamber, giving our party a “trifecta” in the New York House,
Senate, and Governorship.

When I defeat George Santos in 2024, we’ll flip the seat from red to blue
and win back control of the House for Democrats, taking the Speaker’s
gavel away from Kevin McCarthy for good.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19015?t=1002&akid=3473%2E346206%2EwQ3Zjn ]Democratic control of the House runs through New York -- and I need
your help to defeat George Santos. So please, split a donation between
Charles Booker and my campaign now if you can.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230807-3473-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3473_346206_wQ3Zjn&akid=3473%2E346206%2EwQ3Zjn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3473%2E346206%2EwQ3Zjn

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:

| Peter-
I am leading the fight in Congress against the Mexican drug cartels that are facilitating the border crisis and trafficking deadly fentanyl into our country.
The cartels kill tens of thousands of Americans every year with fentanyl poison that they get from China, and I'm working hard to stop them and save American lives.
---
| | | [STAND WITH DAN AGAINST THE CARTELS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AS50bxti9n2VF0UKrRLV2NUSkYfLv5CsohyS_XhAp2MDGB36oeqLCkwX24UmGMTrzgL9G0G44HQNz8-pxCBX3DfQ2j6HNPbDlj3h6yJSLxrNUUfS-NoLlH51Slwc_GIcnoIEtCVaxBU5OpDOodFkmhYkRMkKLJW_zwR_X8QiFQq70fwPQlg0VB6YrO6QGuYVt95qCaJ4rZJxYbCCdSMFZaQzJkf4OuvE1nvsveRVGRtRLymhirtKXqdwS81EmEpm1BplLgrc9oeuykD-9kGnU2kzg0D4zgsNzkv1m62KBjTYo8YB4LcR7w==&c=NIlLNnlvVn4jZUR25U-RZEN0pwTo4qDxGeSpgRx-9E4exeptqWd_xA==&ch=AYi2OeO7vA9yXz59XlQR8w-3kr1eBdllFTU0yBW87F-hC8peTzbxBg==)
---
| As Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force, I am developing solutions to bring the fight to the cartels, target their finances, and hold those who aid and abet them accountable.
I've introduced legislation to:

* Authorize the use of Military force against the Mexican drug cartels.
* Give law enforcement additional tools to target and seize the cartels' illicit finances, and use the money we seize to fund border security efforts.
* Sanction foreign officials who aid and abet cartel activity.

This work has been noticed at the highest levels of the Mexican government, which is notorious for their inaction to stop the cartels. The Mexican President even threatened to campaign against me in my upcoming election because I am going after his cartel donors.
The belligerent attacks from Mexico's president prove I am targeting my work effectively. I am not backing down, but I will need more resources to fight back against a foreign leader who is trying to interfere in my election.
[That's why I am asking you to generously donate anything you can - whether that's $100, $50, $25, even $5 - to help me defend myself against upcoming attacks from the Mexican President in my re-election. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AS50bxti9n2VF0UKrRLV2NUSkYfLv5CsohyS_XhAp2MDGB36oeqLCkwX24UmGMTrzgL9G0G44HQNz8-pxCBX3DfQ2j6HNPbDlj3h6yJSLxrNUUfS-NoLlH51Slwc_GIcnoIEtCVaxBU5OpDOodFkmhYkRMkKLJW_zwR_X8QiFQq70fwPQlg0VB6YrO6QGuYVt95qCaJ4rZJxYbCCdSMFZaQzJkf4OuvE1nvsveRVGRtRLymhirtKXqdwS81EmEpm1BplLgrc9oeuykD-9kGnU2kzg0D4zgsNzkv1m62KBjTYo8YB4LcR7w==&c=NIlLNnlvVn4jZUR25U-RZEN0pwTo4qDxGeSpgRx-9E4exeptqWd_xA==&ch=AYi2OeO7vA9yXz59XlQR8w-3kr1eBdllFTU0yBW87F-hC8peTzbxBg==)
This is the biggest fight I've taken on since coming to Congress... it's not every day another country's president targets me specifically. But with the support of patriots like you, I know we can fight back.
Can I count on you?
---
| | | [DONATE. JOIN THE FIGHT AGAINST THE MEXICAN DRUG CARTELS.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AS50bxti9n2VF0UKrRLV2NUSkYfLv5CsohyS_XhAp2MDGB36oeqLCkwX24UmGMTrzgL9G0G44HQNz8-pxCBX3DfQ2j6HNPbDlj3h6yJSLxrNUUfS-NoLlH51Slwc_GIcnoIEtCVaxBU5OpDOodFkmhYkRMkKLJW_zwR_X8QiFQq70fwPQlg0VB6YrO6QGuYVt95qCaJ4rZJxYbCCdSMFZaQzJkf4OuvE1nvsveRVGRtRLymhirtKXqdwS81EmEpm1BplLgrc9oeuykD-9kGnU2kzg0D4zgsNzkv1m62KBjTYo8YB4LcR7w==&c=NIlLNnlvVn4jZUR25U-RZEN0pwTo4qDxGeSpgRx-9E4exeptqWd_xA==&ch=AYi2OeO7vA9yXz59XlQR8w-3kr1eBdllFTU0yBW87F-hC8peTzbxBg==)

I'm using that time to hear from supporters about the issues they care about and what I should be focusing on when I return to Washington, D.C.
