clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | | | Peter- I am leading the fight in Congress against the Mexican drug cartels that are facilitating the border crisis and trafficking deadly fentanyl into our country. The cartels kill tens of thousands of Americans every year with fentanyl poison that they get from China, and I'm working hard to stop them and save American lives. | | | == | As Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force, I am developing solutions to bring the fight to the cartels, target their finances, and hold those who aid and abet them accountable. I've introduced legislation to: Authorize the use of Military force against the Mexican drug cartels. Give law enforcement additional tools to target and seize the cartels' illicit finances, and use the money we seize to fund border security efforts. * Sanction foreign officials who aid and abet cartel activity. This work has been noticed at the highest levels of the Mexican government, which is notorious for their inaction to stop the cartels. The Mexican President even threatened to campaign against me in my upcoming election because I am going after his cartel donors. The belligerent attacks from Mexico's president prove I am targeting my work effectively. I am not backing down, but I will need more resources to fight back against a foreign leader who is trying to interfere in my election. == This is the biggest fight I've taken on since coming to Congress... it's not every day another country's president targets me specifically. But with the support of patriots like you, I know we can fight back. Can I count on you? | | | == | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | P.S. Congress is out of session during the month of August. I'm using that time to hear from supporters about the issues they care about and what I should be focusing on when I return to Washington, D.C. There are so many problems to tackle under the failed leadership of Joe Biden, but with your help I can ensure I'm focusing on the issues important to you to get America back on track. == | | | | | == == == | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

Team, I’ve been in Congress for 8 months. **So, I want to share an update with you about what I’ve been working on:** ● I introduced a bill that bans the distribution of 3-D printed gun blueprints.
● I sent a letter to the Republican Chairs of the House Judiciary and House Oversight Committees, demanding they hold a joint field hearing in my hometown of Parkland to examine gun violence and the success of red flag laws.
● I urged the Biden Administration to invoke the Defense Production Act to address our nation’s cancer drug shortages.
● I introduced legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and block their ability to fund terrorist groups abroad. I ran for Congress to make a difference for Florida — and we’ve done so much already.

**But MAGA Republicans are obstructionists, targeting our district in 2024.**

clean_body: | = Team, I’ve been in Congress for 8 months. So, I want to share an update with you about what I’ve been working on: ● I introduced a bill that bans the distribution of 3-D printed gun blueprints. ● I sent a letter to the Republican Chairs of the House Judiciary and House Oversight Committees, demanding they hold a joint field hearing in my hometown of Parkland to examine gun violence and the success of red flag laws. ● I urged the Biden Administration to invoke the Defense Production Act to address our nation’s cancer drug shortages. ● I introduced legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and block their ability to fund terrorist groups abroad. I ran for Congress to make a difference for Florida — and we’ve done so much already. But MAGA Republicans are obstructionists, targeting our district in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. body:

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I refuse to give up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ll never stop fighting until we pass comprehensive voting rights protections and save our democracy.
Team, our democracy is in crisis. It faces its greatest test since Jim Crow.

Yesterday's anniversary of the Voting Rights Act's passage serves as a clear reminder of how far we've come and the work we still have left to rid our democracy of the barriers many Americans still face at the polls.

Since 2013, when the Supreme Court gutted key provisions of the Voting Rights Act in _Shelby County vs. Holder_ , Republican lawmakers have been working nonstop to make it harder for Americans—especially Black and brown Americans—to vote.

When I was sworn into Congress, I got to work immediately to co-author legislation aimed at protecting our fundamental right to vote—legislation passed by the House when we had a Democratic majority.

Congressman Mike Lawler and his Republican colleagues oppose that legislation, called the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.

[**When I’m back in Congress, I’ll never stop fighting to pass comprehensive voting rights protections and save our democracy. Join me by chipping in $5 or any amount you can to flip NY-17, reclaim the Democratic majority, and finally get voting rights on the President’s desk and into law.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67712391/420610177/13284604?refcode=em23_230807_vote_fndd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230807_vote_fndd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2b39c7d5-3035-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM5YzdkNS0zMDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=af0bv7V0G2AM5ADRvdTqAqVILa13DYyeTeFNKd_1REM=) ---|---|---|---|---
Republicans are using every trick in the Jim Crow playbook to stop people from voting, from ID requirements to gerrymandering to shutting down voting centers in rural communities.

**Without any new legislation to stop them, it will only get worse.**

Today’s Republican Party has completely abandoned democracy—instead choosing to side with the serially indicted former President, Donald Trump, who incited an insurrection and attempted to toss out the votes of Black and brown voters in places like Georgia, Arizona, and Pennsylvania.

This is a turning point for our democracy, but we’ve been here before. It’s time to dig deep and elect people who are willing to lead us through the wilderness.

[**We can restore the Voting Rights Act, ban partisan gerrymandering, make Election Day a national holiday, create automatic voter registration, and more—but only if we flip NY-17 and retake our Democratic House majority. Chip in $5, and let’s get it done together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67712398/420610184/13284604?refcode=em23_230807_vote_fndd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230807_vote_fndd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=2b39c7d5-3035-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjM5YzdkNS0zMDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=af0bv7V0G2AM5ADRvdTqAqVILa13DYyeTeFNKd_1REM=)

Thanks,

Mondaire

Yesterday's anniversary of the Voting Rights Act's passage serves as a clear reminder of how far we've come and the work we still have left to rid our democracy of the barriers many Americans still face at the polls. When I was sworn into Congress, I got to work immediately to co-author legislation aimed at protecting our fundamental right to vote—legislation passed by the House when we had a Democratic majority. Congressman Mike Lawler and his Republican colleagues oppose that legislation, called the Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Republicans are using every trick in the Jim Crow playbook to stop people from voting, from ID requirements to gerrymandering to shutting down voting centers in rural communities. Without any new legislation to stop them, it will only get worse. Today’s Republican Party has completely abandoned democracy—instead choosing to side with the serially indicted former President, Donald Trump, who incited an insurrection and attempted to toss out the votes of Black and brown voters in places like Georgia, Arizona, and Pennsylvania. This is a turning point for our democracy, but we’ve been here before. It’s time to dig deep and elect people who are willing to lead us through the wilderness. = Thanks, Mondaire = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3a2a26215a64aa880d9804cf7850eaf&_e=FD7k5a7e7WJLEwa-d2wfHMux0bT_EeYJoi7Wmgd9PjtG8X6ETUu0HunifqKnyMGJsQHpNiie93JpobGqB_HkLg_ccl0vBp9Ca2KGHdQL0YWCw0S1icv0zuJj5G8-fJcVq24CYTzbZoKfFNCpuVP76pQJilYbgELMKD9y9n2ubGBywuRfnpWw1DdGzhHH1p_IRbyYgy_PNx56t6Gcqagw9wwmzljUqD2_-tIU7L7R92hgO5ts4HwQm5Qkca5FnY1g2ICJk_K-iULj_JmmuFpuQpz5ffB_ey4FUQ5sXYbYSAnrNDQZVmZJ7FxLYKiAgLTD4Lgd1GA8NnMoIlAFZS0MWKryW__g3QFwi7q7KEkLTgX3QJuqGN8jNRG6TxTNAwaRGWZJHRp78KtPsQsEtWMOCIR6IHdCbylM0Q3QB7wmPf8%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3a2a26215a64aa880d9804cf7850eaf&_e=FD7k5a7e7WJLEwa-d2wfHMux0bT_EeYJoi7Wmgd9PjtG8X6ETUu0HunifqKnyMGJsQHpNiie93JpobGqB_HkLg_ccl0vBp9Ca2KGHdQL0YWCw0S1icv0zuJj5G8-fJcVq24CYTzbZoKfFNCpuVP76pQJilYbgELMKD9y9n2ubGBywuRfnpWw1DdGzhHH1p_IRbyYgy_PNx56t6Gcqagw9wwmzljUqD2_-tIU7L7R92hgO5ts4HwQm5Qkca5FnY1g2ICJk_K-iULj_JmmuFpuQiEPruOf5UbTvEok9vIfW7a-C-y-bvG7C-uTx9eCm_6yIoP_fsiMhh0i6LuctbhA_J9MOZPUj5hrWTvKdBH2NPYmK7tWyHT3dYwJtkMC3jKloELa_OuU14UI3eDqhKU1BbWMFnTtzQMsu3HovehTX1M%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3a2a26215a64aa880d9804cf7850eaf&_e=FD7k5a7e7WJLEwa-d2wfHMux0bT_EeYJoi7Wmgd9PjtG8X6ETUu0HunifqKnyMGJsQHpNiie93JpobGqB_HkLg_ccl0vBp9Ca2KGHdQL0YWCw0S1icv0zuJj5G8-fJcVq24CYTzbZoKfFNCpuVP76pQJilYbgELMKD9y9n2ubGBywuRfnpWw1DdGzhHH1p_IRbyYgy_PNx56t6Gcqagw9wwmzljUqD2_-tIU7L7R92hgO5ts4HwQm5Qkca5FnY1g2ICJk_K-iULj_JmmuFpuQpx1H3s8Dpb38vNAksqUsxPkYO1I81iucRA8m6v8IT8Y0i14jnwhH00D1t_rZ_6oedFlAvBITBmeB2MgW4KJTFEmU00KhpmwoRvlTxlIe22Lwep17jlbSaAj2zIMUM5LplMrbCLCPUt1kyBIIitbhPo%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e3a2a26215a64aa880d9804cf7850eaf&_e=FD7k5a7e7WJLEwa-d2wfHMux0bT_EeYJoi7Wmgd9PjtG8X6ETUu0HunifqKnyMGJsQHpNiie93JpobGqB_HkLg_ccl0vBp9Ca2KGHdQL0YWCw0S1icv0zuJj5G8-fJcVq24CYTzbZoKfFNCpuVP76pQJilYbgELMKD9y9n2ubGBywuRfnpWw1DdGzhHH1p_IRbyYgy_PNx56t6Gcqagw9wwmzljUqD2_-tIU7L7R92hgO5ts4HwQm5Qkca5FnY1g2ICJk_K-iULj_JmmuFpuQpk2wjKwPp3Rq0ka80ITZ-7xpwtaaav8AGZt4Yrn8SYaN8yKeIDZQ_gCydyG9B31RVv3wAOGD3ZWlTDGr9HqJd69shg2Pji5Mqn4Wle7nB0I0STigJOpWhqKA5g3Nlq4UFGaU_SIQP7ff2UWIwKgD5g%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: It started with an Instagram caption.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, this is a
longer email, but I hope you’ll take a moment to read it.

In November 2018, on a small budget fueled by grassroots supporters like
you, Justice Democrats succeeded in helping elect four of the most
progressive candidates Congress has EVER seen: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in
New York, Ilhan Omar in Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley in Massachusetts, and
Rashida Tlaib in Michigan.

All four are women of color under the age of 50 with diverse backgrounds
and lived experiences that fuel their desire to challenge the status quo
and fight for social, economic, environmental, and racial justice for ALL
people. None of them are beholden to the establishment.

Soon, they would band together in the collective fight for progress and
real, bold change in Washington. It started with an Instagram photo of the
four of them shortly after Election Day, posted by Alexandria with a
caption that read “Squad.”

[1]Photo of Ilhan Omar, Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez

Republicans, right-wing media, and conservative groups like AIPAC quickly
started to pay attention and wasted no time attacking these newly elected
Congresswomen. One day after Alexandria’s post, Fox News commentator Laura
Ingraham declared Alexandria, Ilhan, Ayanna, and Rashida “the four
horsewomen of the apocalypse.” The Squad quickly became the new boogeyman
of the GOP and a favorite target of Donald Trump.

Why? Because they were afraid of these four young, diverse women in power
united in their fight to make healthcare guaranteed for everyone, pay
workers a fair and livable wage, take bold and urgent action necessary to
address the climate crisis, make housing more affordable, reform our
broken criminal justice system, protect the LGBTQ+ community, defend
everyone’s right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom, and stand up
for the human rights of people around the world.

Once sworn-in to Congress in January 2019, the Squad got right to work.
Alexandria’s first bill was the Green New Deal resolution to create
millions of clean energy jobs, cut emissions, repair our infrastructure,
and address climate change head-on. Ilhan introduced the NO BAN Act to
repeal Trump’s racist and xenophobic Muslim travel ban. Ayanna introduced
bills like the CROWN Act to ban discrimination against Black women based
on hair style and texture. Rashida secured $3 billion in funding for home
repairs and neighborhood revitalization and $1 billion to stop water
shutoffs for low-income families during the pandemic.

All four are keeping up the fight for Medicare for All, a higher minimum
wage, student loan debt forgiveness, and the rights of people facing human
rights abuses here and abroad, including Palestinians.

They’ve been called the nastiest names, attacked for their ethnicity and
faith, and been on the receiving end of countless death threats, but they
made it clear: the Squad, and the progressive movement they represent, are
here to stay.

Through your support, Justice Democrats has since gone on to elect
additional members to the Squad, including Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in
2020 and Greg Casar and Summer Lee last November, even when our opponents
were spending millions of dollars and the odds were against us.

Our organization is experiencing financial struggles right now, but with
grassroots contributions from people like you, we aim to get through this
and continue electing more progressive leaders like the Squad to deliver
the transformative change we deserve.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136307?refcode=em20230807-30209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30209%2E1203867%2ETXg1ZP ]Will you make a donation of $3 or whatever you can afford
today to help Justice Democrats expand the Squad and elect the next
generation of progressive leaders in 2024 and beyond? We can’t do it
without you.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136307?refcode=em20230807-30209&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30209%2E1203867%2ETXg1ZP ]Donate $3

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, this is a longer email, but I hope you’ll take a moment to read it. In November 2018, on a small budget fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Justice Democrats succeeded in helping elect four of the most progressive candidates Congress has EVER seen: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in New York, Ilhan Omar in Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley in Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib in Michigan. All four are women of color under the age of 50 with diverse backgrounds and lived experiences that fuel their desire to challenge the status quo and fight for social, economic, environmental, and racial justice for ALL people. None of them are beholden to the establishment. Soon, they would band together in the collective fight for progress and real, bold change in Washington. It started with an Instagram photo of the four of them shortly after Election Day, posted by Alexandria with a caption that read “Squad.” [1]Photo of Ilhan Omar, Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez Republicans, right-wing media, and conservative groups like AIPAC quickly started to pay attention and wasted no time attacking these newly elected Congresswomen. One day after Alexandria’s post, Fox News commentator Laura Ingraham declared Alexandria, Ilhan, Ayanna, and Rashida “the four horsewomen of the apocalypse.” The Squad quickly became the new boogeyman of the GOP and a favorite target of Donald Trump. Why? Because they were afraid of these four young, diverse women in power united in their fight to make healthcare guaranteed for everyone, pay workers a fair and livable wage, take bold and urgent action necessary to address the climate crisis, make housing more affordable, reform our broken criminal justice system, protect the LGBTQ+ community, defend everyone’s right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom, and stand up for the human rights of people around the world. Once sworn-in to Congress in January 2019, the Squad got right to work. Alexandria’s first bill was the Green New Deal resolution to create millions of clean energy jobs, cut emissions, repair our infrastructure, and address climate change head-on. Ilhan introduced the NO BAN Act to repeal Trump’s racist and xenophobic Muslim travel ban. Ayanna introduced bills like the CROWN Act to ban discrimination against Black women based on hair style and texture. Rashida secured $3 billion in funding for home repairs and neighborhood revitalization and $1 billion to stop water shutoffs for low-income families during the pandemic. All four are keeping up the fight for Medicare for All, a higher minimum wage, student loan debt forgiveness, and the rights of people facing human rights abuses here and abroad, including Palestinians. They’ve been called the nastiest names, attacked for their ethnicity and faith, and been on the receiving end of countless death threats, but they made it clear: the Squad, and the progressive movement they represent, are here to stay. Through your support, Justice Democrats has since gone on to elect additional members to the Squad, including Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman in 2020 and Greg Casar and Summer Lee last November, even when our opponents were spending millions of dollars and the odds were against us. Our organization is experiencing financial struggles right now, but with grassroots contributions from people like you, we aim to get through this and continue electing more progressive leaders like the Squad to deliver the transformative change we deserve. [ ]Will you make a donation of $3 or whatever you can afford today to help Justice Democrats expand the Squad and elect the next generation of progressive leaders in 2024 and beyond? We can’t do it without you. [ ]Donate $3 We’re here today because of you. Together, we have forever altered the political landscape and reinvigorated the fight for progressive change across the country — and we cannot thank you enough. In solidarity, Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Team Liz
subject: Not just no. Hell no.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIZ FOR NY
body:
Liz Gereghty is a community leader, small businesswoman, and mom who is running for Congress in New York's 17th congressional district. If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/MYVOZ4KcDEWY9i98RJm9xg2?unsubscribedata=NL1H1YzMkcZ1hZr8PhqeB0TxQv3LugMGpFWApjtdUJdUVZkfxPGcftGtIe2%2B6oDymbUCRWKYG8H4f9VOwDfY%2BYJsE7GERXZ5spMfViT4%2BIaYcPqC1RrDbDNAhkBk2qIID8K0k6OjWPfQuH3BTr4nitPMlOulXEURzpvfaMTBs%2BNzMelqB4ruz2QeO6RRfbY8FoohHWBcWc0DNeNxS2ArqWWoVVHGOz9UaWtauv7wOLswSxCFRF520GO7CAfbbZ6X95SFPhZ9WDCXWaX4CtA7nLL5%2BR3G2NLEelQFk0ttwH4NDANjgF6hE6TJLSQp8lvzXM6t6tM3%2BkRdTz3KtsBw9h1Cgf1klc99mN0lN%2BhX9y9Tle9WwGgD4N3UH1y4Mc%2BKQkcc2B4%2BuqXgWBvjMszpHE3mhy6W24eQUXo0NYeatGZEJfcsskuD%2FfXOFi4FA9JL)

Have you been following what’s happening in Ohio?

Issue 1 is a ballot measure that would make it more difficult to change the state constitution through future ballot measures. Republicans in Ohio are running a special election in August to change the threshold for future ballot measures to pass to 60%. Which, infuriatingly, could pass with a simple majority, the current standard. Why, you might ask? Because a ballot initiative to change the constitution to protect abortion access will be on Ohio ballots in November.

_“Polls show that in Ohio, the abortion-rights amendment is likely to win more than 50 percent of the vote, as have similar ballot measures in other states. For Republicans to propose raising the threshold three months before the abortion vote in November looks like a transparent bid to move the proverbial goalposts right when their opponents are about to score.” -[The Atlantic](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67714979/420619603/154093766?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230807_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViNjNjZDktMzQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HRGO15F9vT_mX-o1rUFmdAo57NuCcN_anId1uYcFtUs=&emci=b8b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669)_

Over the last few years, we watched a Republican president who lost the popular vote by nearly 3,000,000 install a radical minority in the Supreme Court. Did you know that **[NOT ONE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67714982/420619605/-1801537442?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230807_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViNjNjZDktMzQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HRGO15F9vT_mX-o1rUFmdAo57NuCcN_anId1uYcFtUs=&emci=b8b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669)** of the justices appointed by Donald Trump was confirmed by Senators that collectively represented more than 50% of the population? **NOT ONE.**

Radical Republicans understand that their ideas are not acceptable to the majority of the country. The only way they win is by changing the rules. Women are 51% of this country’s population and that scares them. It scares them enough to try to change what a majority means. If they succeed, who knows what they will try next? In 2022, a [Republican candidate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67714983/420619609/-341452794?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230807_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViNjNjZDktMzQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HRGO15F9vT_mX-o1rUFmdAo57NuCcN_anId1uYcFtUs=&emci=b8b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669) for Congress questioned whether women should be allowed to vote or work outside the home. We need to stop telling ourselves that it can’t happen here, and do the work to make sure it doesn’t.

**So, what can we do to help?**

1\. Call everyone you know in Ohio & remind them to vote on Tuesday, August 8. [**Click here to sign up to phone bank.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67714985/420619610/-1910491584?end_date=2023-08-09T03%3A59%3A59.999Z&is_virtual=true&q=Ohio%20issue%201%20&start_date=2023-08-07T04%3A00%3A00.000Z&refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230807_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViNjNjZDktMzQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HRGO15F9vT_mX-o1rUFmdAo57NuCcN_anId1uYcFtUs=&emci=b8b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669)

2\. Make a donation to the Ohio Democratic party to help power them to victory in these final days! [**Click here to make a donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67714988/420619613/-2100523189?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230807_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViNjNjZDktMzQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HRGO15F9vT_mX-o1rUFmdAo57NuCcN_anId1uYcFtUs=)

3\. Forward this email to everyone you know in Ohio or just everyone you know who may know someone in Ohio who can get out and vote. [**Click here for more information on voting in tomorrow's election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67714990/420619615/1498719018?refcode=EM_NBI_LWG_20230807_EN_Ohio_0_1MO_TeamLiz_NA_NA_Issue1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0OTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzViNjNjZDktMzQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HRGO15F9vT_mX-o1rUFmdAo57NuCcN_anId1uYcFtUs=&emci=b8b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c5b63cd9-3435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=14515669)

Liz served on her local school board overseeing over a $100 million budget, working to improve school facilities and finding common ground to get things done for our kids. **Liz is running for Congress to make the Hudson Valley more affordable, help small businesses thrive, and always fight for women’s rights.**

body:
...let’s get ready to flip the Senate | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67715219/420620701/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&refcode=em-08-07-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU0MzRkZS0zNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k-vFaV7bOhQGNtUdNpoluOvgH30p-1pr_vZBmLp0N0=) | By now you’ve probably heard of the redistricting news that broke here in Wisconsin last week. A new lawsuit that seeks to throw out the rigged, Republican legislative maps was filed with the Supreme Court, meaning we could get fair lines as soon as 2024 in Wisconsin. This is really important, especially in the State Senate, where we could see every seat up next year and a real opportunity to flip control from red to blue. [**That’s why I’m hoping you can split a contribution between myself and Senate Democrats to help us gear up for what could be an historic election cycle?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67715220/420620702/-155329307?refcode=em-08-07-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU0MzRkZS0zNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k-vFaV7bOhQGNtUdNpoluOvgH30p-1pr_vZBmLp0N0=) If fair maps are a reality next year, that means we have an opportunity to not only break the supermajority, protecting the Governor’s veto, but also to compete for a record number of seats. [**HELP US FLIP THE STATE SEANTE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67715221/420620703/-155329307?refcode=em-08-07-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU0MzRkZS0zNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k-vFaV7bOhQGNtUdNpoluOvgH30p-1pr_vZBmLp0N0=) Your contribution helps us do just that: recruiting candidates, raising the resources needed to support those candidates, and ultimately flipping seats! [But we cannot do it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67715222/420620704/-155329307?refcode=em-08-07-2023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDU0MzRkZS0zNTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2k-vFaV7bOhQGNtUdNpoluOvgH30p-1pr_vZBmLp0N0=) Republicans are already running scared and they’re hoping their millionaire, special interest donors bail them out. name: Team Tuberville
subject: This must NOT PASS…yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Links to read my op-ed inside >>>
| | | Peter, The Senate Banking Committee just passed the RECOUP Act, and it could advance to a floor vote in just a few weeks. This bill creates new regulations designed to prevent banking crises (like Silicon Valley Bank’s recent failure) from happening again. **There’s no doubt that our banking system needs reform – but this legislation goes too far.****** **[Please read Coach’s op-ed piece to learn more>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/2eba9e19bd568d17/e435cf4d5160f888c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** The bill, in its current form, contains vague language that would potentially:

* _Allow federal regulators to fire executives at successful banks.

_
* _Give regulators the power to punish banks for not following woke Environmental,__Social, and Governance (ESG) priorities._

Coach is prepared to support commonsense reforms to our banking system. But he believes this dangerous language must be removed before it receives approval from the full Senate. [Take a few moments to check out his op-ed for a full breakdown.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/2eba9e19bd568d17/2f48e0f4128e66eec3d6b838967d376c/33013) ** ** – Team Tuberville

| | Do you have 1 minute, fellow American? Will Hurd has been making waves, hosting campaign events, and talking to voters to lay out his forward-thinking vision for America. He does a lot of talking, but he wants to make sure that's in tune with voters nationwide. He does a lot of talking, but he wants to make sure that's in tune with voters nationwide. He asked us to conduct a survey to see what issues facing our nation are most pressing to you. From AI to the border and rising tensions with China, Will wants to talk about the issues that will directly impact your life – that no other candidate is talking about. Your feedback is critical at this point in the campaign. Thank you, Survey Team Hurd for America | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

Fellow American, We are absolutely appalled.

When Representative Cammack confronted U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra with **the wristbands human traffickers force upon illegal immigrants** in order to track and extort their victims, **Becerra said they looked like****“candies or snacks”****.**

Can you believe that!

It’s not too much to ask for competency among our leaders in Washington, D.C. but for the love of God, **the Biden Administration** _**isn’t even pretending to care.**_

**Human lives are at stake** and the Biden Administration allows human traffickers to operate along our border with near impunity, but **Rep. Kat Cammack is fighting to hold the administration accountable and end human trafficking at the border.**

These are the wristbands that litter the border. They’re worn by border crossers and signify which cartel the wearer belongs to, and how much that individual owes the cartel.
As though that wasn’t shocking enough, when I held up a jar filled with them and asked U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra what they were...
He said they “look like candies or snacks.”
This is how out of touch this administration is on the issues and travesties that are occurring every day, tearing this country apart.
I’m fighting tooth and nail to expose them – and I need your help to keep it up.

clean_body: | | | | I’d call it a joke but it’s not funny... | Fellow American, We are absolutely appalled. When Representative Cammack confronted U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra with the wristbands human traffickers force upon illegal immigrants in order to track and extort their victims, Becerra said they looked like“candies or snacks”. Can you believe that! It’s not too much to ask for competency among our leaders in Washington, D.C. but for the love of God, the Biden Administration isn’t even pretending to care. Human lives are at stake and the Biden Administration allows human traffickers to operate along our border with near impunity, but Rep. Kat Cammack is fighting to hold the administration accountable and end human trafficking at the border. However, she needs your help, Friend. | | | | | We need to send a message that it is time to SECURE OUR BORDER and stop human trafficking. Thank you, Team Kat | \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Kat Cammack Subject: He thought this atrocity was a piece of candy... To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Fellow American, The U.S. border with Mexico is in shambles, and our own Secretary of Health and Human Services doesn’t even have a clue how bad it is. These are the wristbands that litter the border. They’re worn by border crossers and signify which cartel the wearer belongs to, and how much that individual owes the cartel. As though that wasn’t shocking enough, when I held up a jar filled with them and asked U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services Xavier Becerra what they were... He said they “look like candies or snacks.” This is how out of touch this administration is on the issues and travesties that are occurring every day, tearing this country apart. I’m fighting tooth and nail to expose them – and I need your help to keep it up. | | | | | You deserve an administration that knows what’s going on at the border. You deserve members of Congress who will hold the feet of those who have failed you to the fire. You deserve to live in a country that values and protects its own citizens above all else. None of the above should be considered a “novel idea” – in fact, I shouldn't even have to reiterate any of it, it should all be a given. But that’s the unfortunate reality of today – and it’s my mission in Congress to change that. Thank you, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Team Kat 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \-

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf188eee0b904b98869a4b1dc3c88b57&_e=LoMDVCV67sM_mBvBalbIty2PSay5N_TIzp8lwjrtLGf1RaH5XaL47hWOBPIdY0YCK06YPWcKUeC5mv2Yv7gasf7q18XiZY5jL8Sj0qYDtvav5SYY6lI_m1_t397i8Z37wDdBw_mXNa_k2k4Ymgt5rGp3MmQttajkju2UqxlzuUZGDfMPXWSeZCtzEaVfpUVTFScMQu8kjw4ATDpfLXc7NQ2v4z0GAWKPZf1REH8sy-azS_aaSY56oF29wamCsE7AnU6RyMO_btd2U8Itxc8o38DoqkeYh3Evuyd0eHKHf9wVm2yI8gMxhAOF0WrHCCK_1XDWfeyutmfEfGeuSfUMuDpnnK6Y5IOpJyQ9DWbqUjw3WY-OHhCjGGhd3g-5VzHBB2W7FAvxipA3ypbIJeBS49JcvXFJbrX0ePAKZiLNG8I%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf188eee0b904b98869a4b1dc3c88b57&_e=LoMDVCV67sM_mBvBalbIty2PSay5N_TIzp8lwjrtLGf1RaH5XaL47hWOBPIdY0YCK06YPWcKUeC5mv2Yv7gasf7q18XiZY5jL8Sj0qYDtvav5SYY6lI_m1_t397i8Z37wDdBw_mXNa_k2k4Ymgt5rGp3MmQttajkju2UqxlzuUZGDfMPXWSeZCtzEaVfpUVTFScMQu8kjw4ATDpfLXc7NQ2v4z0GAWKPZf1REH8sy-azS_aaSY56oF29wamCsE7AnU6RyMO_btd2U8Itxc8o34RwBSD64TCZg8d1UBwVqAbQ-CFQqKAKFtWIgpXPFbGl3hwneZpHFzLC2hyiGwC21RA5rjMs-NlMWRhU7ObdXhHEQPLkTGS7AXphLgvw90dBI6q5S81qULccMd2Na0ixqIeSYnuMouYFwQ8-oL1S8jA%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf188eee0b904b98869a4b1dc3c88b57&_e=LoMDVCV67sM_mBvBalbIty2PSay5N_TIzp8lwjrtLGf1RaH5XaL47hWOBPIdY0YCK06YPWcKUeC5mv2Yv7gasf7q18XiZY5jL8Sj0qYDtvav5SYY6lI_m1_t397i8Z37wDdBw_mXNa_k2k4Ymgt5rGp3MmQttajkju2UqxlzuUZGDfMPXWSeZCtzEaVfpUVTFScMQu8kjw4ATDpfLXc7NQ2v4z0GAWKPZf1REH8sy-azS_aaSY56oF29wamCsE7AnU6RyMO_btd2U8Itxc8o30fPBHMwL83dYlVU0Q7Pk4W3zPLbuzdrIuz_niclUo5lfCQtYxzqYYe0D7Jk1MdlFQpL2TlaYztulYn3VZ9J8sKFiaHZzZ6UScPOdr3yitWVkTFk_VKqQwt3ePLJOOX6fNn4o6tX8LPtRnmnA2KDXxk%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf188eee0b904b98869a4b1dc3c88b57&_e=LoMDVCV67sM_mBvBalbIty2PSay5N_TIzp8lwjrtLGf1RaH5XaL47hWOBPIdY0YCK06YPWcKUeC5mv2Yv7gasf7q18XiZY5jL8Sj0qYDtvav5SYY6lI_m1_t397i8Z37wDdBw_mXNa_k2k4Ymgt5rGp3MmQttajkju2UqxlzuUZGDfMPXWSeZCtzEaVfpUVTFScMQu8kjw4ATDpfLXc7NQ2v4z0GAWKPZf1REH8sy-azS_aaSY56oF29wamCsE7AnU6RyMO_btd2U8Itxc8o339nVtXkuS3UpuEMab718Qk0-S4mPlJL9DwaskUKXSHQI6GcuaOwzKmwgXZwrKVd0AdAa3_Ry6srHDX8GVKaQ9DhBtPjQrdAJtjh46ojkpurr6riHqvvAO5NkTR5g6whdg8BpsIoJD97ICKsk_GPR3k%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

We bucked his policies, and our state, our people, our sports, and our businesses are better off because of it. We will NEVER bend the knee to the Left, the political elites, the massive corporations who use their consumers' dollars to fund woke agenda, or Communist China.

| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=b4611c01b686474ca504d528d8ddf300&_e=5X2tPaU-oNHgPIEoi8ZApzyCbuQA9pCCBrPjr7QeNQJseQInwb_j9UAwEUFrkxvNzSsdmi69h1eXSEui9yZEUDD66rsZktqcEJMRvjy19ZFyhoRDdzawrRYU8Oy1zZ_t-x7jFVryUBaqHLt9UfY3aenopxZAuRjNp8yiOeBxjx6DdJSh61_wx45WmF_SVbfXWZp6NjLfSU55fkzQpppRRX3flRW-cUqAo85Tey2owrBqbJ8w9f1Uy_4uI602f9mkGA2wOGeHHIa1vzXZ6dX-KE533wQhft0SgqlWkg_nW3fJwIwHuQXEn11ZEaIayMLkdRtWK4PQDwXMJumdBH7UKeGktZjHK-qKvQapAvsydrnoE0TCIsyEAtYavDLRzLS7s89fTbSArMWCQZk4jIdGCsph-O1aujQa2CT6jnc0mkSEPL5XVd_t5e0DS7vHVdIj)

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Friend,
Because you’re a loyal supporter, I wanted to give you a courtesy reminder that TONIGHT before 11:59 P.M. is your last chance to enter my contest to join me for dinner in Nashville.
And because I’m not crooked like the man currently occupying the White House, I also want to be very transparent with you, since you may not know this important detail...
_**...There’s no minimum contribution needed to be automatically entered to win.**_
That’s right – even $1 will get you automatically entered.
And ALL entries have an equal shot of winning.
I could see someone like Crooked Joe trying to hide that from you. _But not me!_
[**Please make a contribution before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to be automatically entered to WIN – and YOU could be dining with your favorite president (me) during this pivotal moment in the 2024 election. clean_body: Since I was trying to reach you yesterday. . . | | | Friend, Because you’re a loyal supporter, I wanted to give you a courtesy reminder that TONIGHT before 11:59 P.M. is your last chance to enter my contest to join me for dinner in Nashville. And because I’m not crooked like the man currently occupying the White House, I also want to be very transparent with you, since you may not know this important detail... ...There’s no minimum contribution needed to be automatically entered to win. That’s right – even $1 will get you automatically entered. And ALL entries have an equal shot of winning. I could see someone like Crooked Joe trying to hide that from you. But not me! | Thank you and GOOD LUCK! | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting “AUGUSTDINNER” to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between August 2, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on August 7, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to a August 17, 2023 dinner event in Nashville, Tennessee consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $5,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Team — Let's be clear: Voter suppression of _any kind_ is a threat to our democracy.

But unfortunately, lawmakers continue to introduce brazen and oppressive voting legislation focused on restricting and disproportionately sabotaging voters of color, seniors, and young people.

**The Brennan Center for Justice found, as of June 2023, legislators in at least 11 states have enacted 13 restrictive bills that would undermine the electoral process.**

Derek believes that Congress should protect the rights of every American citizen to participate in our democracy. And it should act before more voter suppression laws are implemented. That's why he is a proud co-sponsor of the Freedom to Vote Act – a bill that will strengthen the voice of the American people in their democracy by making it easier to vote, ending the dominance of big money in the political process, and ending partisan gerrymandering.

**[We can't let extreme politicians roll back voter protections and rights to further their own dangerous, self-serving agendas. Add your name to this petition to support the Freedom to Vote Act>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67717108/420628058/-160583123?ms=em23_230807_VRPK_fnd_gq_act___KHQ_ettx&refcode=em23_230807_VRPK_fnd_gq_act___KHQ_ettx&source=em23_230807_VRPK_fnd_gq_act___KHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230807_VRPK_fnd_gq_act___KHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8JR4XOPUZrknGWi/cOa283khaGzA1Vpw5Mdh/w/8iOUl0c+/hExNp7uE0aoDtTi6SNc27dPUOv6wJORWq+49MypKyMIZbEOEEJ5ecEQwRudnXmE1YQACW5va3uFEeu0R8U3+H4mQjtFCu3u9qSphFaSYVvOkZu+92iOYufeIUaM=&refcode2=ae06ba73-3b35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUwNmJhNzMtM2IzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WyRiQuX_zJe-zBMWJ7sc1b65r890dycjnqZSRmYK8K4=&emci=579fecca-0b33-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=ae06ba73-3b35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbf918c884a34af9a7d91141b4ef460d&_e=o1fFPXqfsNjkQZNat0bNmghCZs9LZ6xMiDG-lL3gqF0s0916w3ESO3ixPSZC8-gY0DG_cxZFk3_5EMSzt8w1gAjW9rTmcZeb-cMfVtjkCTUgPxCXPROXuch4MqSnmTy6QypcArAHVrf_crJS7Zj8Jlj435_wJKMfoC_0Q7k7nKLmlJhxL8ubukGex1kwB6K5VRlQYfuzPltUSGqjOh1pIzo_p6DJ79eUunGW55ybj8ieg8zW_N0gtP784hHDP9LB4cFZG0ZYBGgF52OLYgNuhwffylFeTSuqXaWrRrkTAwDcXVQrrY-MACWV-jgT7LJdN02j6lHddsNOwnoRXlZDvZOpkxqjDNLMKXNnWz9z3ILaJKjXyPQHKPzT0LQ_V1B1nZ1UM2oJPVo0zQlbnZevtFufHQzHwOy2lYUOfHosMUk%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbf918c884a34af9a7d91141b4ef460d&_e=o1fFPXqfsNjkQZNat0bNmghCZs9LZ6xMiDG-lL3gqF0s0916w3ESO3ixPSZC8-gY0DG_cxZFk3_5EMSzt8w1gAjW9rTmcZeb-cMfVtjkCTUgPxCXPROXuch4MqSnmTy6QypcArAHVrf_crJS7Zj8Jlj435_wJKMfoC_0Q7k7nKLmlJhxL8ubukGex1kwB6K5VRlQYfuzPltUSGqjOh1pIzo_p6DJ79eUunGW55ybj8ieg8zW_N0gtP784hHDP9LB4cFZG0ZYBGgF52OLYgNuh7BAYjEdqL5VY48l30KbvBwRjjeyLwpEzgqcS44055QtzyPBM7R5Z6SaElRWSRB4-zLqTi5sFVKVXIvPQdda8eq-bHXdA1dpCOrJmH97_K1yAthwhcrospb672xhMciuszDG2WfIKCgZPrBrb_DiPPI%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbf918c884a34af9a7d91141b4ef460d&_e=o1fFPXqfsNjkQZNat0bNmghCZs9LZ6xMiDG-lL3gqF0s0916w3ESO3ixPSZC8-gY0DG_cxZFk3_5EMSzt8w1gAjW9rTmcZeb-cMfVtjkCTUgPxCXPROXuch4MqSnmTy6QypcArAHVrf_crJS7Zj8Jlj435_wJKMfoC_0Q7k7nKLmlJhxL8ubukGex1kwB6K5VRlQYfuzPltUSGqjOh1pIzo_p6DJ79eUunGW55ybj8ieg8zW_N0gtP784hHDP9LB4cFZG0ZYBGgF52OLYgNuh6tKYJHKF8zc-e9Q__PjlGwyRdbNc0xE7_ZgUCwLw0RA6dB0TCDF00hd6gSFLyBA5w8wUKu00GtBaKGWoWYvoD6wcinCjRWfxcpScBT95T_fnbm4MVnc7054VOcyAyMtOkCWlu648W6zy8soPdeLfLg%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=bbf918c884a34af9a7d91141b4ef460d&_e=o1fFPXqfsNjkQZNat0bNmghCZs9LZ6xMiDG-lL3gqF0s0916w3ESO3ixPSZC8-gY0DG_cxZFk3_5EMSzt8w1gAjW9rTmcZeb-cMfVtjkCTUgPxCXPROXuch4MqSnmTy6QypcArAHVrf_crJS7Zj8Jlj435_wJKMfoC_0Q7k7nKLmlJhxL8ubukGex1kwB6K5VRlQYfuzPltUSGqjOh1pIzo_p6DJ79eUunGW55ybj8ieg8zW_N0gtP784hHDP9LB4cFZG0ZYBGgF52OLYgNuh1g3LLn5IUiq4oF3_n3YeAkD6c1F7VRUeJSXhIORK2PXUQefF1fXO2jvqX03iNC_6DQbcbtFopImiyZtw86i24J2V6N2x-pNRAIYI3omJNV_0Oi7iS0MpGBnuieDFXi7eiqa7ahPQnY5s0vxyJ38Jbs%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: From the Desk of Tim Scott
subject: This is long, but worth the read
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vspawyeDVN

When we don't control our southern border, it's not our country.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ospawyeDVN

Friend,

Under President Joe Biden, America has become a nation in
retreat.

We have retreated from strength abroad, safe streets at
home and even from our own sovereign borders.

Illegal border crossings have set record highs each year of
the Biden presidency.

Fentanyl is also flowing across the border and into our
neighborhoods at record highs. Overdose deaths are on the rise.

If you couldn't control who came in through your back door,
your house wouldn't really be your house. When we don't control
our southern border, it's not our country.

More than 7 million people and counting have crossed our border
illegally on Biden's watch, including nearly 200 on the terrorist
watch list - and those are just the ones we caught. Estimates
suggest an additional 1.2 million illegal immigrants have crossed
the border but evaded capture and simply vanished into the
interior.

That adds up to more than 8 million illegal border crossers
under this administration. That is more people than the
population of 38 states, including my home state of South
Carolina. It's more than the populations of Iowa and New
Hampshire combined.

I witnessed this disaster firsthand this weekend in Yuma, Ariz.
I met with the law-enforcement agents, doctors, nurses and
property owners who spend every day on the front lines of Biden's
border crisis.

But the truth is there are not just four southern-border
states. There are 50. Every county in America is a border county.

Every time I visit Iowa - where overdose deaths among those
under 25 have more than doubled just since 2019 - I am in a
border county.

Every time I visit New Hampshire - which has the nation's
fastest-rising overdose-death rate - I am in a border county.

Every time I'm back in South Carolina, speaking with grieving
parents - like my friend Alan Shao, the former dean of the
College of Charleston business school who lost his 27-year-old
son and namesake to fentanyl - I am in a border county.

Each year, fentanyl claims 70,000 American lives. That means we
lose more Americans to this one illegal drug every 10 months than
we lost in the entire Vietnam War.

But Biden is missing in action. He has no plan to secure the
border. He has no plan to disrupt the supply chain that connects
Chinese chemicals to Mexican drug cartels and creates fentanyl.
He has no energy, no ideas and no vision for ending this shameful
retreat from our own sovereign soil and getting control of our
back door.

This shouldn't be hard. And when I am commander in chief, it
won't be.

I will restart construction to finish the border wall and
deploy the latest and greatest military-grade technology to crack
down on drug smuggling and human trafficking at our entry ports.

I will cancel Biden's 87,000 new IRS agents and double
Border Patrol and Immigration and Customs Enforcement to 87,000
agents instead.

Democrats' priority is auditing and harassing American
taxpayers and small businesses. My priority is stopping the
people and drugs pouring into our country illegally.

The far Left had no problem closing your children's schools and
your family's church to supposedly slow a virus' spread. But they
refuse to close our border to reduce crime and stop illegal drugs
that are killing more young people than COVID ever did. I have
already authored a bill to reinstate Title 42 and fast
deportations until we have a handle on the fentanyl emergency.
When I'm in the Oval Office, I'll sign it into law.

I will delete the Biden administration's new smartphone app
that provides concierge service to illegal immigrants, end
catch-and-release and hire 1,000 new immigration judges so we can
stop releasing people into our heartland with a polite invitation
to a hearing often multiple years away.

I will implement a zero-tolerance policy for illegal
immigrants with criminal records.

If you've broken the law to get here and you break our laws
again, the day your prison sentence ends, you aren't going free
on American soil - you're going back where you came from.

I'm sure the far Left will call this radical. Everybody else
calls it common sense.

And I will be the commander-in-chief who takes off the kid
gloves and treats the Mexican drug cartels killing Americans like
the foreign terrorist organizations they are.

I will freeze their assets, sanction their bank accounts, break
their supply chains and use every power of the presidency to end
the cartels before they end more American lives.

The far Left says caring about the border is racist. Rep.
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) claims even talking about our
illegal-immigration emergency is "white supremacy."

I can't wait until they try to play that card on me. Every
single American deserves safe streets, drug-free neighborhoods
and secure borders. And when I'm in the White House, they'll get
them.

-Tim

CHIP IN NOW TO SUPPORT MY
CAMPAIGN AND SECURE THE BORDER

PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT
FOR AMERICA

7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312
North Charleston, SC 29406

Friends:
This morning we have FIVE reasons we'd like to ask you to make your first $5 contribution to Ilhan Omar. Here it goes:
* This month, the first challenger in Minnesota's 5th district Democratic primary officially filed to run against Ilhan.

* In 2022, Ilhan won her primary against a challenger by just 2,466 votes. That's a margin too close for comfort, and one we cannot risk again in 2024.

* That slim margin was thanks in large part to the MILLIONS of dollars in outside spending from corporate PACs and right-wing dark money groups against Ilhan for years.

* Right now, as you read this, those same groups are gearing up for next year's elections, and have already made Ilhan one of their top-priority targets in Congress.

* August is typically a slower month for fundraising but we can’t afford to slow down now. Today is a perfect day to show you stand with Ilhan in our fight.

As you know, the only way we're funding our campaign is from lots and lots of grassroots folks like you chipping in $5 at a time.
But now it's up to you, which is why we're asking:
**[Can you chip in $5 or any amount that makes sense for you to stand with Ilhan Omar today? We wouldn't ask if it weren't so important to our campaign's success.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=2&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/770?c0=io-em-aug23.eeyb-Z&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=21&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-aug23.aMbjPI&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=22&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-aug23._S4P8Q&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=23&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-aug23.zTCtgq&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=24&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-aug23.KaGgr9&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=25&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-aug23.i_mkOm&refcode=em230807-1-t1&t=26&akid=406%2E791427%2Ej02g-s)**

If we're going to defend this seat and continue our movement's fight for justice, it's going to take ALL of us together.
Thanks for all you've done to keep Ilhan in Congress.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

[**We’ve got our work cut out for us, and the next number we put out needs to blow things out of the water.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=cd18a8e0857b4757b12a2057d389e558&_e=Vg5xj8jbi8an5nonov_m8m-l61An_tkan-hZzR41o8-Ux2pzTfSiY2JuiczMb5io3cyoS7julDBqc5kBXy9fObwNasBsDJMGhZSQjWh2oLno1qzvLdfHYna-dpYtPjivkaee7Kk43hy7JsYoESpDn13VdB4UIXKw1f0B8JONXjKT4nxTNElNi8NQLHO03DpUT0gAZmz5OAthgK8d6ZUK-f-bVFMXtSN9Z4XaW8x6o6-faRzHSJmHsMpV7d6YKPRS8TFduZoQyP1T0oZxHX3GPz0v_TDmBsx0hyf8KsAtsDqOSfU47ke1JLnDGXO0-alYixg0rVUFVmhxdyAf87MZdCNkl7ViBsRcLGRf-XVGPU3kyDbMtJ3A0CzOlTIEzo8e)

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

We are thrilled to announce a full slate of endorsed candidates for November's school board elections in Virginia and Pennsylvania. 2023 is going to be the biggest year yet for stopping critical race theory, protecting parental rights, and ending indoctrination in our schools.
[DONATE HERE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7ddcccae-9a31-44cb-a0d7-124abbcbe06d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The 1776 PAC is here to ensure that school boards actually support parents and students, instead of trying to undermine them. And if a school board member is pushing woke indoctrination, they will be replaced.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c7b02441-7649-4e00-986a-91670963e56c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Virginia and Pennsylvania both present major opportunities to oust failing far-left school board members.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6f54add9-0a89-4059-8816-faffc138d8a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Loudon County, VA, of course, has been at the center of the national conversation over woke madness. After the school board there was caught covering up a sexual assault by a biological boy against two girls, they're still doubling down on the same far-left lunacy.
Earlier this summer, Virginia Gov Glenn (R) Youngkin slammed the Loudon County school board after they [opposed an amendment](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f1534bc4-41fe-4db5-a6a1-857a5bd9acd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to a Pride Month resolution which would have recognized biological differences between males and females.
Winning key races across Virginia will help stop this madness in its tracks.
And in Pennsylvania, Gov Josh Shapiro (D) recently [caved](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ea104dfc-9af9-4b03-9736-c211ea2a4668?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the teachers union to line item veto a $100M appropriation for voucher programs and scholarships for low-income students.
Democrats continue to abandon our most vulnerable students and it's why we are as committed as ever to saving our country, one school board at a time.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a79e5fc4-72ab-4de8-ab62-d96e51ad2c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Every candidate we endorse supports patriotism and pride in American history.
They will protect students from pronoun madness.
And will make sure that merit is at the center of school curriculum.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fbc15ca3-4443-4011-8fec-8d5efdefae48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And when our candidates get elected, they immediately start making a major impact.
Get out and vote Nov. 7 for sanity in your school boards.
If you are a candidate for either your state or district school board and want our endorsement, please fill out our form [here.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/be6774b5-87db-4608-a94b-004b42ec2d28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4487148e-e8e8-4673-b069-6a37fca67c82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
