clean_body: | Friend, Democrats in Washington named me a top target and have launched a massive campaign against me. They have already spent over $700,000 on TV ads attacking me this year! The election is still 15 months away. Far-left donors are funding these misleading television ads and distorting the truth about my conservative voting record. I can promise you this -- I won't back down. I will keep working to get our economy back on track, secure the border, and hold the Biden Administration accountable. But I need your help. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Kash Patel
subject: This J6 news will make your jaw drop
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2994d6bb89d0488889b39e2ca600246d&_e=vnr4_QfwdSvsE37TGL3FR-D0I4no_Cc8wgAuwfnaaVsaw5eQOGpIDmdnOIYJQ7R6kaL57hERPHEgkcAEDKS_7dxh_3nblWnX-I5SgCnIynlBmM8oE-y17c5b4GBEux30Eu18Zat1Isrq0V-lVgi5rdNkbAw0azME6aQE8L7Zph1VU0mPSOzny8E-xTOvN-b5IXdBGrdAxQV0vHWgZECtBi10MqbMN5RbQOXx_NuriCv_fMWQzvF6RhLBuhdDX5Env6lugZLHS87xDtjwF6TC7g%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2994d6bb89d0488889b39e2ca600246d&_e=vnr4_QfwdSvsE37TGL3FR-D0I4no_Cc8wgAuwfnaaVsaw5eQOGpIDmdnOIYJQ7R6kaL57hERPHEgkcAEDKS_7dxh_3nblWnX-I5SgCnIynlBmM8oE-y17c5b4GBEux30uGY-lDfATEmkI-J8A_yvgxbmnVJZ3f8TebwaoxcADDObBEBZKr7KiKDf5uuyy56VwNyzBspnOtXUsuB7okaEwIDaJLQnHOh0pFwdtjYI84MB9F9rDcpjV1EYikhJJdsK48ytbj_io6M_GvDPi5b9bg%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2994d6bb89d0488889b39e2ca600246d&_e=vnr4_QfwdSvsE37TGL3FR-D0I4no_Cc8wgAuwfnaaVsaw5eQOGpIDmdnOIYJQ7R6kaL57hERPHEgkcAEDKS_7dxh_3nblWnX-I5SgCnIynlBmM8oE-y17c5b4GBEux300Aan-yGEGqc4XEcP9JoII0vh1avQVzKYDAnKQhCOhbKq13xRJtQXL10Cthrto4oQZFibS4_EyXe6reHXX1hT2uU4XJCAin1URzaqtr5XCmuyVAAcGIC216gyeg0IQfNlXvWTmtMPjX_cOhZqfdF9UA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? name: David Horowitz
subject: Barrack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock you or scare you -- _I say it because it 's true._ _ _ _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck._ It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ** ** **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** ** ** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - the largest magazine of the radical Left.**** I marched,**** I wrote manifestos, and I attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam, and my eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center to**** fight the Left, and dedicated my life to exposing them. ** ** I did it because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ - and I want you to receive your very own copy of it. **[Today, I'm asking you to stand by me, and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f84c152d752c479eac200256a9076732&_e=yUXafgCmI08VOgZ6n09_zx5i5um7DJgrM7c2rhI5qoV6og1xduqiSMEtbyfMJCNw3fXbPwaAr1fM3Osk6DZQLZ-PGj5TM7WLdNJl-CzeOinTInsaAO-mDkx7qx6TEUoldNAQ9Hptno-dFEbq6AIJy-yFooWarXKRL4Qjcn9g8foBb2MBIX8hMK1A_6ELKz0qpthApffSbpnBjUjV_os3wxXKimYZH-vWYm0hh228FJt3C1UaqwIRiHde-1m14rp4Aj935104gpss8Xg_B2U-EDyZf3NqCFRbTpHIYpuqhIF_OpWHlpxevKRpTztjRqnUuOoEFPL-jKPdjyzEGM-Czi2aHX1jotnQYbezlqkLVg_SctLMpXXyBgLqDCN828tni6mFA5Xfq0-qHOcONmM1nw%3D%3D) And as a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of my book: _The Enemy Within._** When you think of The Enemy Within, you may think of Joe Biden, or Nancy Pelosi, or Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. **But make no mistake: the real mastermind is and always has been Barack Obama.** Because he laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. _ _ _He led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police doing their jobs._ _ _ _He championed the castration of our military, making us a laughing stock on the world stage._ _ _ _And he was even the real mastermind behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt._ The devastation and destruction we're seeing today has been over a decade in the making - and most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. I spent 6 months writing _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain what is happening in this battle now - how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of the country... ...how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state, and to cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... [ripped headline images] **" A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza** ** ** **" The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin** ** ** **" David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham** I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because we've reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[So if you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f84c152d752c479eac200256a9076732&_e=yUXafgCmI08VOgZ6n09_zx5i5um7DJgrM7c2rhI5qoV6og1xduqiSMEtbyfMJCNw3fXbPwaAr1fM3Osk6DZQLZ-PGj5TM7WLdNJl-CzeOinTInsaAO-mDkx7qx6TEUoldNAQ9Hptno-dFEbq6AIJy-yFooWarXKRL4Qjcn9g8foBb2MBIX8hMK1A_6ELKz0qpthApffSbpnBjUjV_os3wxXKimYZH-vWYm0hh228FJt3C1UaqwIRiHde-1m14rp4L2ddnM7ZDaqsSI2Br5jZLprf3bWfOnxhYxOXTOssC-kJvg6E0TPjO8gtf3tn4rB5nlA62iK_mkJVSiB8FZvQm4qmrae53L2QrsDgtJi-EO2-ddmjq-zXfowTTL_Sj29Ftb03WdH4be-APZ7_gnY05g%3D%3D)** and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy _The Enemy Within._ Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make it better -- they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform [it]." **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. [**Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today** ,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f84c152d752c479eac200256a9076732&_e=yUXafgCmI08VOgZ6n09_zx5i5um7DJgrM7c2rhI5qoV6og1xduqiSMEtbyfMJCNw3fXbPwaAr1fM3Osk6DZQLZ-PGj5TM7WLdNJl-CzeOinTInsaAO-mDkx7qx6TEUoldNAQ9Hptno-dFEbq6AIJy-yFooWarXKRL4Qjcn9g8foBb2MBIX8hMK1A_6ELKz0qpthApffSbpnBjUjV_os3wxXKimYZH-vWYm0hh228FJt3C1UaqwIRiHde-1m14rp4-GI_eU1vk93GGdIlrE0FMDB1cix4NbKRQDTAhP2QULAbtZHPTXRqCVilsB3sd-PUnSfLnC07isZ8025zDgcFrZBwu9ee_nqp22MTUX7h9_EldVVImrAgtvKISpIWh8L529Smp6k8GNHwYRHiBP9ESQ%3D%3D) and as a thank you for your generous support, I'll reserve a complimentary copy of my book _The Enemy Within_ for you, explaining this in depth.

[ripped headline images] " A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza " The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin " David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because I knew that if America stood a chance, Americans had to understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I wrote The Enemy Within because I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. I wrote The Enemy Within because we've reached the point in our history that will decide our future -- and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot, I will send you a complimentary copy The Enemy Within. Friend, the Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make it better -- they want to destroy it and make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform [it]." And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to show our fellow Americans who they really are and what they really want while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking, and our country is hanging by a thread. and as a thank you for your generous support, I'll reserve a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within for you, explaining this in depth. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. body:
Please take our quick issues survey
#
[**Friends - can you take a moment to complete our official August priorities survey for The Long Run?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230807_priorities_survey/?source=em230807-1-t1&refcode2=4714.196590.GiOPwX&t=1&akid=4714%2E196590%2EGiOPwX)

As we gear up for the election year, we are deciding which critical races we want to leave our mark on so Mandela and The Long Run need to hear directly from you about the priorities you care about most. Your authentic input is what makes this movement powerful and meaningful.
We need to hear what issues, races, and candidates you would like us to prioritize because as much as we want to, we cannot fight for every candidate that needs support right away.
So what you share today _will directly inform our decisions._ The more people who weigh in, the better Mandela and The Long Run can understand what's top of mind for people across the country.
We want to make sure your voice is heard, loud and clear, before making any key decisions. [**So please take a minute to take our quick priorities survey today.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230807_priorities_survey/?source=em230807-1-t1&refcode2=4714.196590.GiOPwX&t=3&akid=4714%2E196590%2EGiOPwX)

Thank you in advance for taking the time to share your input today.
The team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=4714%2E196590%2EGiOPwX). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4714%2E196590%2EGiOPwX)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=4714_196590_GiOPwX&akid=4714%2E196590%2EGiOPwX)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=8&akid=4714%2E196590%2EGiOPwX)

Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Peter,

**[Today, we’re asking for $8 to help us keep Colorado 8th District blue and flip the House of Representatives. It may not seem like much, but $8 helps supercharge our operation and support Democrat Yadira Caraveo in a tough district>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67721063/420637663/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.07_b1_chq_30do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDYwMTA3MS00MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvXYPL_t2TYaXhyycfX4RRBp3mVDTqOPbTa2mS4X6oE=)**

We rely on grassroots supporters like you at every point of the election cycle to supercharge our campaign.

It may seem early, Peter, but **the path of House control will run directly through CO-08**. As we write this, our team is making critical decisions that could make-or-break our chances next November.

**[Your $8 can help us meet our critical digital fundraising goals](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67721064/420637664/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.07_b1_chq_30do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDYwMTA3MS00MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvXYPL_t2TYaXhyycfX4RRBp3mVDTqOPbTa2mS4X6oE=)** \- which will help us lay down the campaign infrastructure we need to bring this home next November.

Peter: this race will be one of the closest races in the country. Last year, Yadira won by just 1,632 votes. Already, there’s an anti-abortion extremist in the race against Yadira, so we can’t afford to slow down now.

**[Can you pitch in just $8 to keep Colorado’s 8th district blue? It would mean the world to Yadira!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67721065/420637665/535544092?amount=8&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.07_b1_chq_30do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDYwMTA3MS00MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OvXYPL_t2TYaXhyycfX4RRBp3mVDTqOPbTa2mS4X6oE=)**

name: Team Gottheimer
subject: Now there’s more work to be done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | This is a huge win for Jersey! The cost of Insulin is now capped at $35 a month for our seniors on Medicare, supporting thousands of Fifth District seniors.

Josh is proud to have supported the _Inflation Reduction Act_ last year in Congress. Getting this signed into law not only provides fantastic healthcare benefits, but also does not raise taxes one penny on Jersey families or small business.

But while this is a huge win, there is still more work to be done. That is why we are now calling on the Senate to pass the _Affordable Insulin Now Act_ , to cap the price of insulin at $35 a month for all Americans, not just seniors on Medicare.

[Will you add your name to call on Congress to pass a $35 insulin cap for all Americans with diabetes?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67721319/420638268/-1441648506?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230807_pt_insulincap_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRjYWJiYy00MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZT15oIntWgZG_SNQUhCjtRLh1BeSscveRY3kDLrD4g=&emci=6603672f-9e30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=5c4cabbc-4135-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)

This piece of bipartisan legislation is life-saving for the adults and children, in New Jersey and across the country, suffering from diabetes every single day. Now is the time to put aside our differences and work together to pass this crucial piece of legislation – and ensure all Americans with private health insurance can benefit from this insulin cap, no matter their age.

[Sign on now and with Josh in support of the _Affordable Insulin Now Act!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67721324/420638271/-1441648506?source=EM_NBI_JG_20230807_pt_insulincap_0_1MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_insulin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzRjYWJiYy00MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aZT15oIntWgZG_SNQUhCjtRLh1BeSscveRY3kDLrD4g=&emci=6603672f-9e30-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=5c4cabbc-4135-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)

Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. clean_body: | | This is a huge win for Jersey! The cost of Insulin is now capped at $35 a month for our seniors on Medicare, supporting thousands of Fifth District seniors. Josh is proud to have supported the Inflation Reduction Act last year in Congress. Getting this signed into law not only provides fantastic healthcare benefits, but also does not raise taxes one penny on Jersey families or small business. But while this is a huge win, there is still more work to be done. That is why we are now calling on the Senate to pass the Affordable Insulin Now Act , to cap the price of insulin at $35 a month for all Americans, not just seniors on Medicare. | This piece of bipartisan legislation is life-saving for the adults and children, in New Jersey and across the country, suffering from diabetes every single day. Now is the time to put aside our differences and work together to pass this crucial piece of legislation – and ensure all Americans with private health insurance can benefit from this insulin cap, no matter their age. Thank you, Team Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

name: Ryan Zinke [MT-01]
subject: I thought it best if you heard it from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
They think you are all bark & no bite.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv6dofrtva2p8dgfifelb9cdo9vdh9dj721hqlh0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c5gm8p32c9h2bs)
---
Friend,

Democrats and their overlords on Wall Street are so filthy rich, they think that people like you and me are all bark & no bite.

They spend all of their time in the swamp, living like royalty & raising millions for their campaigns while folks like us get stuck with the tab.

But I spent most of my life in war zones.

And when I joined the Navy, I took an oath to defend America & I have every intention of upholding that very oath in all that I do.

Right now that way is by defending our House Majority & sending Joe Biden back to retirement in one of his many mansions on the east coast.

If I've learned one thing- it's that the last place you ever want to be standing is between a Democrat & political power.

And as a Navy SEAL- there is nothing I won't do & no place I won't go to defend our great nation.
---

# [Don’t let Trump move his trial from DC to West Virginia](https://default.salsalabs.org/T419034fb-09c4-476f-a1ab-ade5ae069319/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12dbfd4d-f908-4834-8417-ed05f314bfe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump and his attorneys are pushing [hard](https://default.salsalabs.org/T563a335b-70cd-4326-93f2-54a551cc130f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to move his trial for 2020 election crimes from DC to West Virginia—and there's no way in hell we should let that happen. **Trump's crimes were committed in DC, and that's where his trial should take place—something the 6th amendment to the constitution makes clear.** Trump is clearly hoping to move the trial to a state he won overwhelmingly, but that's not his call to make. Defendants charged with crimes don't get to cherry-pick their venues. Trump's is set to be tried in DC, and that's where his trial should remain. [**Add your name, and tell federal officials to reject Trump's call to move the trial to West Virginia.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te330f244-2e91-4179-929b-2eab13f63d40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Getting people out to vote in Michigan is especially important in 2024. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvNVS7Xu2nvRcghSFYLGisyAqRRLb6geyw-fJVLj22i5jNcDdSMpE5TCN4jxwrlZfc7bRN1QBs01Sg1DCyoMPNILDMgEyq6YuiaKSmqjQl5emXLnrmGR5Nb0rztZneQR8L3VXPZ8253hypNMp6SE5lQQ/3yj/bHWTrnmYQqufwtAt7Syh9g/h0/wxETR7t9J0IdXvqJBecvyO6TLPDd4swEDdI9vKGHmLU)

Friend, With one year until Michigan’s 2024 August primary, we’re gearing up to launch our field campaign for Rashida Tlaib’s re-election to Congress. When we turn out people to vote in Rashida’s district, we’re turning out some of the most progressive voters in Michigan. Our voter education and election protection efforts have helped secure important statewide victories, such as protecting abortion rights in the state Constitution and ensuring that Democrats now lead the state government. **Getting people out to vote in Michigan is especially important next year because 2024 is a presidential election year _and_ Michigan has an open Senate seat. ** **Rashida runs one of the most aggressive and successful Get Out the Vote operations in the state** —so helping build our field campaign now doesn’t just help re-elect Rashida; it helps progressive candidates and issues up and down the ballot. [**Please donate $5 or more today to help us re-elect Rashida and get out the vote in Michigan to protect our rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z5cM0Umj1Y9p8A22ppKIcp2uEl8PbKd_5niZpdCwVQWZb5jaTQCFGgK7hjrERx9qs_8gXXuV0jcLVTJBKZ8iOrBMyydpO0Kh1nG6hCbM5sh2SJwDdsYB2MDTnZ2OCP6tJ5a4wyyiRY_WVYVnaLge9EWpVHZxSmYn35Eey-FplKI-h5ed9hh-FnnuwOYDdbxDoSNmF1GZHRXrHLToBGLDTkS9qFwda1JZ6htpbVGk5oOUYCQI1yPZXpFdEYWCrCxro4CaqIlw1yqhnwRrvMlt3baG121tqLBLXlkZU48WaBbxzpq0XOBPF-S4t7vqljyXg/3yj/bHWTrnmYQqufwtAt7Syh9g/h1/pVSi-vAQhU8LsttXkipBSlh1gwc9eg7RXv9kZr4sJLM) **** | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z5cM0Umj1Y9p8A22ppKIcp2uEl8PbKd_5niZpdCwVQWcH9yBn-C28rI1d3zuLkEZ6oNt_8rrVSBWagT1PLHFfzTl2U8TOjXCjfwORUzuOA4fl08is6gPFf9_Du2dboO1x8_Pd-mNPyqDczD4JHKs4ZMSnWuV0Rgk_YaD8qTEBPdkbWN-Zy8Wc7JV08el79GpTbxkkuBOoVObtzPgb64cRN1LwLE9zm2bFWfRMdwjPwMxuXSNDGRPtzgMJGfVzsTXb9dZ8HxmH37hH43P2Q-eeev-Zx3tE40wEv_FroYT6wlQgB7rrBNCPg0uXEGeSsLp0/3yj/bHWTrnmYQqufwtAt7Syh9g/h2/tzKVCGIHPAo5DxXQqEUtHk-yCzG3PS1_mXDR4HEitGs)

****
Republicans are also trying to take away our fundamental rights to control our own bodies through attacks on abortion and gender-affirming health care. And their attacks on education and diversity initiatives are attempting to whitewash our history.
Just last week, Florida’s Governor—a 2024 presidential candidate—defended his state’s new Black history standards, to teach public school students that enslaved Black people benefited from slavery. This is disgusting white supremacy, and it mirrors right-wing attempts across the country.
**Rashida’s bold voice and outspoken leadership are more critical now than ever. In a recent speech on the House floor, Rashida said:**
> **_“We must teach our children, Mr. Speaker, the truth about our nation’s history. That means reckoning with racism, oppression and lynching, dehumanization and white supremacist violence ... we will not allow anyone to rewrite our history.”_**
[**Please donate $5 or more today to send Rashida back to Congress to fight for us and get out the vote in Michigan to protect our rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z5cM0Umj1Y9p8A22ppKIcp2uEl8PbKd_5niZpdCwVQWc4SOJyfMe2CTmAs7N9K0n1_NSjzGqzhU1TG27dSdoVLZNF9T7zQ6RsabSOHNaT-p-55dCNyRWLzK4NYJBP0avYI0avCjyn3OGWW8sQrWF4R35406EnscPGfbmE_xbgaOcvsIJQd_XeZfbv24YKPc1x-VBp1eYLT1Sxmt4bv5SwEATJBSmH5scrHnm08TuJk3T774sOaqqXrwnrNqeFdkzuWsPNs_5HSlw2lqGHyq_eRmw27ODx1khkwmRjLLu5j3Vcaj7a4b4x9rj-eLmiMgjY/3yj/bHWTrnmYQqufwtAt7Syh9g/h3/qkM14us43QIgPkTOto7pPdzUb5NeWW3jG30xDuYMZbw)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Rashida
Date: Sun, Aug 6, 2023
Subject: help us re-elect Rashida:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Today marks one year until Michigan’s 2024 August primary, and we’re gearing up to launch our campaign for Rashida Tlaib’s re-election to Congress.
**Last year, pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC and affiliated PACs spent over $1 million attacking Rashida, flooding her district with misinformation and attack ads to mislead voters.**
We know she’ll be a target again because she keeps standing firm in her values, including putting up the Palestinian flag outside her office in Congress and telling the truth about Israel’s apartheid government. She keeps putting people first over dark money PACs, corporate polluters, and others influencing politics to maintain the unjust status quo.
**We need to be ready to counter misinformation by bringing Rashida’s message to as many constituents as possible. So we’re building out our field campaign for 2024.** Rashida comes from grassroots activism, and as a public servant deeply rooted in her community, she prioritizes speaking with her constituents directly—from hosting events in her district’s communities to knocking on doors.
**To start expanding our campaign’s field team, we’ve got to start raising money now. Since Rashida doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs, our campaign relies on grassroots donations from people like you.**
[**Can you chip in now for Rashida’s 2024 re-election campaign so she can stay in Congress fighting for all of us?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z5cM0Umj1Y9p8A22ppKIcp2uEl8PbKd_5niZpdCwVQWZzPSPH1jUUEMTJbYtVRZU1Yz05fbSMQpF0XsD_3FMWYf48CM6fW2NnenHP7OFJqqNa1AWSAsCRkkUC4d3aq_-Qw8U9DG2Eoi__f3V5cXXCE2nUyH95GOSnUTzTplE487MJAOc02ymP4p7gJE76WPpiospf913rhcZLnQdUvJ62FZpK0w5wka5g10akRvlTXrLWy3ai_bCioNDpHfs_77aTfF7837_xv3zfGUddAhbSHUjHYvt4bys6EO96OYKwpq6Ztb-csV5n0cEQfJi99DqU/3yj/bHWTrnmYQqufwtAt7Syh9g/h10/F4peeocE_FiXGEA-lLXw2DqNEMfbn7nIHA6jLKaeaTs)

When we turn out people to vote in Rashida’s district, we’re turning out some of the most progressive voters in Michigan.
**As a swing state, Michigan’s been targeted by right-wing voter suppression—especially the Black and brown voters in and around Detroit.**
But with our voter education and election protection efforts, we’ve helped elect not only Rashida but other progressives—and we’ve helped secure important statewide victories such as protecting abortion rights in the state Constitution. Now, Democrats lead the state government in Michigan, which has led to important policy wins.
**Getting people out to vote in Michigan is especially important next year, since 2024 is a presidential election year and Michigan has an open Senate seat.**
Rashida led the fight to get Trump impeached twice, and we helped vote him out of office. He just got indicted again, but it doesn’t seem to matter to his supporters. Now, we are up against increasingly fascist Republican presidential candidates hell-bent on taking away our freedoms, dividing us, and ruling over us rather than representing us.
For example, Florida’s Governor has attacked trans and queer people and is now defending Florida’s Board of Education, which just approved new Black history standards so that public school students will be taught that enslaved Black people benefited from slavery. **This is disgusting white supremacy.**
Attempts to ban books and whitewash our history are happening across the country. And Republicans are also planning to ban abortion nationwide.
**Rashida’s bold voice and outspoken leadership are more critical now than ever, and it’s also more important than ever to turn out the vote in Michigan.**

When we turn out people to vote in Rashida’s district, we’re turning out some of the most progressive voters in Michigan. Our voter education and election protection efforts have helped secure important statewide victories, such as protecting abortion rights in the state Constitution and ensuring that Democrats now lead the state government. Getting people out to vote in Michigan is especially important next year because 2024 is a presidential election year and Michigan has an open Senate seat. Rashida runs one of the most aggressive and successful Get Out the Vote operations in the state —so helping build our field campaign now doesn’t just help re-elect Rashida; it helps progressive candidates and issues up and down the ballot. ** | Republicans are also trying to take away our fundamental rights to control our own bodies through attacks on abortion and gender-affirming health care. And their attacks on education and diversity initiatives are attempting to whitewash our history. Just last week, Florida’s Governor—a 2024 presidential candidate—defended his state’s new Black history standards, to teach public school students that enslaved Black people benefited from slavery. This is disgusting white supremacy, and it mirrors right-wing attempts across the country. Rashida’s bold voice and outspoken leadership are more critical now than ever. In a recent speech on the House floor, Rashida said: “We must teach our children, Mr. Speaker, the truth about our nation’s history. That means reckoning with racism, oppression and lynching, dehumanization and white supremacist violence ... we will not allow anyone to rewrite our history.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for joining Rashida in the fight for justice for all. Last year, pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC and affiliated PACs spent over $1 million attacking Rashida, flooding her district with misinformation and attack ads to mislead voters. We know she’ll be a target again because she keeps standing firm in her values, including putting up the Palestinian flag outside her office in Congress and telling the truth about Israel’s apartheid government. She keeps putting people first over dark money PACs, corporate polluters, and others influencing politics to maintain the unjust status quo. We need to be ready to counter misinformation by bringing Rashida’s message to as many constituents as possible. So we’re building out our field campaign for 2024. Rashida comes from grassroots activism, and as a public servant deeply rooted in her community, she prioritizes speaking with her constituents directly—from hosting events in her district’s communities to knocking on doors. To start expanding our campaign’s field team, we’ve got to start raising money now. Since Rashida doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs, our campaign relies on grassroots donations from people like you. When we turn out people to vote in Rashida’s district, we’re turning out some of the most progressive voters in Michigan. As a swing state, Michigan’s been targeted by right-wing voter suppression—especially the Black and brown voters in and around Detroit. But with our voter education and election protection efforts, we’ve helped elect not only Rashida but other progressives—and we’ve helped secure important statewide victories such as protecting abortion rights in the state Constitution. Now, Democrats lead the state government in Michigan, which has led to important policy wins. Getting people out to vote in Michigan is especially important next year, since 2024 is a presidential election year and Michigan has an open Senate seat. Rashida led the fight to get Trump impeached twice, and we helped vote him out of office. He just got indicted again, but it doesn’t seem to matter to his supporters. Now, we are up against increasingly fascist Republican presidential candidates hell-bent on taking away our freedoms, dividing us, and ruling over us rather than representing us. For example, Florida’s Governor has attacked trans and queer people and is now defending Florida’s Board of Education, which just approved new Black history standards so that public school students will be taught that enslaved Black people benefited from slavery. This is disgusting white supremacy. Attempts to ban books and whitewash our history are happening across the country. And Republicans are also planning to ban abortion nationwide. Rashida’s bold voice and outspoken leadership are more critical now than ever, and it’s also more important than ever to turn out the vote in Michigan. name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Endorsement Alert: Meggan Kiel for Memphis City Council
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
August 7, 2023
Dear Friend,
TVP is pleased to announce our endorsement of Meggan Kiel for Memphis City Council District 5.
Meggan is a lifelong Memphian who has invested in our community tenfold as an educator, advocate, and connector. She's led in some of Memphis' most active advocacy organizations, including MICAH, MIFA, and Facing History and Ourselves.
We've seen Meggan lead on issues like public transportation, criminal justice reform, and college-readiness with tenacity and a vision. Her advocacy has resulted in more opportunity and collaboration in our city.
We have full confidence in her leadership on the City Council will bring even more unity and opportunity for all Memphians.
HELP TVP SUPPORT MEGGAN KIEL FOR CITY COUNCIL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpforkiel]
Meggan's ability to unite diverse voices and her unwavering commitment to Memphis's progress position her as the advocate we need. However, taking on the status quo is a challenge, and she needs our support.
You can learn more about Meggan here [https://www.megganformemphis.com/] . We hope you'll join TVP to rally behind Meggan and the leadership District 5 deserves. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpforkiel]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

clean_body: [] August 7, 2023 Dear Friend, TVP is pleased to announce our endorsement of Meggan Kiel for Memphis City Council District 5. Meggan is a lifelong Memphian who has invested in our community tenfold as an educator, advocate, and connector. She's led in some of Memphis' most active advocacy organizations, including MICAH, MIFA, and Facing History and Ourselves. We've seen Meggan lead on issues like public transportation, criminal justice reform, and college-readiness with tenacity and a vision. Her advocacy has resulted in more opportunity and collaboration in our city. We have full confidence in her leadership on the City Council will bring even more unity and opportunity for all Memphians. HELP TVP SUPPORT MEGGAN KIEL FOR CITY COUNCIL [] Meggan's ability to unite diverse voices and her unwavering commitment to Memphis's progress position her as the advocate we need. However, taking on the status quo is a challenge, and she needs our support. You can learn more about Meggan here [] . We hope you'll join TVP to rally behind Meggan and the leadership District 5 deserves. subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15fb983d6f5f4f15a33712a04823344a&_e=9FFV9MWYBFkhSx6qbfkKArtkJz5C0r1Ap5-pPnOmJDvHsHRBrxyKfW98FPhv5NoZHZnmhG-PaWULRssGYfmT5q11isqmVcKBZdJguOXBl6ATO492kWRID2rnXMQxJasJoTE2Ii-Ux_zdooJMGyHmSacMpu9WILRbmnEMm1b89j6IY82fx4zzVO_Ax2BF8b5PvkSCCER_lYnnHaVJ-YAjvkiVfCAxqtc7cw-BWWvaNjv7iGtcXevfJuYY7ds7ow5gHtYJaFfncPh2zXvpU-86Cky4pO-vLAQAJtOv55wIXNWB0AgkjPhlLu8VxaPKIBmKhbk_Or4oNcErcomCjexNSZhsS4dt_znkkxlWELzDOo5hIvAGxQsH4f9Ns4b-RlUNGR1J-RQNlzvSaRwanuzv3nx-Ci79oYBbbeiQ_-hLnrw%3D)

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15fb983d6f5f4f15a33712a04823344a&_e=9FFV9MWYBFkhSx6qbfkKArtkJz5C0r1Ap5-pPnOmJDvHsHRBrxyKfW98FPhv5NoZHZnmhG-PaWULRssGYfmT5q11isqmVcKBZdJguOXBl6ATO492kWRID2rnXMQxJasJoTE2Ii-Ux_zdooJMGyHmSacMpu9WILRbmnEMm1b89j6IY82fx4zzVO_Ax2BF8b5PvkSCCER_lYnnHaVJ-YAjvkiVfCAxqtc7cw-BWWvaNjv7iGtcXevfJuYY7ds7ow5gHtYJaFfncPh2zXvpU-86CrivljlqZwJ7OYcdr3gf90QG_sCjo7e7pmTk030uxId9eAZSdmf3g0pPx1aUofxqiITSZM47brWvFDXI8ULdtW95TmqK3IdbU2RjD0XmPMxtd91fKDW-U7bhQB2s52HYf0EAr-cz11pV6PdgkkPbDJE%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15fb983d6f5f4f15a33712a04823344a&_e=9FFV9MWYBFkhSx6qbfkKArtkJz5C0r1Ap5-pPnOmJDvHsHRBrxyKfW98FPhv5NoZHZnmhG-PaWULRssGYfmT5q11isqmVcKBZdJguOXBl6ATO492kWRID2rnXMQxJasJoTE2Ii-Ux_zdooJMGyHmSacMpu9WILRbmnEMm1b89j6IY82fx4zzVO_Ax2BF8b5PvkSCCER_lYnnHaVJ-YAjvkiVfCAxqtc7cw-BWWvaNjv7iGtcXevfJuYY7ds7ow5gHtYJaFfncPh2zXvpU-86CgY75sh2kacVn7LE4CywgAKZfHAjuyq6hsVa0h34Zt09MoTkxtke7NZrb4U8QAGnYaD_K2-dgT6nxwiBR4i8EjY9C-h2Jky1idTpY69INQ6TGOcRbjSp_N2M5WTsxy-DQwTsjLdCaZ78BkDIEtIeHsw%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15fb983d6f5f4f15a33712a04823344a&_e=9FFV9MWYBFkhSx6qbfkKArtkJz5C0r1Ap5-pPnOmJDvHsHRBrxyKfW98FPhv5NoZHZnmhG-PaWULRssGYfmT5q11isqmVcKBZdJguOXBl6ATO492kWRID2rnXMQxJasJoTE2Ii-Ux_zdooJMGyHmSacMpu9WILRbmnEMm1b89j6IY82fx4zzVO_Ax2BF8b5PvkSCCER_lYnnHaVJ-YAjvkiVfCAxqtc7cw-BWWvaNjv7iGtcXevfJuYY7ds7ow5gHtYJaFfncPh2zXvpU-86CvKkb6XBj0hSjr68BbtPAYbpp-gB88eEtZVupyZvwvZFNKuToM7OgErzg790xP24qgM963LNm6fAFqpOwztVCVjyQ2fv19UT_ejiPoVqokCLq9uBhqldttFcu2fYzGXJB_mgk_iocKgYLmGMufUEgdE%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15fb983d6f5f4f15a33712a04823344a&_e=9FFV9MWYBFkhSx6qbfkKArtkJz5C0r1Ap5-pPnOmJDvHsHRBrxyKfW98FPhv5NoZHZnmhG-PaWULRssGYfmT5q11isqmVcKBZdJguOXBl6ATO492kWRID2rnXMQxJasJoTE2Ii-Ux_zdooJMGyHmSacMpu9WILRbmnEMm1b89j6IY82fx4zzVO_Ax2BF8b5PvkSCCER_lYnnHaVJ-YAjvkiVfCAxqtc7cw-BWWvaNjv7iGtcXevfJuYY7ds7ow5gHtYJaFfncPh2zXvpU-86CqOvedvJH5hPzy9Y2iA3bsDTUmp6aRDfE2JdKpvCsPyaDjbQn-C62Y8cVUXkWjyiJmj76x9ynhWI8Cn6RSEnU7U-VJYpjpq-axXioHTC_jkWrbjnisS-6HVLgeMtcI5O53r1Kpkz8TxihrfSoyAM6Bw%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**Meet Ron DeSantis**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
Today is Purple Heart Day – an opportunity for us to honor and reflect on the sacrifice of those who have been killed or injured in service of our country. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67726235/420644613/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230807_fr_redwhiteblue_cand_sm_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY0ZmM5N2QtNDQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3a_jU0WMgEVZsuzXeP3ClaEO501YUXXRZZ2cCg-0wdI=)
---
Dear Peter, Today is Purple Heart Day – an opportunity for us to honor and reflect on the sacrifice of those who have been killed or injured in service of our country. I’ve written out some of my thoughts on the topic – and about what does and doesn’t matter when someone you love is serving in the line of duty. I hope you’ll take a moment to read them:
* * *
When you stand next to the gravesite of a person who has given their life for this county, there is the deepest understanding that our love for country - for each other - matters more than any political party. When my husband Matt was in the Marines, one of the greatest comforts I had as a military spouse when he deployed to war was that he was surrounded by a family of warriors who had his back - our back- no matter what: no matter where we came from, no matter how we worshiped, no matter what our political party affiliation was. And, when not everyone came home, **we were there for each other**. And it didn’t matter if someone was a Democrat or Republican or Libertarian or simply non-political. **America is about the red, white, AND blue – not red OR blue.** Leaders like Rep. Bergman have decided a political party is more important than the people–or country-they represent. **But there are more of us than there are of them. And, the tide is turning.** We know that America is stronger as a whole than she is in her parts. And, **it is going to take all of us** to move _forward_. **I'm not running to represent the red or blue parts of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. I'm running to represent _all_ of it.** Not the special interests. Not a political party. But the PEOPLE. [**And that's how I'm running this campaign, too. I'm counting on regular folks – like you – pitching in what they can when they can. Which is why I'm asking if you'll donate $5 or more right now**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67726243/420644632/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230807_fr_redwhiteblue_cand_sm_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjY0ZmM5N2QtNDQzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3a_jU0WMgEVZsuzXeP3ClaEO501YUXXRZZ2cCg-0wdI=). | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Today is Purple Heart Day – an opportunity for us to honor and reflect on the sacrifice of those who have been killed or injured in service of our country. | = Dear Peter, Today is Purple Heart Day – an opportunity for us to honor and reflect on the sacrifice of those who have been killed or injured in service of our country. I’ve written out some of my thoughts on the topic – and about what does and doesn’t matter when someone you love is serving in the line of duty. I hope you’ll take a moment to read them: When you stand next to the gravesite of a person who has given their life for this county, there is the deepest understanding that our love for country - for each other - matters more than any political party. When my husband Matt was in the Marines, one of the greatest comforts I had as a military spouse when he deployed to war was that he was surrounded by a family of warriors who had his back - our back- no matter what: no matter where we came from, no matter how we worshiped, no matter what our political party affiliation was. And, when not everyone came home, we were there for each other. And it didn’t matter if someone was a Democrat or Republican or Libertarian or simply non-political. America is about the red, white, AND blue – not red OR blue. Leaders like Rep. Bergman have decided a political party is more important than the people–or country-they represent. But there are more of us than there are of them. And, the tide is turning. We know that America is stronger as a whole than she is in her parts. And, it is going to take all of us to move forward. I'm not running to represent the red or blue parts of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. I'm running to represent all of it. Not the special interests. Not a political party. But the PEOPLE. =. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Every little bit truly helps build the strong campaign we need to win. Thank you, Callie Barr | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. subject: [Sign My Petition] Join the fight against banned books

body:
This fight is personal for me!
| | |
---
| | **URGENT: Book bans have been reported in 32 states**
---
I'm counting on **_5,000_** fearless fighters to sign my petition before **_11:59 p.m._** tonight to take a stand against book bans:
---
**[Will you add your name to my petition right now to fight against book bans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67726392/420645045/-1927733697?code=jtk1152-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-Book-Ban-Survey%3Fcode%3Djtk1152-su-nd&refcode=jtk1152-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ0MzU4YS00NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEQtHlYetp8ppI1NiY9TuqJ0bEp4qi8kAz4imz76dBo=&emci=f74a1303-4232-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=31d4358a-4435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

| | [Add My Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67726393/420645046/-1927733697?code=jtk1152-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-Book-Ban-Survey%3Fcode%3Djtk1152-su-nd&refcode=jtk1152-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ0MzU4YS00NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEQtHlYetp8ppI1NiY9TuqJ0bEp4qi8kAz4imz76dBo=&emci=f74a1303-4232-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=31d4358a-4435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, the most recent attacks on books and libraries are not only alarming – they're also heartbreaking. Because for me, this fight is personal.
You see, I've always loved to read. As a kid, I spent my summers in the library, where I could escape the oppressive heat of Brooklyn and instead spend hours wandering through stacks of well-worn books until I found exactly the right one.
It was in books like _Sweet Justice _that I learned about the fight for progress and began to see myself as someone capable of not only continuing the fight, but of instituting lasting change.
**Peter, I am the woman I am today because of the books I've read along the way – but tragically, far-right lawmakers across the nation have banned the same books that changed the trajectory of my life. And in Florida, Missouri, South Carolina, Texas, and Utah, _hundreds_ of books have been BANNED.**
How many people won't realize their true passions because formative books about social justice and history are _banned_ in their state? How many people will go through their lives feeling alone because books that discuss sexuality, gender identity, and racism are forbidden?
Peter, through paranoid attacks on "critical race theory," attempts to defund libraries, and outright book bans, far-right lawmakers are attempting to silence our next generation of fearless fighters before they've even had a chance to grow up.
**I've always been committed to the fight for progress, but this time, the attack on books is **_personal_**. That's why I'm fighting to STOP these bans on books, and I'm counting on you to join me. I'm hoping to get 5,000 responses on my petition before midnight tonight, so please:**
**[Will you add your name to my petition now to stand against far-right book bans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67726394/420645047/-1927733697?code=jtk1152-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-Book-Ban-Survey%3Fcode%3Djtk1152-su-nd&refcode=jtk1152-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ0MzU4YS00NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEQtHlYetp8ppI1NiY9TuqJ0bEp4qi8kAz4imz76dBo=&emci=f74a1303-4232-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=31d4358a-4435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add My Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67726395/420645048/-1927733697?code=jtk1152-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-Book-Ban-Survey%3Fcode%3Djtk1152-su-nd&refcode=jtk1152-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ0MzU4YS00NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEQtHlYetp8ppI1NiY9TuqJ0bEp4qi8kAz4imz76dBo=&emci=f74a1303-4232-ee11-b8f0-00224832e1ba&emdi=31d4358a-4435-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you,

Letitia
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

---

| | | | | | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMDgwN19BRS1TUE8uMTA0MTQxX3QxMzcyMzQ1LTIyOTkmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVNQTy4xMDQxNDFfdDEzNzIzNDUtMjI5OSJ9/KwqnzmAyqvFqCMCgXbGJiQ)

Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a “white nationalist Latina” and a “self-hating Latina.”

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don’t buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they’ll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won’t stop until they permanently destroy me. They’re leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](http://trk.secureandprosper._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMDgwN19BRS1TUE8uMTA0MTQxX3QxMzcyMzQ1LTIyOTkmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVNQTy4xMDQxNDFfdDEzNzIzNDUtMjI5OSJ9/LewC2YFYq_IbVc9eqhYANw)

Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn’t ask you to donate if it truly wasn’t important.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](http://trk.secureandprosper._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTMwJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMDgwN19BRS1TUE8uMTA0MTQxX3QxMzcyMzQ1LTIyOTkmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVNQTy4xMDQxNDFfdDEzNzIzNDUtMjI5OSJ9/08vnXf6eW2w_b3-lch9ZYw)

With great respect & admiration,
Mayra Flores

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
This is serious. | | |
---
| | | I’m at my wits’ end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I’m one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can’t beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMTktNTdlZWE5MjA1OTE0NGQ4ZThlNGMwODY4NTA1OGY0NTgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vemlua2UtZm9yLWNvbmdyZXNzLzItc2VuZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVJBTk8uMTAzMTU3X3QxMzcyMDUzLTIwODEmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVJBTk8uMTAzMTU3X3QxMzcyMDUzLTIwODEifQ/02AXFqFiSnQmMLbj2SPZtQ)
---

So, I’m going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMTktNTdlZWE5MjA1OTE0NGQ4ZThlNGMwODY4NTA1OGY0NTgiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vemlua2UtZm9yLWNvbmdyZXNzLzItc2VuZC8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVJBTk8uMTAzMTU3X3QxMzcyMDUzLTIwODEmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjMwODA3X0FFLVJBTk8uMTAzMTU3X3QxMzcyMDUzLTIwODEifQ/spQETz_pdXxnH8JqGwZOCw "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden’s plan to destroy our nation.

I’m humbly asking you, as a warrior who’s fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---

Ryan Zinke

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana’s Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. name: =?utf-8?Q?Russ=20Vought?=
subject: This is what real political persecution looks like
body:
Jeff’s good name has been slandered, maligned, and dragged through the mud. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10384795?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Faux victimhood is everywhere in Washington. But when you see r _eal political persecution_ of your friend and colleague, it’s unmistakable and frankly, terrifying.

Last week the _Washington Post_ released a [hit piece](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=02cf0407ca&e=17913c7d6d) on the Center for Renewing America’s Jeffrey Clark for his election integrity work in Trump’s Justice Department in 2020 and ongoing efforts to expose corruption in the Biden Administration.

**It’s the culmination of a campaign by the Department of Justice and their leftist media allies that has resulted in :**

→ Jeff’s good name being slandered, maligned, and dragged through the mud.
→ His home being raided by the DOJ in the pre-dawn hours.
→ Harassment from the Jan. 6 kangaroo court committee in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=efac7074bd&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| **Of course, Jeff took the latest attack in stride**. It’s what happens when you expose naked corruption in Washington.

But that didn’t stop my team at the Center from hitting back, calling out the DOJ and Post for their shameful character assassination of him, and thankfully, seeing some of the fiercest conservatives in Congress publicly come to Jeff’s side.

We released this [statement](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=03b1fc3831&e=17913c7d6d), which was retweeted by Rep. Matt Gaetz and other America First leaders, concerning the DOJ’s targeting of Jeff.
---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=df5b40be98&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| If you recall, last year we brought Jeff onto the Center as a senior fellow after I served with him in the Trump Administration and saw firsthand how he was one of the few senior administration officials willing to fight for the integrity of our election process in the 2020 elections.

Since then, Jeff has had a target on his back from the Washington cartel.
---
|
---
| Friends, if they can do this to Jeff, they can do this to any of us.

The political persecution of my friend Jeffrey Clark is terrifying, but it’s all the more reason to stand up and fight for all Americans who have been taunted, abused, searched, arrested, and locked up by our federal government.

**We’re standing with Jeff, we’re fighting for the rights of all Americans, and we won’t be silenced. **

Your support makes this fight possible, and **[we need all the help we can get](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=3d70718cdd&e=17913c7d6d)**.****
---
| Sincerely,

Russ Vought
President, Center for Renewing America
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=a17e128955&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=42d05c3be0&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | [](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=01a26f991c&e=17913c7d6d)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Center for Renewing America, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
300 Independence Ave. SE
Washington, DC 20003

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=cd24753d02) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=340a9f3c7d&e=17913c7d6d&c=cd24753d02).

Friend,
At a time when the Deep State is out to get to me in full force, I'm turning to the people I trust more than anyone in the world - my grassroots supporters like YOU.
_**I 'm hosting a lovely dinner in Nashville, Tennessee this month - and I'm leaving two chairs open for a grassroots donor and a guest of your choice to join me.**_
At a time when Biden's weaponized Department of "Justice" is trying to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man, there's no one I'd rather be surrounded by than my loyal supporters like YOU.
All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount - _yes, any amount_ - to peacefully defend our movement from the never-ending witch hunts to be automatically entered to win.
