subject: NEWS! Trump indicted, Bernie takes on Big Oil, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Trump in Trouble | Bernie vs. Big Oil | Ohio Abortion
Fight | Bernie Endorses Regunberg | Gilliard for SC Senate | Seattle
Victories | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1011&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

As Donald Trump is indicted for the third time and more charges pile up,
he continues to poll better than at any point in his previous runs and
polls show him tied with President Biden for 2024.

There’s a serious risk we could face another Trump term in 2024 — unless
Democrats are able to deliver tangible results for working people to earn
trust and votes.

That’s why Our Revolution and our allies are working overtime to unify the
progressive movement and focus our pressure on key demands like student
debt relief, an end to medical debt, and urgent climate action.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1012&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Our movement is critical to defeating the far right and advancing
people-centered policies to address the many crises facing our country. If
you’re not already a monthly member of Our Revolution, sign up today!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1013&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/bernie_bigoil_accountable_pt?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1014&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders is leading a charge of Senators calling on the DOJ to
prosecute Big Oil for their decades of lies to deny science and cover up
their climate crimes — all while raking in record profits.

Last year we supported Rep. Ro Khanna as he grilled fossil fuel execs
under oath. Just like Big Tobacco, which has paid $206 billion dollars for
lying to the public about the dangers of smoking, Big Oil is next.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/bernie_bigoil_accountable_pt?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1015&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Stand with Bernie: Tell the Attorney General to prosecute polluters
NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/bernie_bigoil_accountable_pt?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1016&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Meanwhile, as climate chaos rages across the globe, Joe Manchin and his
Big Oil buddies are pushing the President to greenlight more fossil fuel
projects and eyeing upcoming must-pass legislation like the Farm Bill to
sneak in their dirty deals.

Our Revolution and allies like Greenpeace are working together to demand
the Biden Administration to declare a climate emergency and use its power
to stop Big Oil’s climate denial before it’s too late.

We can’t let carbon cronies gut our bedrock environmental laws, exclude
the public from democratic input on projects, and build their polluting
projects anywhere they want.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1017&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

It’s going to take organized grassroots activism to overcome the deep
pockets and ruthless tactics of his corporate overlords.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1018&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Can you chip in to our Climate Action Fund ASAP?? Give now and we’ll
send you our “Stay Cool, Stop Fossil Fuels” drink koozie.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_survey/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1019&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Our Revolution members are taking a stand against student debt. Nine of
our activists spoke courageously at the recent Department of Education
hearing, sharing their stories and demanding action.

“My government is making money off of me,” Our Revolution member Lisa
Rapaszky said at the hearing. Lisa owes more than $30,000 in student loan
debt. “It's just too much.”

Student debt payments are set to restart at the end of next month —
causing economic havoc in the midst of an affordability crisis — and our
movement is ramping up the pressure.

As Ro Khanna explained on our recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9559?t=1020&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Debt Town Hall, President Biden
can still use his executive authority to cancel debt, pause payments, and
crack down on predatory lending practices — and 43 million of us and our
families are counting on it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_survey/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1021&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

"The President should cancel student debt in the Higher Education Act. He
should zero out the accounts,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8875?t=1022&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Ro told us on Monday. “If the Supreme
Court rules against us then let’s see if they’ll actually enforce the
collection of debt that has already been canceled.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/student_debt_survey/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1023&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]You can help! Share your story of how restarting student debt will
affect you and your family.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1024&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Our Rev members in Maryland turned out to show support for One Fair Wage
last week with Montgomery Co. Exec. Marc Elrich and Councilors Will
Jawando and Kristin Mink to uplift the fight for fair wages for restaurant
workers ahead of new legislation to be unveiled next month.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1025&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

In Chicago, Mayor Brandon Johnson joined us for a Server for a Day event
to pass an $18 an hour minimum wage for all workers in the city.

Organizers have worked hard to get these bills on the table, and now we’ve
got one month to make the push and get them passed.

In Ohio and Arizona, Our Revolution has teams canvassing for signatures
for petition drives that will put a $20+ MINIMUM WAGE directly on the
ballot in 2024.

Not only will this motivate our voters to the polls, but it will mean
millions of people getting a long overdue pay raise so they no longer have
to choose between rent and groceries.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1026&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Right now in Ohio, anti-abortion politicians and their billionaire buddies
are trying to change the state constitution with a special election on
Tuesday to block a November ballot measure to protect abortion rights.

They have spent millions in taxpayer dollars to call this special election
to change the rules because they know most Ohioans oppose the state’s
extreme abortion ban and would vote to undo it.

The August 8th special election is being held at the last minute in the
dead of summer in hopes that most folks won’t know it’s happening — so we
must mobilize as many Ohio voters to the polls on Tuesday as possible.

If they’re successful here, this will become the template to tear down
democracy and abortion care in other states. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9544?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1027&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Pitch in a donation to
fund our critical GOTV work in Ohio!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1028&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

More than 650,000 American workers are threatening to go on strike this
summer — or have already done so — in an avalanche of union activity not
seen in the US in decades.

Actors and writers strikes in Hollywood are already a once-in-a-generation
event. And, Unions for United Parcel Service and Detroit’s Big Three
automakers could join them.

“In terms of workers in America who still have the ability to change their
conditions, these are three of the top 10,” Our Revolution Board Chair
Larry Cohen told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9560?t=1029&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Bloomberg.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1030&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

As the 2024 presidential race heats up, Our Revolution is building our war
chest to make sure progressives pick up more House and Senate seats —
including replacing corporatists like Kyrsten Sinema in Arizona.

Our voter mobilization strategy has been battle-tested against billionaire
SuperPACs — we’ve helped elect 1000 candidates and won 2 out of 3 races
we’ve endorsed in. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1031&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Pitch in today to grow our war chest for 2024 and
beyond!

We’re also not losing focus on important special elections and down-ballot
races from Rhode Island to South Carolina to Ohio.
Read more below!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1032&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

State Rep. Wendell Gilliard is running for State Senate in South Carolina
— and Our Revolution is ramping up our voter turnout operation to win the
September 5th special election!

Gilliard kicked off his campaign this summer with an economic justice bus
tour and led a rally for higher wages with Bernie Sanders in Charleston.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9561?t=1033&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Watch this powerful clip of Rep. Gilliard here.

He was a 2020 campaign co-chair for Bernie and state director in South
Carolina, and like Bernie, he has been a champion of working people for
decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1034&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Gilliard was a union leader for 15 years, a Charleston City Councilor for
11 years, and a member of the SC House for 15 years — where he has worked
to make our neighborhoods safer, bring in good-paying jobs, and reform our
criminal justice system.

On Wednesday, he joined a call with our phone bank team, and talked about
his goals for the State Senate, where he’ll continue the fight for
economic justice and affordable housing, and an end to gun violence.

“We need a voice not afraid to speak truth to power,” Wendell said. “They
want this seat so they can keep power in Columbia and not in your hands.
They want to control the money, jobs, and opportunities.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1035&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Bernie Sanders just endorsed progressive climate champion Aaron Regunberg
for the Sept 5 special election in Rhode Island’s 1st Congressional
District.

Aaron is running to succeed David Cicillini and hold RI-1 for progressives
and the working class. Electing Aaron means protecting the largest
progressive caucus in Congressional history.

In Congress, he will be a yes vote for Medicare for All, ending medical
debt, passing universal childcare, and more.

This will come down to voter turnout and we have the numbers to win. We
have one month to mobilize 15,000 Our Revolution supporters in Aaron’s
district — so let’s get to work!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1036&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

VICTORY! All three of Our Revolution-backed candidates in Seattle are
leading the vote counts after Tuesday’s primary!

Teresa Mosqueda and Jorge Baron are in the lead for King County Council
seats, along with Tammy Morales for Seattle City Council, and the trio
appear to be heading to the general election in November.

Each of them have shown they will have our back and fight for progressive
values. Thank you to the support and activism of Our Revolution members in
Washington whose democratic input and activism made these wins possible!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1037&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

Climate chaos is ravaging the globe, but we must keep our cool and put the
heat on climate criminals and their puppets in government.

That’s why Our Revolution is working with our allies in office and
organizing our massive climate coalition to bring pressure to bear ahead
of 2024.

Make sure our climate team has the resources needed to fight back. Pitch
in a donation of $10 ($5 if you’re already a monthly member), we’ll send
you this iconic new Bernie sticker as our thanks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9558?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1038&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]HELP EXPAND OUR WORK!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1039&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8480?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter&t=1040&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/signup_2109/?t=1006&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.yf2FT5&t=1007&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.-u79gb&t=1008&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.YlkEwV&t=1009&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230807_NL_RevReportRS_0_3MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Newsletter.fIEoop&t=1010&akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4527%2E5885482%2Ev9zhM7

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,
I have a lot to say in this email - but it all comes from the HEART.
Since the moment I rode down the Golden Escalator at Trump Tower to announce my presidential campaign as a political outsider, the Deep State has put a bull's eye on my back.
My private communications were SPIED on, I was slandered by the Fake News, and a dossier was fabricated in an attempt to FRAME me as an asset of the Russian government.
But then, a line was crossed on August 8, 2022 at 9:00 in the morning when my own home was RAIDED by the FBI and staged to look like a made-for-TV crime scene.
_**When the Deep State invades your own home, it 's a sign that our nation has entered uncharted territory and things are about to get far worse.**_
The raid on my home was a stern warning from the federal government not to run for president in 2024 - and a sign of what's to come if I chose to defy their demands.
I could've obeyed. I could've said, "I got to be one of only 45 Americans to ever be president. We did a tremendous job in those 4 years. Now, I can just spend the rest of my life by the beach with my beautiful family."
But that thought never even crossed my mind.
_**I could never turn my back on the country that gave me everything I ever could 've dreamed of. America will always be worth saving.**_
Surrendering our country to tyrannical bureaucrats who've become drunk with power never was and never will be an option.
So, when I announced my re-election campaign in November of 2022, I knew the imminent storm I was walking straight into...
...I have since been INDICTED **THREE** TIMES as an innocent man. I've been ARRESTED for crimes that I did not commit. And the rabid left-wing prosecutors have signaled that this is only just the beginning.
**They 've made it clear that their end game is to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man.**
Many pundits have remarked that if I were to drop out of the presidential race, the phony charges against me would be dropped and I would be guaranteed to live as a free man.
_**But here in America, our liberty is not a bargaining chip. Our freedom doesn 't come from a deal brokered by the government, our freedom is a natural right from God.**_
_**The second we allow our liberty and justice to be used as weapons of extortion, our nation will have forever succumbed to the dark forces of tyranny.**_
So, I will address those who are wondering if I would accept a deal with the Deep State and what this THIRD sham indictment means for the fate of our campaign...
...Let me make myself 100% clear: OUR CAMPAIGN GOES ON AND IT WILL _CONTINUE_ TO GO ON UNTIL WE THE PEOPLE WIN BACK THE WHITE HOUSE ON NOVEMBER 5, 2024.
We've built the greatest political movement in the history of our country - and I will NEVER ABANDON it.
**We are on a mission to save our country from a corrupt, self-serving ruling class - and I know in my heart, that we will prevail just as we always have, and on November 5, 2024, We The People will be celebrating America's TRIUMPH OVER TYRANNY.**
Friend, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are destroying our country, then you can stop reading here. I only wanted to share this note with you.

But the only thing Josh Hawley has shown us during his time in the U.S. Senate is how to be a fraud and a coward — from skittering away from the same mob he raised his fist for outside the Capitol on January 6th to using his own power to strip away rights for everyday people in Missouri and all across the country.

That doesn’t mean it’s going to be easy — after all, GOP insiders at the NRSC haven’t stopped attacking me since the day I got into this race — but we really can win this.

name: Joanna Weiss
subject: GOP Presidential candidates are all in on a national abortion ban.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67734540/420660709/-1695430967?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVmNTFhMWItNTMzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cLpgOgbbeSsCeW-whzV-fmUOB23csOBUL1CAAj4QDBM=)
Peter,

As the former President of WAVE, I fought tirelessly to protect reproductive choice.

Now, the right to get an abortion is under attack across the country. The majority-conservative Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ a little over a year ago, and since then, dozens of states have stripped women’s rights away.

**This is deeply concerning, and even more concerning is national Republicans’ plans to enact a nationwide abortion ban if they succeed in winning the Presidency and Congress.**

Former Vice President Mike Pence, among other GOP presidential candidates, have publicly stated that they support a nationwide 15-week abortion ban -- a time where a lot of women may not even realize they are pregnant. This is dangerous, and it makes winning our campaign in CA-47 even more critical.

**Our likely Republican opponent Scott Baugh, who narrowly lost to Katie Porter in 2022, openly supports a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions even for rape or incest. You can be sure he will be a rubber stamp for the far right on this issue.**

**[Winning in our district is key to taking back the House majority for Democrats and putting an end to the Republicans’ dream of a national abortion ban. Will you support our grassroots campaign today with a $3 donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67734541/420660710/-129347026?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjVmNTFhMWItNTMzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cLpgOgbbeSsCeW-whzV-fmUOB23csOBUL1CAAj4QDBM=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, As the former President of WAVE, I fought tirelessly to protect reproductive choice. Now, the right to get an abortion is under attack across the country. The majority-conservative Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade a little over a year ago, and since then, dozens of states have stripped women’s rights away. This is deeply concerning, and even more concerning is national Republicans’ plans to enact a nationwide abortion ban if they succeed in winning the Presidency and Congress. Former Vice President Mike Pence, among other GOP presidential candidates, have publicly stated that they support a nationwide 15-week abortion ban -- a time where a lot of women may not even realize they are pregnant. This is dangerous, and it makes winning our campaign in CA-47 even more critical. Our likely Republican opponent Scott Baugh, who narrowly lost to Katie Porter in 2022, openly supports a nationwide abortion ban with no exceptions even for rape or incest. You can be sure he will be a rubber stamp for the far right on this issue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna Weiss | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: We have to be prepared
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)
Peter,
Right now, Mitch McConnell and top Republicans are “aggressively recruiting” a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive to try to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat — which could decide control of the Senate.
Here’s why that matters:**if Bob’s eventual GOP opponent can self-fund the race, that means they could spend massive amounts against us starting on****Day One****— we need to be ready.**
We knew this race was going to be incredibly expensive, but now we might have to work twice as hard to compete.
[**Please, Peter, pitch in $5 right now to help us build up the resources we need to take on a self-funding opponent.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230807-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230807-1&refcode2=421_552475_JGHRYX&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230807-1?refcode=em20230807-1&refcode2=421_552475_JGHRYX&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)**
Someone who can self-fund a campaign -- and who on top of that has been promised Super PAC support from Mitch McConnell -- will make this race even tougher.
If we’re going to stop national Republicans from flipping PA and seizing control of the U.S. Senate next year, it’s critical that we fight back now by investing early.
We need to prepare NOW to counter a flood of attack ads and defend Bob’s record of fighting for working families.
[**Please rush a $5 donation to fight back in PA and let the GOP know this seat is not for sale.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230807-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230807-1&refcode2=421_552475_JGHRYX&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230807-1?refcode=em20230807-1&refcode2=421_552475_JGHRYX&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)**
If Democrats are going to hold the Senate in 2024, that work starts right now... right here in Pennsylvania.
Thank you for taking action,
Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=421%2E552475%2EJGHRYX)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: VoteVets
subject: The United States Army has no Chief of Staff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek:
The US Army has fought our battles for 248 years. It was founded by the Continental Congress. George Washington was its first Commander. It’s hard to think of a more enduring symbol of America and its influence around the world than the strength and resolve of the US Army.
And because of Tommy Tuberville, they have no confirmed Chief of Staff.
With the Commandant of the United States Marine Corps, that is two services continuing without someone in the top seat. More than 300 Generals and Admirals are standing by, waiting to take their next positions. More than 300 families wait with them.
All because of one Senator.
VoteVets has been fighting Tuberville tooth and nail for months on this. We are broadcasting ads in Alabama as we speak. Democrats in the Senate even took to the floor, calling out Tuberville and his blockade.
But after all of this, not one Republican in the Senate has told Tommy Tuberville to stand down. We have to turn up the heat on the rest of the Senate GOP.
**Help us do that, Derek.**
**[Rush $3 here and help us prepare a full court press against the Senate GOP. They say they’re the pro-Veteran party — time to prove it. We’re going to hold each of them accountable, all the way to the ballot box.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230807-1-30&t=1&akid=14267%2E3013755%2EWudAQ-)**

Peter,

**TRUTH.** There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them:

|
**God** is real.
There are **two** genders.
Human flourishing requires **fossil fuels**.
**Reverse racism** is racism.
An open border is **no border**.
**Parents** determine the education of their children.
The **nuclear family** is the greatest form of governance known to mankind.
**Capitalism** lifts people up from poverty.
There are three branches of the U.S. government, **not four**.
The **U.S. Constitution** is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history.

Vivek Ramaswamy

[** STAND WITH THE TRUTH **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6068c1420e443f7b60960dca682a549&_e=sIuoUTiEwZYrYIT-TyxeO16D6TTKZdRvhEaAoqXoQF-491a6Ma5O9NhO8PHUGvvQQg8zaPBL-U8N_02Nep35FuhUEWXttTMFcUeiyMFXIx-tN-lSDUZMBA1k5REsgSdNxT4mn07dZF9Uv-ud0357_GOScf68vLljRcf_GFsB_r9xqhvJ7dQJdGhUwqpWOF6abPDnjpt1GR4a39co2uaMPlte94ogljadyS0F3_5e1p8vISpt-FY9DUULUvbFOHc008thcuH10qjg6NeJaY2X3mwNOLA55W_OaQc5-X6YBXzLBNr7wK4kNo0tanXa8omplo5TaX2VSnv4mrFJyrwbAfBoky4DvvbjhEKIciw5b6nEPplPP3cI9o0-VmoF7hDmDsVgpBvbc1HzYFHa8wBxFA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. | | Peter, TRUTH. There's only one. Not yours, not mine. Just pure TRUTH. In today's bureaucratic political climate where spin is all the Administrative state knows how to do, we stand by cold-hard facts. I'm not afraid to say them: | God is real. There are two genders. Human flourishing requires fossil fuels. Reverse racism is racism. An open border is no border. Parents determine the education of their children. The nuclear family is the greatest form of governance known to mankind. Capitalism lifts people up from poverty. There are three branches of the U.S. government, not four. The U.S. Constitution is the strongest guarantor of freedoms in history. | America was founded on these truths that we find sacred and undeniable. Without these truths, our standing as a nation would mean nothing. If you agree with these 10 TRUTHS, This is about more than a campaign. It is a movement to revive this great nation. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mackinac=20Republican=20Leadership=20Conference?=
subject: ZUBY is Coming to Mackinac!!!
body:
MIGOP is thrilled to announce Zuby as a featured speaker for our upcoming Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference. | | |
---
| | | ZUBY, a rapper, author, podcast host, public speaker, creative entrepreneur, and patriot, is set to join MIGOP on Mackinac Island!

Make sure to catch this impressive speaker who boasts a staggering social media following of 1.8 million and has even conducted an interview with none other than CEO of X, Elon Musk.

Zuby is originally from England but grew up in Saudi Arabia. He graduated from Oxford University and has achieved great success as an independent artist and author. He has performed in 10 different countries, sold tens of thousands of albums and books, and has over 30 million views on his online videos. His podcast, 'Real Talk with Zuby,' has been downloaded over 6 million times and has a dedicated following of listeners who tune in every week.

He has appeared on various media platforms such as The Joe Rogan Experience, BBC, Fox News, Sky News, The Adam Carolla Show, The Rubin Report, The Candace Owens Show, and The Ben Shapiro Show. His exceptional perspective on the world and his readiness to challenge conventional stories are inspiring.

Zuby is just the latest patriot to join the all-star lineup that includes JIM CAVIEZEL, KARI LAKE, and DINESH D’SOUZA, making this an absolute must-see conference.

The newly formed MIGOP, led by grassroots efforts, is committed to making this conference the best one yet.

You simply cannot afford to miss this incredible event! It's an absolute must-see!

For additional details about our Mackinac Island Conference, please [click here](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=dbfbb42fcc&e=a2af77507c).

---
|
---
| [Click Here to BOOK HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS & PURCHASE CONFERENCE TICKETS](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=cc85601de9&e=a2af77507c "Click Here to BOOK HOTEL ACCOMMODATIONS & PURCHASE CONFERENCE TICKETS")
---

clean_body: Not a penny more. | = Peter, tomorrow, primary voters head to the polls. But we already know who will be on the ballot in the General Election 3 months from today: ✅ Me: I have a track record of taking on the special interests. I am not afraid to ruffle a few feathers to deliver results. And I’ll always put hardworking people and families first. = ❌ Tate Reeves: A self-serving politician who prioritizes special interests over issues that help the people of our state — denying Medicaid expansion, leaving hospitals to shut down, and rejecting state funding for essential repairs to Jackson's water infrastructure. = You can bet your bottom dollar that we can beat Reeves in three months. But it will take a massive amount of resources to deliver our message to voters far and wide in Mississippi — TV ads, phone calls, text messages, mail pieces, digital media, and anything else you can think of. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Brandon Presley | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. body:
I refuse to throw my hands up and wait until we have a different Congress to make progress. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67742726/420693419/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15W_EGR_E_20230807_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3ZDE0MS03ODM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvklNDTcPU21qxcwIDWZkfmQ0oNzn5MJAbKZ5vIpv8E=&emci=68b61138-7835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=09f7d141-7835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

I’ve got a whole bunch of plans for what we can accomplish with a Democratic House, a Democratic Senate, and a Democratic White House in 2025. So I’ll fight my heart out to support Democrats up and down the ticket in 2024. But I’m not willing to wait a year and a half to pass important bills and get things done for the American people. And even with Republicans controlling the House, there are still some places where the door is open to making real change. I’m teaming up with Republican colleagues in the Senate on issues where we have common ground. Issues like reining in Big Tech. And clawing back bonuses from executives who ran their big banks into the ground. And closing crypto-sized loopholes in our financial system. [**I refuse to throw my hands up and wait until we have a different Congress to make progress. We must keep fighting with what we have — I’m running for re-election to keep making progress. Will you chip in $20 or anything you can to make sure I can continue this work in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67742727/420693420/1012374840?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15W_EGR_E_20230807_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3ZDE0MS03ODM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvklNDTcPU21qxcwIDWZkfmQ0oNzn5MJAbKZ5vIpv8E=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
We need to defend and expand our Senate majority, retake the House, and re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2024 — because everything we’re fighting for would be a whole lot easier if we had more champions for working people in office. And our chances of making big, structural change all come screeching to a halt if Republicans take any more power.
Democrats win when we go out there and fight for the bold action that families need. But winning majorities is not enough. We need to use those majorities to pass plans that truly transform the lives of working people in this country.
So I’m fighting my heart out to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now. And I’m working to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table.
I'm deeply grateful for your support in this fight — and powering our campaign from the grassroots level makes an important difference.
Over time, a democracy with political campaigns funded by a small number of people who can contribute a lot of money looks very different from a democracy with campaigns funded by a large number of people who chip in a little at a time.
It’s the difference between a government that works great for those at the top and a government that can work for everyone.
With a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against powerful interests like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel giants who've used their deep pockets to block change.
[**If you’re able to, will you pitch in $20 or whatever makes sense to support my re-election so we can continue making progress for working people? I would be incredibly grateful.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67742740/420693433/1012374840?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15W_EGR_E_20230807_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOWY3ZDE0MS03ODM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZvklNDTcPU21qxcwIDWZkfmQ0oNzn5MJAbKZ5vIpv8E=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: I refuse to throw my hands up and wait until we have a different Congress to make progress. | | | I’ve got a whole bunch of plans for what we can accomplish with a Democratic House, a Democratic Senate, and a Democratic White House in 2025. So I’ll fight my heart out to support Democrats up and down the ticket in 2024. But I’m not willing to wait a year and a half to pass important bills and get things done for the American people. And even with Republicans controlling the House, there are still some places where the door is open to making real change. I’m teaming up with Republican colleagues in the Senate on issues where we have common ground. Issues like reining in Big Tech. And clawing back bonuses from executives who ran their big banks into the ground. And closing crypto-sized loopholes in our financial system. = | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We need to defend and expand our Senate majority, retake the House, and re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2024 — because everything we’re fighting for would be a whole lot easier if we had more champions for working people in office. And our chances of making big, structural change all come screeching to a halt if Republicans take any more power. Democrats win when we go out there and fight for the bold action that families need. But winning majorities is not enough. We need to use those majorities to pass plans that truly transform the lives of working people in this country. So I’m fighting my heart out to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now. And I’m working to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table. I'm deeply grateful for your support in this fight — and powering our campaign from the grassroots level makes an important difference. Over time, a democracy with political campaigns funded by a small number of people who can contribute a lot of money looks very different from a democracy with campaigns funded by a large number of people who chip in a little at a time. It’s the difference between a government that works great for those at the top and a government that can work for everyone. With a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against powerful interests like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and fossil fuel giants who've used their deep pockets to block change. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

Democrats only need to flip five seats to take back the House in 2024, and EMILYs List has already endorsed two pro-choice women who can flip seats in New York alone! **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67735988/420665938/-1667455293?sourceid=1051635&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllNGU4MC01NzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvMB_b8POj-mKJfgT9hzODU9PG-uFeZNN_IssjJK9nY=&emci=070556da-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=049e4e80-5735-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** **[Donate to elect pro-choice women like Liz and Laura. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67735996/420665945/-1667455293?sourceid=1051635&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllNGU4MC01NzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvMB_b8POj-mKJfgT9hzODU9PG-uFeZNN_IssjJK9nY=&emci=070556da-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=049e4e80-5735-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Both Reps. Lawler and D'Esposito are freshman congressmen who ran on messages of bipartisanship but, upon being elected, fell _immediately_ into lockstep with the rest of the anti-choice, anti-democratic Republican House majority. In fact, they have _voted with Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene_ , one of the House's most extreme Republicans, __85% of the time or higher__. **And voters have noticed**. As a result, the Cook Political Report has named both of these races TOSS UPS for 2024, and EMILYs List is thrilled to announce that we've endorsed the women challenging these GOP incumbents.

**Liz Gereghty** (NY-17) and **Laura Gillen** (NY-04) are ready to bring real change and pro-choice leadership to their districts. And their wins wouldn't just benefit New York — they would bring the House two seats closer to Democratic control. A Democratic Congress means a real opportunity to codify abortion rights nationwide!

**Women like Liz and Laura are on the ballot across the country this cycle, and EMILYs List is working hard to help them get elected. Can you fuel our work with a donation today?** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67735998/420665946/-1667455293?sourceid=1051635&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDllNGU4MC01NzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvMB_b8POj-mKJfgT9hzODU9PG-uFeZNN_IssjJK9nY=&emci=070556da-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=049e4e80-5735-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you for stepping up, the EMILYs List Campaigns team

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9653531499cf409f995c7fa5af98ba77&_e=iEpGG2b-tuxrJDhZJDgLS2t3ctkA-CJ2zJo4UyATZXajNMYjXjL3baxJh26lYtc8Pm5l3Fm3pMixjGuPZP2m_qKzbEm7H0UUF1R0qBxdH6HRnuW5XZ5MRAgSmgujph3ywhvGHCpxVPyas3S0bDtkaLAgujoDI0BIoy4SGCmY00f-WLFEtD0ZDxoDGBQniGze6g7Md62z1O1YEasnTjz8Qw6jBdihu7m_h6pZx8njI_24GnWzFVWyVJGXI1ATd6hP3QPW3YzJnhUP8FY5SDI8-fUiRjtVKUhR5v5RxtVrVllwBWLuuVGyCPtr7ntatD-0NFAiqWFKpLxqC0-dnMZcUNgCBxty2E9iZdgaa9G1HsEDsGh46miN2cs7bW8nO6OtVnmbMGYw66u9J2ppowdviPIjWe24TEPAcMublqwWtqg%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9653531499cf409f995c7fa5af98ba77&_e=iEpGG2b-tuxrJDhZJDgLS2t3ctkA-CJ2zJo4UyATZXajNMYjXjL3baxJh26lYtc8Pm5l3Fm3pMixjGuPZP2m_qKzbEm7H0UUF1R0qBxdH6HRnuW5XZ5MRAgSmgujph3ywhvGHCpxVPyas3S0bDtkaLAgujoDI0BIoy4SGCmY00f-WLFEtD0ZDxoDGBQniGze6g7Md62z1O1YEasnTjz8Qw6jBdihu7m_h6pZx8njI_24GnWzFVWyVJGXI1ATd6hP3QPW3YzJnhUP8FY5SDI8-fvvRLCjKEzp8EUIQN4OPiQ5_6obAxYS2A13zwZLKDDlYsZljEYrFuoAQC--qW2ck5FpmvfY3WXYc2xksPl0Vdx63hN1awD6YES4Jn6xIXUP9gOFuwp5hUH_uQH-hS1jodNZSwfjB8Di_LpNKeu6fWc%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9653531499cf409f995c7fa5af98ba77&_e=iEpGG2b-tuxrJDhZJDgLS2t3ctkA-CJ2zJo4UyATZXajNMYjXjL3baxJh26lYtc8Pm5l3Fm3pMixjGuPZP2m_qKzbEm7H0UUF1R0qBxdH6HRnuW5XZ5MRAgSmgujph3ywhvGHCpxVPyas3S0bDtkaLAgujoDI0BIoy4SGCmY00f-WLFEtD0ZDxoDGBQniGze6g7Md62z1O1YEasnTjz8Qw6jBdihu7m_h6pZx8njI_24GnWzFVWyVJGXI1ATd6hP3QPW3YzJnhUP8FY5SDI8-actPopiFye1tL6EN0ls_433O5weNBi6zRV-HW4yTr9lSs6CeJNUb54VvG0y2gPDdXUkKp0gk0OP7i0BHLg6Ld44Mz6gdHwbe7suzxG-H_zOOJeVTIjBhHbX9EKuryL0Rr5_tA04yTKLhBJY6fiq9RA%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Hey Peter, breaking news: SEVEN of our endorsed candidates are on the DCCC’s list of Frontline members — the Democrats they deem MOST at risk of losing their seats in 2024. **Jahana Hayes.
Sharice Davids.
Angie Craig.
Susie Lee.
Susan Wild.
Abigail Spanberger.
Kim Schrier.** Keeping these seven amazing women in Congress is CRITICAL to winning back our majority and grabbing that gavel right out of Kevin McCarthy’s hands. It’s clearer than ever that they’re going to need all the support they can get – now it’s up to us to get them to the finish line. [_**Peter, early money wins elections. body:
We’re incredibly proud of this endorsement | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dXS8ByGAQP2A-4EapEKCOZPaoczPMa1LfSWxu5e7L3gFdKggfQBmrucH0QC0O27qqz5WLHX1PYjhsRf6bpSY9lhIXFT4Q-XfibMG7wf7nsm4Gs0GIPD0GynvgxaQjsJl1TGR3xiRJ6qoLl7WB4cjasS__Ec7TDxJsTWHKHyskf9o/3yj/6Ext41sUR8Gjry8nU-Bt3A/h0/TsaqROXhfrfp7qKD_QfvsA2e_c0x1fM7hPUqZa1dOco)
---
Peter, we are so proud to announce that today the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, CHC BOLD PAC, has announced their endorsement of Michelle for TX-15! [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_86AMRLGJTJ1DIhdz4W8KPe8uL3-2HKUOEkFA5sZMspe7Z4AvR6PUEYcJcX7N7UDIDg2r-6VX7khDetjN5pXYV4cBk4iRGdYm9itfklcFEsAbYdYeL1Ja-vLcjWpRpH8tw6spdmTybKOevwT4oGCltNCT8Px1vRlL7bEC5zyVatAMBMK1JGZA-r_pmEpnA9iyXgwmJoe4PFbbNOeuq2kAfaGCi1D1qW4Wvq2mht4_7r_vKwdiDcTR70lHIXXGxz4M57qHY916lBNTgW9b1i-6F5rnKEHv5V_KctehkNYsX3v7e_0G4ofwpgqNHqae7t1AbZZiC0NQgnvcebutKVIOgg/3yj/6Ext41sUR8Gjry8nU-Bt3A/h1/LP1CLAT-kGjApkMUAhanDWO7IX8HZKH26WF2tjjzz0s) **[This is a HUGE endorsement — now we’re asking you to add your endorsement alongside theirs. Will you add your name to the powerful coalition backing Michelle by making a contribution today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_86AMRLGJTJ1DIhdz4W8KPe8uL3-2HKUOEkFA5sZMspcw813OGEBfB0ZQKn1703ds7RFTfBjwGTODHwYgRUGv0zu1VPwn8ScW4zhaYdBeCvOhBishXWRc7dFCRjW0Iq8n8cqYeHZiKTS0ALTyjS9DqumS9vS8vOwYvnaOkMsrsXYde6ulUCHJIejpeNVY8Hu8weS-znUBkyQPOQCewcLo51RuCV5FdIoWiO81vup2ApXdiBwr-rzOV_aP_CGpJSp9tSzxicr6EU7_AAYnEHHI1sPzPEG7TgS86v3VvKwyVCFVF-fS1cHJnNUeIe33J79YZYyrHURhpnaoEznJ_6CL8w/3yj/6Ext41sUR8Gjry8nU-Bt3A/h2/IrZu2H53EK41UH_BFLc30LUQUopOLBNGrGefnGt2DII)** Here’s what CHC BOLD PAC Chairwoman Linda Sánchez said about why they’re endorsing Michelle: _“As the daughter of immigrants from Mexico, Michelle Vallejo was raised to fight for working families and to make sure that high-quality healthcare is affordable for all. Michelle has lived through many of the same tremendous challenges faced by so many South Texas families. Michelle had to travel across the border into Mexico for medical care for her mother who passed away at the age of 46 after battling MS for 15 years. That’s why Michelle’s leadership is so important and needed at a moment when so many South Texan families are uninsured. We’re thrilled to support Michelle Vallejo to represent Texas’ 15th District.”_ Peter, South Texas deserves a leader who will fight FOR working families, not against them. But in her short time in Congress so far, Monica De La Cruz has voted against working families time and time again by cutting Medicare and Social Security for our abuelos, reducing funding for our veterans and public schools, and even slashing funds for our border. When we get Michelle to Congress, we know we’ll be able to count on her to fight for all South Texans to achieve their American Dream. **[This endorsement is proof that our movement has national support and a powerful coalition of diverse leaders behind us. clean_body: We’re incredibly proud of this endorsement | | | Peter, we are so proud to announce that today the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, CHC BOLD PAC, has announced their endorsement of Michelle for TX-15! Here’s what CHC BOLD PAC Chairwoman Linda Sánchez said about why they’re endorsing Michelle: “As the daughter of immigrants from Mexico, Michelle Vallejo was raised to fight for working families and to make sure that high-quality healthcare is affordable for all. Michelle has lived through many of the same tremendous challenges faced by so many South Texas families. Michelle had to travel across the border into Mexico for medical care for her mother who passed away at the age of 46 after battling MS for 15 years. That’s why Michelle’s leadership is so important and needed at a moment when so many South Texan families are uninsured. We’re thrilled to support Michelle Vallejo to represent Texas’ 15th District.” Peter, South Texas deserves a leader who will fight FOR working families, not against them. But in her short time in Congress so far, Monica De La Cruz has voted against working families time and time again by cutting Medicare and Social Security for our abuelos, reducing funding for our veterans and public schools, and even slashing funds for our border. When we get Michelle to Congress, we know we’ll be able to count on her to fight for all South Texans to achieve their American Dream. ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67736447/420667496/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDUwZDRmNzQtNTkzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9zjK53fQYupn6dItNRN45oww9hGHLax9vzlmFBBu9r0=) It’s been a busy summer here at Laura Friedman HQ, friend.

Laura is on the ground meeting voters, marching with striking workers, and working hard to win the race to succeed Adam Schiff and become the first woman ever to represent CA-30 in Congress.

We’ve hit a few major milestones recently, so we wanted to pass along some numbers we are especially proud of:
* **Laura is endorsed by 80 elected officials.** These endorsers include Lt. Governor of California Eleni Kounalakis, U.S. Rep. Judy Chu, the Speaker of the State Assembly Robert Rivas, and dozens of local city and county officials like Nithya Raman and Katy Yaroslovsky.

* **Laura is endorsed by 12 state and national organizations.** This list includes EMILYs List, the leading group electing pro-choice women, and important labor unions like ATU -- the Amalgamated Transit Union.

* **Laura is endorsed by 54 community leaders.** As an advocate herself, Laura knows how critical it is to have the support of local party activists and advocates fighting for women, our environment, and housing affordability.

* **Since our launch, Laura officially has over 1,000 contributors to her campaign!** The vast majority of our donors live right here in Los Angeles County.

This is what a people-powered campaign looks like. Thanks to this support, Laura is in a strong position to continue her fight for the people of CA-30 in Congress and here at home.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: 340 stores and counting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Starbucks employees are trailblazers in the modern labor movement. They’ve unionized more locations than any company in the last two decades, with over 340 stores and counting [https://sbworkersunited.org/] .

Yet Starbucks and its board members refuse to engage in good-faith negotiations with its unionizing workers. They have employed union-busting lawyers to combat their employees. They are actively retaliating against them with cuts to pay and hours, resulting in a loss of benefits. They have shuttered storefronts before workers could vote to unionize.

Starbucks employees are the heart of the company’s brand. They’re the ones working day in and day out to provide customers with a quality product and superior service. All they have asked for is to be treated with dignity and respect.

Sign the petition: Tell Starbucks to do the right thing and stop interfering with unionization. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/starbucks-unionization-petition?contactdata=v31GZzmCvrVAdqta2vYj361GRfTagWIEqVR4tOTak53eO3LGFH1JvSVK+bUORl6U3SuqRUXtbcLMWgPKc54mvGMuvn20YQ6U/VaLtkz944yWol+nihrDnZ46Hmm6mUMXQ/nbDnjwP0blChE5iXP0aA==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/starbucks-unionization-petition?contactdata=v31GZzmCvrVAdqta2vYj361GRfTagWIEqVR4tOTak53eO3LGFH1JvSVK+bUORl6U3SuqRUXtbcLMWgPKc54mvGMuvn20YQ6U/VaLtkz944yWol+nihrDnZ46Hmm6mUMXQ/nbDnjwP0blChE5iXP0aA==]

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DVS8RXyz2xE [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DVS8RXyz2xE]

Last year, I sent a letter to Starbucks [https://www.marketwatch.com/story/exclusive-starbucks-urged-to-work-with-unions-in-letter-from-members-of-congress-11664816534#:~:text=Almost%20three%20dozen%20lawmakers%20on,withholding%20wage%20and%20benefits%20increases] with the support of over 30 of my colleagues in Congress, urging the corporate giant to stop unfairly punishing their union employees. This disparate treatment violates numerous labor laws, including the National Labor Relations Act.

This treatment is unacceptable. The value of Starbucks, like that of any major company, lies entirely with its employees. How can its leadership refuse workers their fair share? How can it deny its employees livable wages and reasonable working conditions that meet their basic needs?

They can’t. Tell Starbucks: Let Workers Unionize. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/starbucks-unionization-petition?contactdata=v31GZzmCvrVAdqta2vYj361GRfTagWIEqVR4tOTak53eO3LGFH1JvSVK+bUORl6U3SuqRUXtbcLMWgPKc54mvGMuvn20YQ6U/VaLtkz944yWol+nihrDnZ46Hmm6mUMXQ/nbDnjwP0blChE5iXP0aA==]

In solidarity,
Ro

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: re: Your $22.58 donation
body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| | **$22.58.** That’s our average online donation from grassroots supporters, and that’s what we’re hoping _you_ can contribute today. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have ground-breaking special elections in Pennsylvania and New Hampshire right around the corner – $22.58 can help win in races like these. **Reason #2:** Election Day is less than _100 days away,_ and we mean it when we say that a gift of $22.58 donated today is more impactful than $22.58 donated right before Election Day. **Reason #3:** State Democrats are constantly overlooked and underfunded, and with Republicans pouring millions into the states, we need constant resources to stay competitive. [So what do you say? Our Honorees: **Charles “Totsie” Bailey**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67736879/420670969/1578864361?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTNhNWVmZjktNWMzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfwODynY3Fr50jkM6MMr6ImlR34gC5pLGhXcdghgGoQ=&emci=194bf910-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=93a5eff9-5c35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=81601) Totsie, a third-generation Steamfitter, has been a member of Steamfitters Local 439 for 49 years, holding a succession of positions including Executive Board Member, Business Agent, Financial Secretary/Treasurer, and Business Manager. He currently works with Chatham & Baricevic, a law firm in Belleville, Illinois. The firm is a prominent pro-labor democratic firm, and Totsie gets pleasure from witnessing their fight for middle-class and union members every day.

Outside of work, Tootsie and his wife Linda Bailey enjoy their three children, Charlie, Chris, and Sarah, and their seven grandchildren.
**Sara Dorner**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67736882/420670970/1578864361?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTNhNWVmZjktNWMzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfwODynY3Fr50jkM6MMr6ImlR34gC5pLGhXcdghgGoQ=&emci=194bf910-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=93a5eff9-5c35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=81601)
A Rockford native, Dorner was the first woman to be elected President of Rockford United Labor in 2020, representing five counties and more than 25,000 union members in Northwestern Illinois. She is also the Labor Chair on the Winnebago County Democrats Executive Board. In 2018 she was chosen as one of the Rockford Register Star’s “People to watch” and in 2019 she was named one of Rockford’s 40 leaders under 40. Later that year she received the DeKalb County Democrats Party Marge Jindrich Award for Political Organizing. Prior to returning to her hometown of Rockford in 2014, she was a Labor Relations Specialist for the Minnesota Nurses Association. For ten years, she’s been a labor representative for the American Federation of State, County, and Municipal Employees (AFSCME) Council 31. She credits her background as a union flight attendant for the lessons in solidarity she carries with her today. She is thankful to her two children ages 7 and 10, the best canvass partners ever, and her supportive partner David, who is fun to watch the polls with on election night.
**Billy Halstead**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67736883/420670973/1578864361?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTNhNWVmZjktNWMzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfwODynY3Fr50jkM6MMr6ImlR34gC5pLGhXcdghgGoQ=&emci=194bf910-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=93a5eff9-5c35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=81601)
Long-time Peoria County Democratic Chair Bill Halstead is highly regarded for successfully championing Democrats in central Illinois and helping to lead the IDCCA to elect more Democrats state-wide. He was born and raised in Peoria to a proud union family. His mother was a member of the bartender and waitress union, and his father was a member of Laborers Local 165 for 50+ years. He grew up surrounded by 5 sisters. Like his father, he has been a member of Laborers Local 165 since 1976, He spent 23 years doing construction before starting as a Regional Manager for Secretary of State Jesse White, retiring in 2022. Billy is an active member of the Peoria area community, having served as the Chair of the Peoria County Democratic Party for 23 years. Billy also served as Vice President of the IDCCA for 15 years. In March 2023 he retired as County Chair and IDCCA Vice President to spend more time with his 3-year-old grandson Rowan, his 2 adult children, Cody and Carly, and his wife Cindy.

Please join us as we honor Totsie, Sara and Billy. [**Don’t delay, buy your tickets today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67736884/420670976/974004236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTNhNWVmZjktNWMzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yfwODynY3Fr50jkM6MMr6ImlR34gC5pLGhXcdghgGoQ=&emci=194bf910-4835-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=93a5eff9-5c35-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=81601)

Sincerely,

Team IDCCA

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67737275/420673607/-2142219536?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_NGP_20230807_FR_Climate_0_3MO_NextGenPAC_NA_NA_Climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjZhMDc1Ni01ZTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeHCrgDXPBpwL8FzQOU5pb1W9Kt7u5i75iWBKW4WqKA=) Here at NextGen PAC, we are all OBSESSED with the new Barbie movie. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Rapid Response Needed
body:
| | | My friend, I’ve fought America’s enemies on battlefields across the globe as a combat-decorated Special Forces Green Beret.

The bracelet I wear on my arm is for one of my teammates who paid the ultimate price to defend the United States from our enemies. It reminds me every day of the true cost of freedom.

So, I’m sure you can understand my outrage at the recent revelations by federal government whistleblower Gary Shapley.

A WhatsApp message Shapely unearthed revealed that Joe Biden’s wastrel son, Hunter, leveraged his father’s name and clout to secure a FIVE MILLION DOLLAR wire from a Chinese Communist Party (CCP) official!

Make no mistake, the CCP is America’s #1 global adversary.

In fact, Communist China’s dictator Xi Jinping has made no secret of his determination to supplant the U.S. as the world’s dominant superpower.

Yet, Hunter Biden saw no issue with getting rich off CCP cash.

It makes my blood boil.

That’s my perspective. Now, I’d like to hear yours.

Please, take a few minutes to complete the _Communist China Threat Assessment Survey_ I’ve enclosed for you and let me know your opinion. I eagerly await your response.[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=44dff5a34e2a4292a892b2f9ea77bf9a&_e=J8PZ2pxefUhzpc2w1IaaGQZ956m_SX2lAeWoLYnNxu-iAJNjz9J3wjRutAyJ3BDf1QNLVzA5ZA5uALB6dtTsGk-yvZ05XE4Nc5s61EJbY7VSA_ZAGm3Ee0q9H8bGSTmBdtkCqhftKRAqyfDC5Zepa5Aka5kXl0BF9T8aTIVdO9fP5QS9uEefMGyHKk0lThvxqmaYT9XoWjT6ljkOFscFRZxF1SGjwLx5xGL8pr-Y6DWcgaJQ2RTcsMH5uXfk7SIWF5BSYybrd3sgA_sxl89G5kxm1vniCwjFxaxSjWM0lOfn7Q1egv7JGIlpE3Y07vveYT7IQx8rBs7IEN5kM31DpVqhhE1RmsGRIe3nCjC5V65TObr-iZsUDz-rftOCfVnwPBVi_BGjh4qaE2LRjDyDzw%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | My friend, I’ve fought America’s enemies on battlefields across the globe as a combat-decorated Special Forces Green Beret. The bracelet I wear on my arm is for one of my teammates who paid the ultimate price to defend the United States from our enemies. It reminds me every day of the true cost of freedom. So, I’m sure you can understand my outrage at the recent revelations by federal government whistleblower Gary Shapley. A WhatsApp message Shapely unearthed revealed that Joe Biden’s wastrel son, Hunter, leveraged his father’s name and clout to secure a FIVE MILLION DOLLAR wire from a Chinese Communist Party (CCP) official! Make no mistake, the CCP is America’s #1 global adversary. In fact, Communist China’s dictator Xi Jinping has made no secret of his determination to supplant the U.S. as the world’s dominant superpower. Yet, Hunter Biden saw no issue with getting rich off CCP cash. It makes my blood boil. That’s my perspective. Now, I’d like to hear yours. Please, take a few minutes to complete the Communist China Threat Assessment Survey I’ve enclosed for you and let me know your opinion. I eagerly await your response. | | De Oppresso Liber , Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) | | Paid for by Servant Leadership Fund, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Michael Waltz for Congress, Warrior Diplomat, Frontline Patriots, and NRCC. | | 824 S Milledge Ave Ste 101, Athens, GA 30605 Contributions to Servant Leadership Fund, or any of its participating committees, are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Team Bell
subject: Fighting for our right to vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
The Voting Rights Act of 1965 was the first significant piece of voting rights legislation our country had ever seen. Unfortunately, what should have been the benchmark for future legislation surrounding the right to vote is no more. We’ve seen an unprecedented amount of attacks on the right to vote in recent years.

State legislatures across the country have introduced some of the most restrictive pieces of legislation to make it more difficult for everyday people to participate in elections.

Voting is a right, and our laws – from the state to the federal level – should be making it easier for people to vote, not harder.

Last year alone, we saw **eight states enact 11 of the most restrictive voter laws in the country,** including Missouri where the state legislature passed voter ID laws in an attempt to subvert democracy and make voting inaccessible.

And the attacks are going to continue unless we elect leaders like Wesley Bell, who will take on extreme Republicans and work to expand the right to vote.

[**The fight to protect voting rights is far from over. We must keep fighting, and that starts by taking on leaders like Josh Hawley, who have done nothing to protect and expand the right to vote. Chip in $5 or more to ensure Wesley Bell has the resources to take on Hawley and defend our right to clean_body: The Voting Rights Act of 1965 was the first significant piece of voting rights legislation our country had ever seen. Unfortunately, what should have been the benchmark for future legislation surrounding the right to vote is no more. We’ve seen an unprecedented amount of attacks on the right to vote in recent years. State legislatures across the country have introduced some of the most restrictive pieces of legislation to make it more difficult for everyday people to participate in elections. Voting is a right, and our laws – from the state to the federal level – should be making it easier for people to vote, not harder. Last year alone, we saw eight states enact 11 of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, including Missouri where the state legislature passed voter ID laws in an attempt to subvert democracy and make voting inaccessible. And the attacks are going to continue unless we elect leaders like Wesley Bell, who will take on extreme Republicans and work to expand the right to vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI 7253 WATSON RD #1115, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

Here are my thoughts. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67737537/420674565/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2QwYjNmYTEtNWYzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WiJmMI49xhLPHIwCfQ6I_3jknNLfbil-rkvu36Dtlc0=) | Peter, By now, you’ve heard that a grand jury has indicted Donald Trump for a third time. I believe these charges are the most serious yet - they allege that Trump engaged in a conspiracy to overturn the 2020 Presidential Election and disrupt the peaceful transfer of power, including his involvement in the insurrection on January 6th. I still remember the worn faces of our Capitol Police officers as I walked back to the House floor to finish our Constitutional duty that night and into the early hours of January 7th. Hundreds of US Capitol Police and DC Police officers fought for hours and hours to defend our democracy that day, and many of them are still grappling with life-changing severe injuries. No one is above the law - Trump is being held accountable, and it will be up to a jury to decide if he is guilty. **But this is what I mean when I say we have to protect our democracy from MAGA extremists. If our votes don’t count, we aren’t a democracy any more.** **[Right now these extremists have a hold on Speaker McCarthy. We have to win my race so we can take back the House next year. body:
| Will you add your name to endorse Adam’s campaign for Senate today?
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3296%2E5257348%2EcqxjoO)
Derek,
Not long ago, Adam announced he was running to take our fight — for democracy, for justice, for truth — to the U.S. Senate. The support he’s received has been nothing short of incredible.
**Elected officials, labor unions, and organizations across California and the country are showing their support for Adam. Adam’s record of service speaks for itself:**
As scientists warned of global warming, Adam worked as an Assistant U.S. Attorney to prosecute big polluters and save our planet.
When Trump attacked our democracy, Adam stood up against his lies and served as an impeachment manager for his first trial.
And when Californians needed a leader, Adam delivered results. He’s worked to fight corruption, lower prescription costs, increase affordable housing for Californians, and more.
It’ll take a lot of work to elect Adam as California’s next Senator. That’s why we’re reaching out today:
**[Will you add your name to endorse Adam’s campaign for Senate today? We’re building our grassroots movement from the ground-up, so having your support will be key in these next few months.](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20230807-endorsement?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20230807_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=3296%2E5257348%2EcqxjoO)**
