name: John Fetterman
subject: Courts matter now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Jill Beck is running for our Superior Court
#
Hey Derek,
Courts matter now, more than ever. If we want Pennsylvania to be a place where justice is for all, abortion rights are protected, and every citizen has their vote counted, **we have to elect Jill Beck to the Superior Court.**
The Superior Court hears appeals of individual rights cases, and is the last court to decide nearly 98% of cases that come before it.
That means that every one of us will be impacted by these big decisions and must elect a jurist who is ready to do the hard work to review these cases.
That person is Jill Beck: she has received the highest rating from the Pennsylvania Bar Association, has dedicated her career to ensuring the most vulnerable members of our population get the same access to justice as the most-connected, has been endorsed by Planned Parenthood, and is the only candidate who has experience on both sides of the bench.
Running a statewide race takes resources (don’t I know it...) and we’ve got to get Jill to the Superior Court. **[The best way you can help her grassroots momentum continue is to chip in today and put her in the best position to take on the far-right extremists in November.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49726?t=1&akid=8494%2E434096%2EiGCvtI)**
**[Donate »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49726?t=2&akid=8494%2E434096%2EiGCvtI)**
Reproductive rights, marriage equality, and so much more is on the ballot November 7th. There is too much at stake to sleep on this election. Let’s get it done, and get Jill Beck to the Superior Court.
— John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania
P.S. Levi + Artie know Jill Beck is good people, because she also rescued her dog, Ripothy. They give their official endorsement. 🐾
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49726?t=3&akid=8494%2E434096%2EiGCvtI)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230807-8494-footer&t=4&refcode2=8494_434096_iGCvtI&akid=8494%2E434096%2EiGCvtI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=8494%2E434096%2EiGCvtI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8494%2E434096%2EiGCvtI)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: re: My husband, George
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738202/420676946/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738203/420676947/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=) Hi there, Peter -- my name is Loretta and I’m George Whitesides’ wife.

I’m a mom to two kids, author, public speaker, leadership trainer and science communicator.

**Today, I’m reaching out about why I know George will make a fantastic Congressman for our communities right here in CA-27.**

[**But first, will you chip in $3 toward George’s August digital fundraising goal now, then keep reading about our story?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738204/420676948/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=) | ****[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738205/420676949/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=)****
---

I’ve seen firsthand the kind of leader George is throughout our life together.

**He’s passionate about getting results -- whether through his former role as NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama, working with city and business leaders to help Antelope Valley hospitals get critical supplies during the uncertainty of the first Covid lockdown, bringing together science, tech, government and philanthropy groups to build solutions to the wildfire crisis, or as a father of our two children.

It’s clear that the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys need someone like George representing us at home and in Washington.**

I know that he will get results for our communities in Congress just as he has his entire career. From finding solutions to the wildfire crisis that threatens California and beyond, to creating more jobs in the district, to protecting a woman’s right to choose -- _George is working day and night to move CA-27 forward._

But this is a critical moment in the campaign. It’s been a busy summer for George on the campaign trail, and we are working to build momentum and engagement as we head into the fall. We want to energize and empower people to be a part of building the future that inspires us. Join our campaign. Support George and let’s co-create a world we can all be proud of!

And remember: **This is a toss-up race. All eyes -- from National Republicans and Democrats alike -- are on CA-27 as a key piece of the House majority for either party.**

[**I hope you’ve seen a bit of why George is the leader we need representing CA-27 in Congress. Can George and I count on your $3 contribution toward his August fundraising goal today? Every dollar makes a difference, and it’s thanks to your generosity that our campaign moves forward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738206/420676950/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=)
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738207/420676951/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738208/420676952/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.7.23-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTM1NDJjZC02NDM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LswE1basBItGGgmgGffnU4p0qT2G8I3cBXpZaumB4tY=)****

clean_body: | = = Hi there, Peter -- my name is Loretta and I’m George Whitesides’ wife. I’m a mom to two kids, author, public speaker, leadership trainer and science communicator. Today, I’m reaching out about why I know George will make a fantastic Congressman for our communities right here in CA-27. = | **= I’ve seen firsthand the kind of leader George is throughout our life together. He’s passionate about getting results -- whether through his former role as NASA Chief of Staff under President Obama, working with city and business leaders to help Antelope Valley hospitals get critical supplies during the uncertainty of the first Covid lockdown, bringing together science, tech, government and philanthropy groups to build solutions to the wildfire crisis, or as a father of our two children. It’s clear that the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys need someone like George representing us at home and in Washington. I know that he will get results for our communities in Congress just as he has his entire career. From finding solutions to the wildfire crisis that threatens California and beyond, to creating more jobs in the district, to protecting a woman’s right to choose -- George is working day and night to move CA-27 forward. But this is a critical moment in the campaign. It’s been a busy summer for George on the campaign trail, and we are working to build momentum and engagement as we head into the fall. We want to energize and empower people to be a part of building the future that inspires us. Join our campaign. Support George and let’s co-create a world we can all be proud of! And remember: This is a toss-up race. All eyes -- from National Republicans and Democrats alike -- are on CA-27 as a key piece of the House majority for either party. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Loretta | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Team Chrissy
subject: FWD: We’re asking one more time
body:

---
**Chrissy just emailed you about her founding member fundraising effort, but we still haven’t heard back from you.**
Right now, Chrissy is determined to fight for real, lasting, bipartisan solutions to attacks on reproductive freedom and the epidemic of gun violence that we're facing. But to do that, she’s depending on your grassroots support.

Team Chrissy

From funding the UNFPA to give women around the world the reproductive resources they need, to ensuring that servicewomen accessing reproductive care are able to travel to another state if needed – having the chance to do this incredible work means so much to me, and I’m committed to continuing to fight for a better future for PA-06 and the United States.
But as a representative, my position gets put to the test every two years at the ballot box. The far right is determined to halt the progress of this progressive movement right now. As a critical member of this team, I’m asking if you’ll join me again:

My ability to follow through on my platform depends on your support to retain this critical office._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67738483/420678038/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk851-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTc4OGQ1Yy02NTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gj6xohVVWTStXJvLjtTxrvTFTZdPp-cbNviiaDCksxk=)**

name: Andy Roth
subject: Defund The American Library Association
body:
WYFC Fights Woke Prisons, AZFC Gets Top Scores...
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/sfcn/p/defund-the-american-library-association?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..to_uFRQhythyzOW4k8Fs05P6WmpryZE8KTc--irY7xU?)
---
[](https://substack..to_uFRQhythyzOW4k8Fs05P6WmpryZE8KTc--irY7xU?)
---
# [Defund The American Library Association](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=135723880&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1NzIzODgwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTE0NDIxMTMsImV4cCI6MTY5NDAzNDExMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dvA5j6jAxRStC9Y8DiS4ug8gAI9M6t1vdkDBEspBI04)
### WYFC Fights Woke Prisons, AZFC Gets Top Scores...
| | [Andy Roth](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3096c8be-f341-4806-8d6d-791702b044c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Aug 7
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3096c8be-f341-4806-8d6d-791702b044c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack..UZneZIv4PubETSdzuIJLsBy3C6QgHY-ReI3tLyDel8M?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=135723880&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM1NzIzODgwLCJpYXQiOjE2OTE0NDIxMTMsImV4cCI6MTY5NDAzNDExMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dvA5j6jAxRStC9Y8DiS4ug8gAI9M6t1vdkDBEspBI04)
---
Friends,
In my last email, I talked about the [effort the State Freedom Caucus Network has launched](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/42a32c44-5c13-4717-a3ff-ec11a1b2cc5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to get state and local libraries to divest from the American Library Association (ALA). The ALA is an entity that has existed for over 100 years and has become the backbone of our nation's library system. It is to libraries what Google is to the Internet.
And much like Big Tech corporations, the ALA has used their immense power over our nation's librares to push a radical, left-wing agenda onto our children. The president of their organization is a self described "Marxist", they once gave an award to George Soros, and they are fully in support of sexually explicit content being available to children in school libraries. They were even [caught](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/be232473-f390-43a9-b5e6-fc1ab44e46eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) back in June circulating instructions to their members to sabotage conservative events being held at public libraries.
They are perfectly fine with drag queen story hours but object when conservative celebrity Kirk Cameron goes to a public library to read to children. Our friends at the American Accountability Foundation also recently published an [in-depth report](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5eeffd08-74cf-4716-a067-8744b105193b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on ALA's woke agenda that you should read.
In addition to pushing their radical agenda, the ALA also gets thousands of tax dollars in dues from state and local libraries all over the country. State Freedom Caucuses will always fight against the indoctrination of our children, especially when your money is being used in order to do it, and are putting the pressure on their state's library associations to cut all ties with the ALA.
Earlier in July, [Montana](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/219bb432-017a-479e-85a2-34dd30a68422?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)'s Library Association became the first to break away from the ALA in an unanimous vote and we are stepping up the pressure for more states to follow their lead. Last week, I joined twelve other leaders of prominent conservative organizations, including Citizens for Renewing America and Eagle Forum, in a coalition letter calling on all states to stop taxpayer dollars from going to this Marxist organization that seeks to indoctrinate our kids.
Read more about the letter and the path forward in the [Federalist.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/97736724-760a-4b9c-81d6-f0dba48afa50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cb1ff156-f7ea-49fc-9d02-81972d254efe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/09cb6dbc-d274-4780-9d56-723cfd07c7c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Wyoming:**
We have written extensively in our emails about the unprecedented betrayal of the conservative base from Wyoming's "Republican" Speaker of the House Albert Sommers at the end of the last legislative session. He singlehandedly blocked bills for universal school choice, to ban pediatric sex changes, and to stop indoctrination in schools.
Well, the Department of Corrections in the Cowboy State, which Donald Trump won by a larger percentage than any other in the 2020 election, announced the other day that they will be allowing biological men to be housed in women's prisons.
The WYFC immediately erupted, calling on the Department of Corrections to reverse this policy.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0f53d9b5-103f-4943-88b4-c0b391dd8a75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In [response](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4be62ef1-6dcc-4c3f-b473-fd2186713f02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the Department of Corrections relented and clarified that male inmates will not be in contact with female inmates.
Freedom Caucuses will always fight to protect women in their private spaces.
**Arizona**
The good folks at the Arizona Free Enterprise Club released their [2023 scorecard](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c64f7af8-fe54-4f94-9cc8-29bb530171df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for Arizona's most recent legislative session. It's no surprise that Arizona Freedom Caucus members were all at the top. _**Every single one of them received a perfect 100% score.**_
When a lawmaker is in a state freedom caucus, there is high expectation that they be consistently conservative. And the Arizona Freedom Caucus did not let us down.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
[DONATE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b16ee2f7-0f60-4ad9-abae-5913f0387dd0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d6a9cbe8-039f-4650-bced-7b806f7416a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/34deb457-0cc7-4f2b-af65-bf64e24ba9ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.kaZM-uxcWSS8cWeYdNngGTVMp7liOMzmZn9k0YbN5Pk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.kaZM-uxcWSS8cWeYdNngGTVMp7liOMzmZn9k0YbN5Pk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)
---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..UZneZIv4PubETSdzuIJLsBy3C6QgHY-ReI3tLyDel8M?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
(C) 2023 State Freedom Caucus Network
300 Independence Ave SE, Washington, DC 20003
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..K7biuHLFM9ghs_TLUKyGOM5eWzTxK54XmilfoHBZkYM?)
[](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/a1df65f6-e710-440e-b038-d8536d11ff33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..DtmiEf9Vi6ned2a8ZczMywWdTtGhtCHUEXHeoahXd-8?)

|

Hey team,
Urgency grips our nation as we stand at a pivotal moment in our democratic journey. Tomorrow's Ohio Special Election casts a long shadow on the future of our democracy. What's at stake is nothing less than the pressing trend to undermine citizen-led ballot initiatives and accountability.
[**If we allow Issue 1 to pass in Ohio:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67738974/420679906/1311227570?refcode=20230807_AOTL_F_OH-If-Then_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NWZlMDIwLTY2MzUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-QSXRjQnw-2UToNik9TiYDKSxe_yTDMr_zUENv9s29s=)
**🚫 "One Person, One Vote" -- UNDER THREAT:** Issue 1 hands power to special interests and corrupt politicians, trampling on the sacred principle of equal representation for all Americans.
**🚫 Protecting Our Rights -- UNDER ATTACK:** Ohioans' rights are on the line, with their voices silenced and their say diminished in crucial decisions that affect their lives.
**🚫 Countering Power Grabs -- MUST BE STOPPED:** Issue 1 is a dangerous precedent that could embolden more power grabs across the nation, jeopardizing the integrity of our democracy.
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67738975/420679907/1311227570?refcode=20230807_AOTL_F_OH-If-Then_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NWZlMDIwLTY2MzUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-QSXRjQnw-2UToNik9TiYDKSxe_yTDMr_zUENv9s29s=)
---
[**Then what happens:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67738976/420679908/1311227570?refcode=20230807_AOTL_F_OH-If-Then_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NWZlMDIwLTY2MzUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-QSXRjQnw-2UToNik9TiYDKSxe_yTDMr_zUENv9s29s=)
**🛑 Our Voices Silenced:** If Issue 1 succeeds, it sends a chilling message to extreme politicians everywhere that they can undermine voters and manipulate elections without consequences.
**🛑 Voter Turnout Manipulated:** The August special election tactic used in Ohio could be replicated in other states, eroding the power of citizens to have their voices heard.

clean_body: | Hey team, Urgency grips our nation as we stand at a pivotal moment in our democratic journey. Tomorrow's Ohio Special Election casts a long shadow on the future of our democracy. What's at stake is nothing less than the pressing trend to undermine citizen-led ballot initiatives and accountability. = 🚫 "One Person, One Vote" -- UNDER THREAT: Issue 1 hands power to special interests and corrupt politicians, trampling on the sacred principle of equal representation for all Americans. 🚫 Protecting Our Rights -- UNDER ATTACK: Ohioans' rights are on the line, with their voices silenced and their say diminished in crucial decisions that affect their lives. 🚫 Countering Power Grabs -- MUST BE STOPPED: Issue 1 is a dangerous precedent that could embolden more power grabs across the nation, jeopardizing the integrity of our democracy. = = 🛑 Our Voices Silenced: If Issue 1 succeeds, it sends a chilling message to extreme politicians everywhere that they can undermine voters and manipulate elections without consequences. 🛑 Voter Turnout Manipulated: The August special election tactic used in Ohio could be replicated in other states, eroding the power of citizens to have their voices heard. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We cannot afford to let Ohio Issue 1 set a dangerous precedent. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Don’t let Big Oil kill off the remaining 75 Southern Resident killer whales
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1917013?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ORCA PETITION: The LAST of only 75 Southern Resident killer whales in the world are struggling to survive while greedy corporations are raking in profits!** Friend, we had a momentary celebration for the recent births of **TWO baby orcas** \-- born in the same pod of the beloved deceased matriarch, Marina! As we mourn the tragic deaths of both Cappuccino and Marina and celebrate the newborn orca calves, Big Oil is working on corporate megaprojects that put the remaining vulnerable orcas at risk of _**EXTINCTION.**_ Orcas cannot endure another loss of their surviving family members. The loss of one orca can **induce stress and grief** which can lead to **miscarriage, starvation, and death.** [**Friend, these precious newborn orcas need help from environmentalists like YOU to protect them from corporate destruction! Sign the petition right now to give these orcas a fighting chance >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1917014?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1917015?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Greedy fossil fuel polluters intrude on our oceans with construction, high-volume traffic, and massive vessels that release **harmful contaminants** into these innocent mammals’ habitats. Noise pollution from ships also **disrupts whales’ echolocation abilities,** making it difficult to communicate with one another and locate food to feed themselves and their young.
This is not stopping Big Oil and the shipping industry from expanding a **MASSIVE** terminal that would increase ship traffic. This can pose a great risk of oil spewing into our oceans, polluting our waterways, and destroying our planet **all in the name of greed and profit!** [**Friend, add your voice before 11:59pm TONIGHT to protect vulnerable marine mammals and STOP megaprojects from destroying our one and only planet. Will you help us?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1917016?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1917015?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Bob Casey via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: I’m writing to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Hello friend,
I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important -- [**but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Alex Padilla and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-casey.DnLZO6&refcode=em230807-1-30&t=1&akid=1463%2E159979%2EMWS5Rd)**
The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is.
This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too.
**It is hard to understate the stakes, friend: Social Security, Medicare and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year.**
We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set.
[**Can I count on you to split a contribution of $5 or more between Alex Padilla and my re-election campaign today, friend? We need your help to keep PA and the Senate blue.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-august23-casey.DnLZO6&refcode=em230807-1-30&t=2&akid=1463%2E159979%2EMWS5Rd)**

name: Cinde Warmington
subject: How I plan to stand up for working families in NH→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| Hi, it’s Cinde.

I want to talk to you about some of the biggest challenges facing working families today.

When my parents were first starting out, my father worked in a shipyard and my mother waited tables. Still, they were able to buy a small house and provide for me and my three siblings. Today working class families in New Hampshire are finding it harder and harder to get by. Too many people in our state can’t afford to make ends meet here.

With the rising costs of childcare, energy, and housing — _too many New Hampshire families are falling behind instead of getting ahead._

**_[If we’re going to build an economy where everyone can thrive in the Granite State, we need to take a stand for working families. Are you with me? Click here to sign my petition for working families by midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67739188/420680783/587712529?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230807_PT_workers_1.1_1MO_CindeWarmington_na_na_workingfamilies&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU5OWY3NC02NzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f_In8n3SGFlsDzzOnMPXnlgXAenF7Jxl6Bho_psng4c=&emci=06725db6-3335-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3ae99f74-6735-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)_** | | **[Sign On: Support Working Families](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67739189/420680784/587712529?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230807_PT_workers_1.1_1MO_CindeWarmington_na_na_workingfamilies&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWU5OWY3NC02NzM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f_In8n3SGFlsDzzOnMPXnlgXAenF7Jxl6Bho_psng4c=&emci=06725db6-3335-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3ae99f74-6735-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=45626166)**
---

Fighting for working families also means fighting for the rights of workers to organize for better working conditions and stronger pay. On the Executive Council I have stood with my friends in the labor community to demand fairer compensation, more reliable benefits, and smarter health and safety standards. As governor, I’ll always be looking out for working people.

Working families like the one I grew up in still had access to the American Dream, but for too many folks today that dream is out of reach. Now, I need to know if you’re all in, like I am, to build a New Hampshire where everyone has the opportunity to thrive.

clean_body: | Hi, it’s Cinde. I want to talk to you about some of the biggest challenges facing working families today. When my parents were first starting out, my father worked in a shipyard and my mother waited tables. Still, they were able to buy a small house and provide for me and my three siblings. Today working class families in New Hampshire are finding it harder and harder to get by. Too many people in our state can’t afford to make ends meet here. With the rising costs of childcare, energy, and housing — too many New Hampshire families are falling behind instead of getting ahead. | | Fighting for working families also means fighting for the rights of workers to organize for better working conditions and stronger pay. On the Executive Council I have stood with my friends in the labor community to demand fairer compensation, more reliable benefits, and smarter health and safety standards. As governor, I’ll always be looking out for working people. Working families like the one I grew up in still had access to the American Dream, but for too many folks today that dream is out of reach. Now, I need to know if you’re all in, like I am, to build a New Hampshire where everyone has the opportunity to thrive. Thank you, Cinde * | = | = Click here to from Cinde Warmington's email list. Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington. William Christie, Treasurer. PO Box 2133, Concord, NH 03302

| | Peter, it’s official. **Congress is in August recess. ** August is when Congress traditionally returns to their states and districts for the entire month. It is intended to be a time for Senators and Representatives to meet with constituents and learn more about the issues that matter to their voters. **But just because Congress isn't in session doesn't mean the work stops here at Heritage Action.**
Our _inside-outside strategy_ means when we're not busy fighting here in Washington, we're focusing our efforts on building an unstoppable coalition of grassroots conservatives like you.

clean_body: This is the time of the year when members of Congress go back to their districts and are supposed to be making themselves accountable to YOU.| | | | | Peter, it’s official. Congress is in August recess. August is when Congress traditionally returns to their states and districts for the entire month. It is intended to be a time for Senators and Representatives to meet with constituents and learn more about the issues that matter to their voters. But just because Congress isn't in session doesn't mean the work stops here at Heritage Action. Our inside-outside strategy means when we're not busy fighting here in Washington, we're focusing our efforts on building an unstoppable coalition of grassroots conservatives like you. And this August, we want to double those efforts. That's why we're running our until the House returns on September 12th. With this special opportunity, you can give today, and then schedule a second donation for September 12th. Your gift today will fuel our work through the August recess, as we hold grassroots events in districts and connect conservatives with their elected leaders. Your scheduled “moneybomb” gift for September 12th will be well-timed for when the House returns to Washington, so we can effectively hold them accountable to their promises. By pooling resources together for September 12th, it will ensure we hit the ground running at a most crucial moment. Peter, we're asking you to today to ensure we can hit the ground running in our remaining legislative fights this year, like: 🔔 Impeaching the Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas 🔔 Repealing the Dept. of Defense’s Taxpayer-Funded Abortion Policy Memo🔔 Fighting for spending cuts in the upcoming budget deal🔔 Challenging Biden’s latest student loan scheme | | Thank you,Ryan WalkerActing Executive DirectorHeritage Action | | | Here at Heritage Action, we saw the damage caused by the wokeness infecting American business and culture, so last year, we launched our ESG Hurts campaign to fight ESG wherever it rears its ugly head. Hi Peter,
>From climate change to health care, public safety to the rising cost of living, our country faces many pressing challenges. As a grassroots-driven campaign, hearing from you helps us not only understand what everyday voters are dealing with but also what you most want to see prioritized in Congress.
There is no shortage of issues that we need to tackle, but the ones most important to us, are the ones that matter most to you.
Take a few minutes to take our Congressional Priorities Survey today >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
Before being elected to the Arizona Legislature, Raquel worked for over a decade as a community organizer. She spent her time knocking on doors, meeting with people, hearing so many stories and concerns. And that’s what this campaign is all about – centering our community’s stories.
Hearing about the most pressing issues in your life helps us run a better campaign. Take our priorities survey today! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7qcdBwUQl0uLoSy_2ij3Eg2]
Muchas gracias,
Team Terán

name: CaucusRoom
subject: There is No Transparency at the White House
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-asjtyd-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! Kamala makes more word salad. [_Who is writing her speeches?_](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-y/)**
**No****Transparency**** at the White House** At least**[442 reporters have lost their credentials](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-j/) **since the White House press office changed its rules for journalists to be eligible for permanent passes**.** **Dear Devon** Jim Jordan said a bombshell 2011 note from then-VP Biden to his son's then-business partner Devon Archer is**[solid proof the current president has not been aboveboard in his denials on the matter.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-t/)** **Triggering US Response** **[China and Russia conducted a joint naval operation near U.S. territory](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-i/) e**arlier this week, triggering a large response from the U.S. Navy. **Now Impeachments are****Frivolous****?** Nancy Pelosi became annoyed at host Andrea Mitchell **[when she brought up the House GOP possibly seeking to impeach Biden.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-d/)**

**No Full Service!** **[Oregonians begin pumping their own gas](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-h/)** for the first time in 72 years! **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-k/)!**
* Seems **[about right](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* The rest of you **[go to jail](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-p/).**
* **[_Nobody_ ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-x/)**cares.
* I'd like to **[solve the puzzle](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-m/)**.

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-c/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-q/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-a/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-asjtyd-trhiujldw-f/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-asjtyd-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-u-asjtyd-trhiujldw-e/)
---

| Hi there,

_**Michigan is at the center of former president Trump’s most recent indictment. A key component of Trump’s plan to steal the 2020 election was to overturn the results in Michigan.**_ It reminds us that we only narrowly avoided a democratic collapse in 2020. Thanks to a few key districts narrowly voting Democratic, like MI-03, we were able to deny Trump’s second bid for the presidency.

_**These most recent indictments show that we cannot take Blue Michigan for granted.**_

That’s why it is so imperative that we organize early to hold one of the ‘swingy-est’ and most purple areas of the state - Hillary’s district in West Michigan. Her seat will play a key role in securing the presidency in 2024.

An investment in Hillary’s campaign is an investment in a Blue Michigan and an investment in staving off the anti-democratic attacks of extremists. name: Dr. Bob
subject: Friend - Medical payments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
- I believe the most impactful piece of legislation for US citizens is universal healthcare. I'm running for Congress to be the doctor in the House who gets it done.
We need a publicly financed, non-profit, national health insurance program that fully covers all medical costs for every American citzen.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Along with that fight, we are one of the only Congressional campaigns in the nation to embark on the transformative journey to tackle America's medical debt. We have already passed a resolution with the Michigan Democratic Party to make it a priority.
Next stop: Congress. Please help me get there. Together, we can build a future [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] where financial burdens no longer hinder access to healthcare.
HELP ME FIGHT FOR HEALTHCARE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
My brother Stephen was fierce on the rugby field and once endured an entire marathon running backwards. He was a talented photographer and a great father. I admired him. Cancer didn't care; he died at age 42.
As a single father, the last thing Stephen needed was medical debt.
Today, one in four cancer patients declare bankruptcy and 40% deplete family funds in two years.
I've made it my life’s mission to serve patients like my brother because sick and vulnerable people need to receive medicine, not collection notices. Healthcare — including palliative care — is a fundamental human right.
We need to wipe out all medical debt in the US, starting with collections to cancer patients.
For Stephen and millions who know firsthand this emotional and financial struggle.
A contribution from you today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] will help me spread this message across the nation.
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan and the UP
Democrat, MI01
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

"Friends of Dr. Bob"

Marquette, MI 49855 [http://www.votedrbob.com]

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Jordan thinks us “hillbillies” in “fly-over country” are dumb
body:
My friends, neighbors, and family believe in justice and rule of law.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67740126/420684133/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkyZjBmODctNmIzNS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0yf14OHrrfzg1Q8wtqOTHGtQzNcOH6JBoSTYGeAMiyg=)
---
Friend, Running for Congress in a largely rural district in Ohio can sometimes invite folks who don’t live here, or who reside in bigger cities, to stereotype me and the good people I represent. We’re used to it—and we know that, most of the time, we know that this kind of thinking comes from lack of experience or ignorance of our way of life. When members of my own party repeat damaging stereotypes about rural Americans, I take it as an opportunity to educate and recruit more supporters to broaden our coalition to be a big tent party. But when hypocrites who get elected to represent us in government let slip their true feelings about rural life, nothing gets me angrier and more determined to beat them. Jim Jordan thinks that “hillbillies” in rural Ohio, as he says, are so utterly stupid and biased that no one believes that Donald Trump should be held accountable for any crimes he may have committed after he attempted to overturn the 2020 election.
---

clean_body: My friends, neighbors, and family believe in justice and rule of law.| | | = Friend, Running for Congress in a largely rural district in Ohio can sometimes invite folks who don’t live here, or who reside in bigger cities, to stereotype me and the good people I represent. We’re used to it—and we know that, most of the time, we know that this kind of thinking comes from lack of experience or ignorance of our way of life. When members of my own party repeat damaging stereotypes about rural Americans, I take it as an opportunity to educate and recruit more supporters to broaden our coalition to be a big tent party. But when hypocrites who get elected to represent us in government let slip their true feelings about rural life, nothing gets me angrier and more determined to beat them. Jim Jordan thinks that “hillbillies” in rural Ohio, as he says, are so utterly stupid and biased that no one believes that Donald Trump should be held accountable for any crimes he may have committed after he attempted to overturn the 2020 election. = Jordan may think the hillbillies in “flyover country” despise justice and the rule of law, but he is wrong. I’ve met a lot of Independents and Republicans who are appalled by Trump’s actions and they REALLY hate more attempts by Jordan to cover up another scandal and more criminal behavior: = Real rural Ohioans I met earlier today - (1) they aren't hillbillies, and (2) they do not support Trump and what he did on Jan. 6th. They are also both voting for me! | | Jim Jordan, the career politician who has been living the elite D.C. life for over 16 years, has never represented us here in Ohio’s Fourth District, nor the country for that matter. He hasn’t written any bills and he votes against all of us 97% of the time. [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCEtqZ6FMK3U6TY9FA7JoC-UGG6Q-eAzU9iEXMhA1izEaDIHLtdAPdYomtpXDqDyTi6rXl_EgIHEwntcSFJE5fMs1Gbpl5LknabrfhrENNKTMp1ardpFsrmaNCxgLIfIR8mJL3nU7KfcdBQZQV1GhIkTyrG5_khn4ovQvBS7VP1IM%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: **[have you had the opportunity to contribute to my campaign yet?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCIDLFSrWJNusw5_QiLxfHN2qtpBA_FagKKQ409cKuONuTJSDAEn_g78nRsx827BGMek-ghklprCIKXIsDrh1SHPbcTc6vqmApV1kDaNPUUFkNgfP-mlgXSItSUfjswF3u6R-zb3ojN_c-XYaBKE1PNLhG46nsXKwxCfLN-M8waRU%3D)** I know that I haven’t been running in this race for that long so there is a good possibility you haven’t.

I hope you can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today...

Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the **[13 new donors](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCZLHSCVzgeDf4HYSW9d_3x8gIYgM2hpz-5OAV20zrrNP_H0Vn8gg6oTRlIbbWD9GrPtoxAX_NHD0DFottjV1IpHejRuQc54Grxyy4o5yPCTmrKigO9I4cM3CY28q8aV2QJTEHYe7E3ijBtaI3CQgYKhXJIJXIHBOb1CYg927DQcY%3D)** I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today.
* **I’m new here:** I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message.

* **The 2024 Senate race in Montana** will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate.

* **It can take a long time** to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000.

* **My opponent just announced** that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand.

**In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history.**

Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you that**with every new donation that comes in the door,** the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate.

**[Will you be one of the 13 conservatives I’m looking for today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCyLqU_7a8nxgNvpWA05DXdPHf9xEBwfRZkbk7B9qyeCZKq9_VXY-nxXsfcEuSnTxR1wuclMc08mg8Ch-O4-Am5FZoWotBKmwJAcQU2Gtm5IhKgnBPOG_RhGLnhdyw4kNKUH4cLs0FrNw0PpDf1zhD7Ldi28IYzwqPpUcRZIE7Ny4%3D)** Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today?
[**HELP ME GROW MY DONOR LIST
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCpkPDFl0QT8LFojte7TnRU2_d6w1x6F5KjhT6M8WVjepcnkCdPkb-cGSm2TMO48sCJfhDEKdnsYR0wiGuc5O86BUZlZZRCQ2iQWQwi5AFmFQmAUDrby9KSxr1swn5fQ3j7SRlMGP479PhTGmeaNzHFA1CeqxuNodzd8Lcqhpj2pA%3D)
**To recap - **
1. My opponent raised more than $5 million from April to June,
2. Has raised more than $10 million since January,
3. And has more than $10 million in his campaign accounts

The hard thing about being a political newcomer is that my opponent has a **network of vast liberal donors he’s cultivated for nearly 20 years**. Most of you reading this email likely haven’t even heard of me before I launched on June 27th.

The emails, texts, and phone outreach to conservative donors like you is essential in the early stages of a Senate campaign. **[I know the middle of summer isn’t the best time to be asking for help as this is likely a busy time for you but having the support of grassroots conservatives in Montana and around the country is too important to my campaign not to try](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTC4UfIig8h64hJ2qmDEGFBYp9b8sk0Vj0aqLjA7aJekBAwk1hdZgOkupQ5lIcQlRJBlWLKWsebkKBl4L--cMK-L241OKwLEnL1aeUDv0T-rcgZqthA6mzKKoOh1QiFk9YCRCGB5J7czjdL-XRoYsrqbQrExBXb_QZqaDZZTpZTPZY%3D)**.

[**HELP ME GROW MY DONOR LIST
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCwJ0xxeSgdC9eRdhk2wXfC8C02aA7J_0HMTXMp3pELqaERxQPLAaHybTxG_sebbKDzymQM-AvjNbsArm1fg0B3Mi-CfcWSTysgpcz1_XwxXQ66wGd3Suyrf-TV3R9JOUXIVN6ExorrNEyhhHpnHQgekxjViJdeAaLS9Or45osqFs%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL
CHIP IN TODAY **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b9454a39fcb94ae38dc41cd400d087fa&_e=N5onPq-xzFVGSfJQMqm-dPzgLGbCsWfzmeBJ-zgNFoE8D39rRxq6DID02BhTjhVOzdFKeXORzilkP9_hBN9b6cQ7lS0MFGJTRW3wvhxJ20wOvd0a6PK-OYkK4lYhVyQBPW7YXYnRBhDUw5GP-0JtUvCc3uvrjqxz4gPWWXpK9AQmpuBvUYJy0-rrLXKCRFyepADo85ctYuoX8FszGoJCFxLkiOCkm96EmXOYxfXpzWieEAo9diBfeuvjCKk60dTCWyPk5o-iYZD07uGoHOGagX8cnyrerJZ8TwwnSKBRSx__Or5C5SR6A4OiyIv3W8hO2e3Pnjwu-WPMbkdXD1UntokuZ0dr-2d2-ZWnK9hQcNF4qaGLjQ8WQa9CMgUhdo8ABAzY-W-Wf5xXCCiHe0OfbpRC3lfJll2_DCXhSPns8-Q%3D)

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

clean_body: If you have a minute of time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today, will you keep reading this note now? | | Fellow Conservative, It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: I know that I haven’t been running in this race for that long so there is a good possibility you haven’t. I hope you can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today... Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today. I’m new here: I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message. The 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. It can take a long time to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000. My opponent just announced that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand. In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history. Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you thatwith every new donation that comes in the door, the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate. Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today? To recap - 1. My opponent raised more than $5 million from April to June, 2. Has raised more than $10 million since January, 3. And has more than $10 million in his campaign accounts The hard thing about being a political newcomer is that my opponent has a network of vast liberal donors he’s cultivated for nearly 20 years. Most of you reading this email likely haven’t even heard of me before I launched on June 27th. The emails, texts, and phone outreach to conservative donors like you is essential in the early stages of a Senate campaign. . Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Let us know which issues you care about before the first Presidential Primary Debate on this month! | | | 🚨 PRE-DEBATE ISSUES POLL 🚨 1\. ◯ Yes ◯ No 2\. ◯ Awful ◯ Bad ◯ Good ◯ Great 3\. ◯ Stance on "Woke" Issues ◯ Standing up to China ◯ Border security ◯ State of the economy 4\. Share your thoughts on how to save America | I look forward to debating my Republican competitors and speaking hard truths. I want to hear from you, Fellow American. Submit your thoughts before our poll closes in just one (1) hour. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Young Democrats of America
subject: FW: Only 2 Days left to Defeat Issue 1!
body:
| Hey Derek, I just wanted to make sure you got this email before tomorrow. In less than 12 hours, the polls are going to open for the special election in Ohio where voters will decide the fate of Issue 1. | | Peter —

Right now in Ohio, one of the most important abortion fights in the country is taking place — **_and we can’t afford to lose._**

A group of anti-abortion extremists, funded by right-wing billionaires, are trying to change the state constitution in Ohio, to block a ballot measure this fall that would expand access to abortion.

**They know they can’t win a fair fight, so they’re changing the rules — _and they’re counting on you to not pay attention!_** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0Du-AP-7s0JzZRTDOFalJZEHeTcEEranhkGGLlZ_UA5CUqR_0ZvwxbhGx4X9wZggpiKNm_PKkWcLbEvDA0n977p-WbP69NZszw09q1z1OWGUGPU1Ksorj4ljlxBuORH4gY5uBXVNXMm-ugtaOXRYmkhacAHJ6NilrXUuMqMVRv8l1QxSDwa7BYfnGhP--R-cFEBcn-kBEd6RVylDFrm4oCZP-6h1V-vf1PMLxMuBBpaK_Phh-dokn2L1PBOajeaWeScPiSPUbojW21Nb97uSt2OrG-rEJk3fmyJmpNskFXM-fUp_gMYTwu4emK_48ybUXw1gnaMEVNFwwUsePm2TDfZC5R8BwRnYD2H5eUZ7EbMLyrIUZTotFaf7iBDsXX4q0/3yj/t13XHRKPSR6Sr1S-3FavrQ/h1/U8H-90CZmJH2snH1cFkmfASaA3M88efG2_Qnwtcsjsc) Here’s the thing, Peter: If this right-wing constitutional coup is successful in Ohio, **_it will be the beginning of a much greater attack on abortion rights across the country._**

[That’s why here at The Collective PAC, we’re gearing up to take the fight to right-wing extremists before they come knocking on our door. body:
I’m running to reclaim our district and bring back strong representation in Congress in 2024.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67741279/420688369/-118997080?refcode=BLU-LGC-20230807-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDU2OWYyMy03MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vx3a2ox2BR2f8yKGK1Z0d0kX4LtFA5Ajed6BWd6Hie4=)

| Peter,

As a lifelong resident of this community, I’m worried about the direction we’re heading. Anthony D’Esposito is out of touch with the priorities of the hardworking families on Long Island.

I’m running to reclaim our district and bring back strong representation in Congress in 2024. I’m committed to getting to work on day one and prioritizing the safety of our children, putting food on the table for families, and ensuring my constituents plant their roots here for generations to come.

[_**Will you contribute $10 right away to show your support for our people-powered campaign and reclaim our district in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67741280/420688370/-118997080?refcode=BLU-LGC-20230807-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDU2OWYyMy03MTM1LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vx3a2ox2BR2f8yKGK1Z0d0kX4LtFA5Ajed6BWd6Hie4=)

clean_body: I’m running to reclaim our district and bring back strong representation in Congress in 2024. | = | Peter, As a lifelong resident of this community, I’m worried about the direction we’re heading. Anthony D’Esposito is out of touch with the priorities of the hardworking families on Long Island. I’m running to reclaim our district and bring back strong representation in Congress in 2024. I’m committed to getting to work on day one and prioritizing the safety of our children, putting food on the table for families, and ensuring my constituents plant their roots here for generations to come. = = | = Every dollar you invest will strengthen the foundation of our grassroots movement and I’m confident your support will get us to the finish line. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s reclaim our district together, Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Katie Porter
subject: Extreme heat costs us billions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
And Republicans still don’t want to take action.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27817%2E3422442%2EQ2e492)
Derek, July was the hottest month our planet has ever seen. _And still, Republicans in Congress are resisting any further action on climate change. It’s BS._
I’m not just mad because my own house doesn't have air conditioning. Extreme heat alone costs our economy **$100 billion** per year, while climate change related natural disasters have already cost the U.S. **trillions in taxpayer dollars**. Worsening heat and extreme weather events are literally taking lives.
Congress must take bold action to hold polluters accountable and invest in clean energy sources.
**My bill to raise rates on polluters who drill on our public lands finally took effect this year. But there's so much more to do.**
In the Senate I’ll fight to pass the Green New Deal, adequately fund the Environmental Protection Agency, and support climate legislation that doesn’t leave any community behind.
**I’m proud to reject contributions from Big Oil executives and all corporate PACs. Our campaign is truly funded by people like you.[Can you join our team today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230807?refcode=EMAK07_1_HEA_20230807_V1_F&refcode2=27817_3422442_Q2e492&akid=27817%2E3422442%2EQ2e492)**

Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Fellow Conservative,

It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: **[have you had the opportunity to contribute to my campaign yet?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1efc7da6d13f4bd68b255fc4aa086441&_e=zdyDUziOP6TBR04CmE-qY32QvA1zFiMT8EJPiYZ7948x1X2_BfCvaoLb44DGTCzIfzaCS6-suL1JQXhlwToGZKrjkcb42IHRCViSbAnbpuqEHNXp24dbEoqG_P-aIfuQgjnqIKSdnKZU2RPlzb52ymbkmJ6Av8fPahBBHnbzcgX1ZGbi0MEmOPuUUClRjIQXwLpVZ_wRNhlqAW2PVbT-4SX62ubp1-rvp4GCZflIB4d_rGLsfSh4-Lk8FFQ_Mz4oWAc335eRDlFYtF0nBhxJhiIms6ogkGqSuojWURO6PhgtuoccqM-i__O-hn3VOovBXkFbK5vvdO_OI-Xdf8MjL4hRmeOntklrCDl5qu4a2RQ7XoIi7KtFiW3k0Fgonw2nj4J2ih8jEKN9lpZRhkIVwKWZcbD7MYTqiRP8OwJRhNY%3D)** I know that I haven’t been running in this race for that long so there is a good possibility you haven’t.

I hope you can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today...

Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the **[13 new donors](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1efc7da6d13f4bd68b255fc4aa086441&_e=zdyDUziOP6TBR04CmE-qY32QvA1zFiMT8EJPiYZ7948x1X2_BfCvaoLb44DGTCzIfzaCS6-suL1JQXhlwToGZKrjkcb42IHRCViSbAnbpuqEHNXp24dbEoqG_P-aIfuQgjnqIKSdnKZU2RPlzb52ymbkmJ6Av8fPahBBHnbzcgX1ZGbi0MEmOPuUUClRjIQXwLpVZ_wRNhlqAW2PVbT-4SX62ubp1-rvp4GCZflIB4d_rGLsfSh4-Lk8FFQ_Mz4oZ1EhPZLQ95zUlrmNlQevVewcZbWmQ2gBoc4KWB5wsii4cUwK5tiSyOX36fUDFtNYy96Bq5ZMuv3wuXlQvOKENQ5-yi4r3KEBA6ejo1gqfh1MmfQInGw6GauhdsndvezGrkvONIfFflnxmNRHqMMAFP1uoijbTWClUr9psFAE7nM%3D)** I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today.
* **I’m new here:** I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message.

* **The 2024 Senate race in Montana** will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate.

* **It can take a long time** to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000.

* **My opponent just announced** that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand.

**In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history.**

Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you that**with every new donation that comes in the door,** the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate.

**[Will you be one of the 13 conservatives I’m looking for today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1efc7da6d13f4bd68b255fc4aa086441&_e=zdyDUziOP6TBR04CmE-qY32QvA1zFiMT8EJPiYZ7948x1X2_BfCvaoLb44DGTCzIfzaCS6-suL1JQXhlwToGZKrjkcb42IHRCViSbAnbpuqEHNXp24dbEoqG_P-aIfuQgjnqIKSdnKZU2RPlzb52ymbkmJ6Av8fPahBBHnbzcgX1ZGbi0MEmOPuUUClRjIQXwLpVZ_wRNhlqAW2PVbT-4SX62ubp1-rvp4GCZflIB4d_rGLsfSh4-Lk8FFQ_Mz4oahc4Nz76oGp0YvgoseiaYkloLo9af43iK_-fOCSGaD4K2KwhPMOmRUEAWwnQNZj8UFooJ1pvCWVuyb3y8p33D5YVNfdy4Lx1epnHe0kzN4fxjmJIIZ7bl9c0o5gDXLIzmrtJNM75Uzhe1p7HVUrg5Z2KiN1oAUn4ouKRLBgtfZY%3D)** Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today?

clean_body: The emails, texts, and phone outreach to conservative donors like you is essential in the early stages of a Senate campaign. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy - Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in Montana with a quick question for you: I know that I haven’t been running in this race for that long so there is a good possibility you haven’t. I hope you can give me a minute of your time for me to explain why I need you to get involved in this race today... Here’s a list of the reasons that I’m asking for you to be one of the I’m hoping to add to our list of Month One Supporters today. I’m new here: I’m not a career politician - I’ve never run for public office before. I need your help as I travel across Montana to spread our conservative message. The 2024 Senate race in Montana will determine whether Republicans or Democrats control the Senate. It can take a long time to raise the necessary funds to run a campaign that could easily wind-up costing more than $100,000,000. My opponent just announced that he raised $5.1 million in the 2nd quarter of 2023 and now has over $10 million cash on hand. In fact, he just raised the most money that anyone ever has during the 2nd quarter of an “off year” election in Montana history. Adding 13 new donors to our list of Month One Supporters might not seem like a lot, but let me tell you thatwith every new donation that comes in the door, the more determined we are to win this race and flip the Senate. Perhaps you’ll chip in $5, $25 or even $50 by the end of the day today? To recap - 1. My opponent raised more than $5 million from April to June, 2. Has raised more than $10 million since January, 3. And has more than $10 million in his campaign accounts The hard thing about being a political newcomer is that my opponent has a network of vast liberal donors he’s cultivated for nearly 20 years. Most of you reading this email likely haven’t even heard of me before I launched on June 27th. The emails, texts, and phone outreach to conservative donors like you is essential in the early stages of a Senate campaign. . Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. | Peter,

Texas always comes first.

The Uvalde massacre was one of the darkest days in our history. In the days, weeks, and months that I spent uncovering the failures of that day, the people of Uvalde became more than constituents – they became family.

I’ve spent all my life in Texas. I’ve talked to hardworking people from all over our great state. All anyone wants is to reach the American Dream. While Ted Cruz takes big checks from corporate donors and the NRA, my campaign is funded by people like you. My campaign won’t take a dime from corporate PACs because I am fighting to represent hard-working Texans.

Texans are hurting, it’s past time for a change in leadership. [_**Can I count on your support with a $5 contribution to my campaign? name: Jeff Larivee
subject: Need to touch base with you on this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZOE LOFGREN'S MAINSTREAM PAC
body:

name: Bette Schanafelt
subject: Peter, thank you for supporting Flemming Larsen
body:
Hi Peter,

Thank you for supporting Flemming Larsen’s campaign for US Congress. We’ll keep you posted about upcoming events and let you know when the yard signs are available.

We hope you'll consider other opportunities to reach more folks in your community, such as:

* Would you be willing to host a meet and greet among your friends, family, and neighbors?
* Would you be available to help represent Flemming at local events?
* Can we place a yard sign in front of your house?

Please let me know if you are able to do any of these things or if you have something else in mind. Feel free to reply to this email or give me a call at 805.624.1027

Best,

Bette Schanafelt
Volunteer Coordinator
805.624.1027
www.larsen4nevada.com

[A flag with a cityscape and a tower Description automatically generated]

We’ve set a goal to raise another $125,000 for Adam’s campaign, but the only way we’ll be able to go up against their millions and hold Boebert accountable is if grassroots donors like you give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It shouldn’t come down to money, but we cannot afford to fall behind – and Lauren Boebert’s fundraising machine is about to go into overdrive. Adam is so grateful to have your support. Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

| Hi, it’s Dan with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. We’re over halfway through 2023, and everyone on our team is grateful for your ongoing support.

The work we do to elect true climate champions is only possible because thousands of people like you across the country believe that together we can build a livable future for everyone.

Because our work is only possible because of your support, we would love to hear from you. While we rely on our email program for grassroots donations, we want to ensure that you’re receiving the kind of updates and information that you want to see.

We’re working to get at least [500] responses from PA to reach statistical significance, so please take a moment to respond below. [_**Take our survey today!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67742570/420692770/-1737794544?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlZTIzOGYzLTc2MzUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=50onNuu6cbPH8u6lx_EYX_3g5oeAht0eJL1a_21SIi4=&emci=fbe238f3-7635-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fee238f3-7635-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

| [TAKE SURVEY→ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67742571/420692771/-2141557771?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlZTIzOGYzLTc2MzUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=50onNuu6cbPH8u6lx_EYX_3g5oeAht0eJL1a_21SIi4=&emci=fbe238f3-7635-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=fee238f3-7635-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

name: Gov. Roy Cooper (via DLCC.org)
subject: As a Democratic Governor in a state with a Republican-controlled legislature, I’m no stranger to tough fights >>
body:
I’m reaching out to you today with a critical message about supermajorities, Democratic leadership, and the importance of building our power at the state level. | | |
---
| | It’s North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper, and I have an important opportunity for you. **I hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out:** As a Democratic Governor in a state with a Republican-controlled legislature, I’m no stranger to tough legislative fights. And as a key supporter in the fight to elect state Democrats in some of the most competitive races on the ballot, I know _you_ aren’t either. In states all across our country, far-right Republican legislators have been waging an all-out assault on our rights, our freedoms, and even our very democracy itself – and in North Carolina, we’re seeing the consequences of these attacks in real time. Only weeks after securing a razor-thin supermajority in the legislature, GOP lawmakers used their power to override my veto with every Republican voting yes (even the Republicans who promised their constituents to protect the right to abortion) and every Democrat voting no. **But they didn’t stop there.** _Now,_ Republicans are trying to game the system to hang on to their supermajority for years to come, creating new barriers to voting rights and giving themselves more power over state elections, all while checking off boxes on their far-right wishlist, including public education cuts and tax breaks for the wealthy. _I refuse to let these attacks go unchecked._ **We need to do everything in our power to break up Republicans’ narrow supermajority – and we’re not too far out of reach: The GOP is clutching on to its veto-proof power with just a _one-seat margin_. ** [Will you chip in $7 right now to expand Democratic power, break up Republican supermajorities, and secure a more progressive future in North Carolina and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhFQI5RXeVE44K-I2sPBm6vzCiVYBEq-UpyY2L3aPR9kl2XrECwbmn6DfFBgsC_th9x_9MaVOFPI3IwcgqO0fvsSqDrkMAT1toobyHbPSQ4diK9KRVMrDB8y3tr3_Dl2xIEkiAnkagZcJGvS-NlkYlOa7Bjog6b9Br0vz_IGv3FGOMZheFe_fYKCKwkG1bQ6BeIrbie28RBLb6-DbZwQdZNaC2Kiu4l-agRAquwt0SZHp3tI9Tjsr-LP6FmXL2th4w2ObQC9yOG1Gfs6HIKpupZd8Othb-OUz7rhJO0KGFVswvWzjj6wJ7BoXu3_1A-M_N66GEDq1nx02b4pHsdWQs7ONSptUyA2BjdAI9g3EkPieLgxNv3WE9M3lzT-pyOa1D_hdmzFOq2p-Ucpym6qaa-QtuItFMCsM-ox_xbJMbwdzgqIALDhGD26xh6K6Wz5V9vzlJGOV0HfFEA8dmQTGioZBkMZgnV07jjEkO6LRq1A/3yj/9TaxwSEeSVO0eAZE-D037Q/h0/zktAyBHh3wBtro61a0-4C5SupkkFSWFKWylRaA61GNA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Republicans aren’t just abusing their power in North Carolina – GOP state legislators are furthering their far-right agendas across the country.
We can fix this problem at the ballot box: By electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide, we can fight back against Republicans' extreme platform and elect leaders who will fight for a more progressive future in states like yours.
**We’ll need a tidal wave of support to make this vision a reality – and that starts with grassroots Democrats like you stepping up to the plate and investing in this fight.**
