clean_body: I’m reaching out to you today with a critical message about supermajorities, Democratic leadership, and the importance of building our power at the state level. | | | | | It’s North Carolina Governor Roy Cooper, and I have an important opportunity for you. I hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out: As a Democratic Governor in a state with a Republican-controlled legislature, I’m no stranger to tough legislative fights. And as a key supporter in the fight to elect state Democrats in some of the most competitive races on the ballot, I know you aren’t either. In states all across our country, far-right Republican legislators have been waging an all-out assault on our rights, our freedoms, and even our very democracy itself – and in North Carolina, we’re seeing the consequences of these attacks in real time. Only weeks after securing a razor-thin supermajority in the legislature, GOP lawmakers used their power to override my veto with every Republican voting yes (even the Republicans who promised their constituents to protect the right to abortion) and every Democrat voting no. But they didn’t stop there. Now, Republicans are trying to game the system to hang on to their supermajority for years to come, creating new barriers to voting rights and giving themselves more power over state elections, all while checking off boxes on their far-right wishlist, including public education cuts and tax breaks for the wealthy. I refuse to let these attacks go unchecked. We need to do everything in our power to break up Republicans’ narrow supermajority – and we’re not too far out of reach: The GOP is clutching on to its veto-proof power with just a one-seat margin. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Republicans aren’t just abusing their power in North Carolina – GOP state legislators are furthering their far-right agendas across the country. We can fix this problem at the ballot box: By electing Democrats to state legislatures nationwide, we can fight back against Republicans' extreme platform and elect leaders who will fight for a more progressive future in states like yours. We’ll need a tidal wave of support to make this vision a reality – and that starts with grassroots Democrats like you stepping up to the plate and investing in this fight. With gratitude, Roy Cooper Governor, North Carolina | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Files Briefs in the U.S. Supreme for Review of Ninth Circuit Decisions Penalizing Group for Exposing Sales of Fetal Body Parts
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed two amicus curiae (friend of the court) briefs in the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of The Center for Medical Progress (CMP) and its founder David Daleiden, one of which asks for review of the Ninth Circuit Court’s affirmation of a monetary award against CMP, the other asks for review of an injunction granted to the National Abortion Federation that prevents CMP from publishing more abortion-related videos.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 7, 2023
---|---|---

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed two amicus curiae (friend of the court) briefs in the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of The Center for Medical Progress (CMP) and its founder David Daleiden, one of which asks for review of the Ninth Circuit Court’s affirmation of a monetary award against CMP, the other asks for review of an injunction granted to the National Abortion Federation that prevents CMP from publishing more abortion-related videos. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 7, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed two amicus curiae (friend of the court) briefs in the U.S. Supreme Court on behalf of The Center for Medical Progress (CMP) and its founder David Daleiden, one of which asks for review of the Ninth Circuit Court’s affirmation of a monetary award against CMP, the other asks for review of an injunction granted to the National Abortion Federation that prevents CMP from publishing more abortion-related videos. ---|--- | | | | | In a growing national trend of rewarding illegal immigrants with official government benefits and documents, more states are offering undocumented residents official driver’s licenses. In all, 19 states and the District of Columbia have passed measures that permit foreigners living in the U.S. illegally to obtain driver’s licenses. Just last month laws went into effect in Massachusetts and Rhode Island and Minnesota will begin offering illegal aliens the cards in the next few months. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration has left the rule of law and the U.S. Constitution behind with its latest indictment of President Trump for daring to dispute the 2020 presidential election, as is his God-given right as a president, a citizen, and a candidate under state, federal and constitutional law. ---|--- | | | | | “Federal law mandates voter roll transparency,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Given Maine’s refusal to release its voter roll information, it’s reasonable to think that cleaning up voter rolls is not a priority. Dirty voter rolls can mean dirty elections.” ---|--- | | | The National Desk Judicial Watch, a conservative group focused on exposing government misconduct, has filed a Freedom of Information Act lawsuit against the Justice Department for records pertaining to the Hunter Biden investigation. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update

body:
| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning.**_

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. _**[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=242aaee7b2b7421686cb7b6fd1c9aa3b&_e=UGNousw2nbfs3z0JQ72sZ56i6CMjvRIRoS_FEqBkUhBRiD7wTpzxwGU1oemWOO7wrlel2-8oFtVVWj2GQTgM4B2Q18_HEAQG-QeFwIUvXeHDj-vxqzimDZ7MitWcej-jIgLF_G4N9LjBOxjaSgtuMHxuDtXUaXefNeJLNVjGemGaImFTTK0Dij5b2vw0g8RXaS3R8mOx9ASSzkwBmVfBD5T3NXqgtY08leUuTrTAeXjPxUQ6Fsnj3nCNLwDx7zcNe1_imaQ4uw5HGDrOGySy_99IW33IouVWox_fJKQ2FEYuIyQ-6Gz1JLiq_0SIPyFd5mW4DcNLa75uP17JMNjxH-A73ddmez8RzHVqLxDJd3N2Fdsxe6W2Z-zuS2CyO05aSDOpgCYK5YuzAnpQ9efHXlTBbeemZ_whASxFH7lMY8E%3D "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**_

clean_body: | | | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority. The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is damning. But here 's the thing: When the Clintons went after Trump... When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump... When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump... And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump... They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES. Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. "Can my colleagues and I count on you?" | | | | | | Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. clean_body: | | | | Can you make sure you sign off on this? | Peter - We wanted to make sure you received a copy of Mondaire Jones's track record while he was in Congress: ❌ Voted for reckless spending that led to record inflation ❌ Endorsed by AOC and the socialist Squad ❌ Supported Cashless Bail and defunding the police ❌ Backs radical plans to ban gas-powered stoves and cars ❌ Abandoned YOU 4 months before his term was over Now that he’s running for Congress again, he’s asking you to sign off on this extreme agenda. So we're asking you point blank: What grade would you give his track record? | | | | | Thank you, Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York!_ Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =
